### Part 161

- #See, this is the Nara {NICKNAME} whom Aradashan mentioned. ｜ #你们看，这就是兰提沙说的那菈{NICKNAME}…
- Phew, that was close. I doubt I'll be this lucky this next time! ｜ 呼…我只是险胜，下次我就未必有这么走运了！
- This is the cured c—c—crocodile meat that I promised to give Aderfi previously. Pass it on to him for me, would you? ｜ 这个，上次我承诺的风干鳄、鳄鱼肉，请你交给阿德菲。

- Follow the water's flow and search for the source of the foul energy ｜ 沿着水流寻找「邪气」的源头
- I think that it might just be another law of nature. ｜ 我觉得，只是普通的自然法则吧？
- Sounds great! Then let's all go to Liyue Harbor! ｜ 好耶，那我们一起回璃月港！
- No! I—I just... This is my first time being interviewed, and I'm very thankful to The Steambird for... ｜ 不是！我、我就是…第一次接受采访…谢谢蒸汽鸟报愿意采访我…

- Message ｜ 留言
- Why's that? ｜ 为什么？
- Yeah, we should have introduced ourselves first, but that high-and-mighty attitude of yours is... ｜ 虽然我们没有先报上身份是不对啦，但是你那高高在上的态度…
- If this domain has the power to project our imaginations or the things we're searching for into reality... Well, maybe I can use that to my advantage to track it down. ｜ 如果这片秘境会把我们想象或追寻的事物投射为现实中存在的东西…我们就有可能借助这一特性找到那个东西哦。
- Hehe... Being able to gain complex knowledge and become a scholar with the snap of your fingers does sound like a dream, doesn't it? ｜ 呵呵…可以轻松掌握复杂的知识，不用动脑袋就能成为智者，听上去是很美好的事情。
- When characters use <color=#f39000>{0}</color> Elemental Burst(s), all party members will gain <color=#f39000>{1}%</color> Normal Attack SPD and <color=#f39000>{2}%</color> Movement SPD for the duration of this trial. ｜ 角色施放<color=#f39000>{0}</color>次元素爆发后，本次试炼中全队所有角色普通攻击速度提升<color=#f39000>{1}%</color>，移动速度提升<color=#f39000>{2}%</color>。

- Therefore, we will not replace or cancel any of our preexisting program. However... I will submit a proposal requesting to put the Iridescence Tour special performance as the final act of this year's festivities. ｜ 因此，原有的计划照常推进…但在新提案中，我想将「虹色巡回专场演出」申请作为今年海灯节的压轴节目。
- Bad fetor. I don't like it. ｜ 死气，不喜欢。
- Linyang ｜ 琳阳
- Hey-ho, pistachio! Today truly is a blessed day. ｜ 哈哈哈，我的坚果和花生壳哟，今天可真是个好日子…
- Crooo... ｜ 咕呜…
- Cards Out! Grievances Begone ｜ 牌出！旧怨弭散
- Hilichurls are surrounding us again! Were they attracted by the light? ｜ 又有丘丘人围上来了！是被刚才的光亮吸引了吗？
- But, thank you. ｜ 不过，谢谢你。
- Plumes of Purifying Light can be found scattered across the land defended by Khvarena. Some of them have to be obtained via special methods. ｜ 「净光翎」大多散落在灵光庇护的大地各处，有些则需要通过特殊的方式才能取得。

- P—Paimon can't believe she understood that! ｜ 我、我居然听懂了！
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- The last few days have been quite the ride, but fortunately, I can say with confidence that this case is finally coming to an end. ｜ 这几天真是惊心动魄，好在这起案件终于落下帷幕了。
- Faruzan ｜ 珐露珊
- First Half of June, 2025 ｜ 25年6月上
- Hmm, now that we've mentioned camp, we'll need a campsite. King Coconut's injured, so he'll need shelter from the elements. Staying here isn't an option. ｜ 不过，说到野营，我们还差个营地呢。「大椰子」是伤员，可经不起日晒雨淋，一直待在这里也不是个办法。
- Their reports indicated that the stolen goods were being delivered to a merchant of the International Trade Association named Godot. ｜ 结果发现，被劫走的货物，最后居然全都流向了万国商会的一位名叫戈多的商人处。

- What!? There's three of them now!? ｜ 哎？！三个？！

- Paimon got lost somewhere between "symbiotic relationship" and "the collective imagination," but don't worry, Paimon understood that last sentence! ｜ 前面的那些共生关系、集体想象什么的…我的确是不明白，不过最后那句我听懂了。
- Yo! Afternoon! Had lunch? ｜ 哟！中午好呀，吃了吗？
- It's not like that! I just wanted to confirm the route for the Flower Carriage. ｜ 不是啦，是让你确认这条路线是否符合预期。
- We rushed over as soon as we saw you come into Caravan Ribat. ｜ 看见你回来，我俩马上就过来了。
- Dropped by Clockwork Meka ｜ 发条机关掉落
- Ah, sorry, I didn't mean to take the conversation to such a heavy place. Please pretend I didn't say anything. ｜ 啊，不好意思，这个话题太沉重了。当我没说过。
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Hehe, you've got a good head on your shoulders. I'll tell you a story about a merchant.\nA long, long time ago, a merchant lost her way while she was out on the road. It wasn't long before she encountered a Fog Div. Just as the Fog Div was about to eat her alive, she said in a panic, "Wait, Mr. Fog Div! Don't eat me! I've got a story to tell you. Please, have a listen, and if you like what you hear, then perhaps you would spare me..." ｜ 嘿嘿，你可真有眼光。那我开始讲了！\n这是一个商人的故事。很久很久以前，她在行商途中迷失了方向。这时候她遇到一只雾怪，雾怪要一口吞掉她。她连忙说，雾怪先生不要着急呀，我这里有个故事。您听听看，如果有趣的话，就请您不要吃掉我…
- #Alright then. What's the issue? Never fear, Paimon and {NICKNAME} are here! ｜ #说吧，怎么回事？只要有我和{NICKNAME}在，不管是什么难题，都会顺利解决的！
- That's very modest of you. Thank you, in any case. ｜ 您真是够谦虚的。我再次感谢您。
- No one asked for your "wisdom." ｜ 也没有其他更值得安放你口舌的地方。
- Raimondo still isn't back yet... What is he up to? ｜ 雷蒙多还没有回来…这人到底去做什么了…
- A humanoid figurine with an opinionated look that can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nWord has it that this model was inspired by a certain stubborn young resident. As countless stories have said, "Fear itself is not fearful, but rather, not daring to admit your fear." Striving to understand and change oneself may be a good attitude towards life. ｜ 固执己见的人像模型，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据说，这款模型制作时参考了某位顽固的年轻居民。正如无数故事中说的那样——「恐惧不可怕，可怕的是不敢承认自己的恐惧」。努力认识并改变自己，或许是一种不错的生活态度。
- The researcher who spoke to us claimed that the machine was just a Fatui industrial invention. He even promised to not disturb us. ｜ 与我们交涉的研究员声称，这台装置只是他们愚人众的工业发明，并和我们约法三章，保证不会打扰我们。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hangout Events: Series III ｜ 邀约事件·第三辑
- Let me think... The temperature of the hot spring should be pretty ideal right now. Fancy a dip? ｜ 我想想…现在温泉的温度应该很不错，要去泡一泡吗？
- All that person had to do was sign his name on my achievements, and he was able to take all of the honors. All my effort vanished into the air as though it never existed. ｜ 他只是在我的成果上签了个名字，就夺走了所有的荣耀，而我付出的诸多心血仿佛从来没有存在过。
- RES Decrease|{param2:F1P} ｜ 抗性降低|{param2:F1P}

- You keep your eyes peeled too, alright, Qica? ｜ 奇卡，你也要睁大眼睛喔。
- The tension is as thick as a wall, but Clorinde is unmovable. Furina raises a hand quietly, as if to use some power, silencing the audience... only for her to raise both hands instead. ｜ 气氛紧张，但克洛琳德依旧举着剑毫不动摇。芙宁娜默默举起一只手，好像要发动什么能力，现场完全安静，众人屏息，但最终发现她举起了双手。
- ...Aha, I see! I'm with you. ｜ …原来是这个意思！我明白了。
- I've got other things to do at the moment... ｜ 还有别的事…

- Join the three Aranara in using the Kusava's power of dreams to clean up the influence of The Withering in the surrounding areas. ｜ 随三位兰那罗一起运用「苦舍桓」中蕴含的梦之力量，清除各处盘踞的死域影响吧。
- Hey, don't worry about me. If anything, this whole thing has finally shown me the difference between illusion and reality. ｜ 不用在意啦，借这个机会，我也终于看清了什么是幻象，什么才是现实。
- But it looks like it's just lying there, and it doesn't seem like anything's stopping someone from just taking it... ｜ 结果，圣物就是很普通地放在下面，好像也没有阻挡的措施…

- How about I beat someone in a duel and then recommend the spice to them? ｜ 不如，在下去找一些武者比试，胜过他们之后，再向他们推荐这种调料？
- Today is not my lucky day... ｜ 今天的运势不太好…
- Oh, Paimon knows! There's one dish out there that was practically created for this purpose! ｜ 我知道我知道！说起这种类型的食物，一定就是那个吧！
- (The dream he never got to fulfill when he was alive... Allow me to realize it for him.) ｜ （他生时愿望没能实现，死后…就由我来补偿吧。）

- A part of the "Evermotion Mechanical Painting" that Félix Yogue is trying to restore. ｜ 菲利斯·尤格希望还原的「恒动械画」中的一个部件。
- Let's start with this one called Eipekkusu. ｜ 我们就从这家叫做「天顶屋」的店开始调查吧。
- Ooh, good idea! I wonder where we can find one... ｜ 哦，这个好！那我们上哪儿去找它？
- Citlali summons the ceremonial sword "Calamity of Eshu." ｜ 茜特菈莉召出了一柄名为「厄水之祸」的仪式剑。

- His method of dealing with monsters tends not to consider the best interests of the surrounding area or the people in it... ｜ 他对付怪物，可从来不看场合和在场的人等…
- If I had the chance to go to a place where no one cared about the Dendro Archon or King Deshret, I think I would have been a lot freer. ｜ 如果我有机会去往一个不知道也不在乎草神与赤王的地方，或许就能过得更自由一些了。
- What's this potion gotta do with your experiment? ｜ 嗯？这个药剂和你的实验有什么关系呀…

- Hm? A Tenryou Commission official... What's wrong? ｜ 嗯？天领奉行的人…何事慌张？
- Ah, sorry to make you two come all the way out here. ｜ 不好意思，还麻烦你们特地跑了一趟。
- Laid them all out, no exceptions. Hah! "Do you feel lucky, punk?" ｜ 我们把他们全放倒了，地上没有一个喘气的。哈，你觉得自己很幸运吗，小贼！
- Record Left by the "Flamestealer" ｜ 「盗火者」留下的记录
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- Huh! ｜ 呵。
- I'll save the show! ｜ 我来救场。
- I was that, uh, person you found in a Treasure Hoarder cage down in Lingju Pass. Heh, in any case, thank you for saving me. ｜ 就是那个，在灵矩关被盗宝团关在笼子里…的人…哈哈…总之，谢谢你救了我。
- A roof that has "Valberry Red" as its main color theme. It seems able to improve the flavor of desserts sold at the shop, albeit only psychologically. As one gazes at this roof from afar, it is almost as if some delicious taste is already developing at the tip of one's tongue. It can also exert an appetizing effect in advance when it comes to snacks — an example of using visuals to one's advantage.\nThe only issue is that some birds that love to pick Valberries might come along and peck small holes in the roof. "Whenever Paimon gets up there to chase those birds off, she ends up getting taken for a ride by them and not catching a single one — something that makes her mad enough to stomp about for quite a while."\n"But every time I suggest that I could just throw Paimon up there, which should give her the initial speed she needs to catch those rascals, she refuses." ｜ 以「落落莓红」为主色调的店铺顶棚，对于店内售卖的甜品，似乎有着增强风味的心理作用，远远望见这种顶棚时，舌尖好像就浮现出了一丝酸甜可口的味道。对于普通的小吃，也能起到提前开胃的功效，可谓运用视觉效应的优良案例。\n只不过，偶尔会有喜欢采食落落莓的鸟雀前来，在这种顶棚上啄出小小的破洞。「派蒙每次上前驱赶，都会被小鸟们戏耍一通，追又追不上，气得直跺脚。」\n「但我提议把派蒙用力向天扔出去，提供足够的初速度，好让派蒙抓住捣乱的小鸟时，派蒙又不乐意了。」
- Then be my guest. ｜ 那派蒙来吧。
- It's Not Much, But It's A Start... ｜ 至少是个开始…
- That was fast! You found the special material? ｜ 动作挺快！找到特别材料了吗？
- A pavement created using dense stones. These stone slabs are arranged in a very special way that allows them to be deployed rapidly in order to pave roads.\nThe clean, hard stones utilize a traditional art from Liyue that melts and melds smashed stone and sand grains together to form slabs that are sturdy, long-lasting, and inexpensive, thus making them much sought after across the continent.\nAn army cannot fight without proper logistics. It is said that in the days of the ancient monster hunts, the Millelith placed great emphasis on the traffic capacity of roads, and so created a set of universal specifications for stone slabs to follow, right down to their composition and weight, such that they might pave roads as efficiently as possible. These basic paving units would eventually evolve into the floorings used today. ｜ 由坚密的石材拼接而成的地板，石板的排布有着某种特殊的门道，可用于快速铺设道路。\n光洁而坚硬的石材应用了璃月的传统工艺，熔铸碎石与沙粒制成，牢固耐用，造价低廉，并因此远销至大陆各国。\n粮草辎重乃兵家之本。据传，早年征伐魔物时，千岩军尤为重视道路的通行能力，因此确立了一套通用的石板规格，兼顾了成本与重量，能以极高的效率铺设道路。由这些石板组成的基本路面单元，逐渐演变成如今的这种地板。
- If you can stay within the Ideal Tension Zone while fishing, this rod will shorten the time in which fish will struggle at an accelerating rate and increase your chances of success. If you leave the Ideal Tension Zone, the acceleration will reset.\nA special fishing rod created for the sake of the Lunar Leviathan. To tackle this legendary fish, the creator of this rod specially added some material with rare functions onto the rod itself and the fishing line, giving it both great malleability and tensile strength. Of course, such a treasure could easily catch ordinary fish, but that seems like overkill to the point where even the rod might feel ashamed to be used thus. ｜ 钓鱼过程中，若能使张力保持在最佳张力区，使用此竿可加速缩短鱼儿挣扎时间，若离开最佳张力区，加速过程会被重置。\n\n因「海中月」而生的特制长竿。为了应对传说中的大鱼，制作者特别在竿身、鱼线中掺入了罕见的功能材料，使其不仅拥有不俗的延展性，更能承千斤而不崩。如此宝具，用来对付普通鱼儿自然也不在话下，但总是这样牛鼎烹鸡的话，它也会感到负尘蒙羞吧？
- Is "daydreaming" really that important? ｜ 「空想」是这么关键的东西吗？
- He informs you of the locations of the monsters, and a glimmer of hope returns to his eyes. ｜ 他将魔物的出现地点告诉了你们，眼中重新闪出一线光芒。
- (*sigh* Fingers crossed that everything goes smoothly.) ｜ （唉，希望不会出什么意外…）

- Are you two family, or...? ｜ 这位是你的家人吗？
- This picture seems to depict the Mondstadt cityscape. If you find the right angle, you can easily see the missing scenery. Carefully examine the picture to discover just what is missing. How will the "artistic hallucination" form this time... ｜ 这张画片似乎记录了蒙德城内的景致。只要寻找到正确的角度，应该能很轻松地发现缺失的景物吧。先仔细观察画片，再找到缺失的景物吧。不知道这次的「艺术幻觉」会如何形成…
- #{NICKNAME}... I want you to record something into this capsule. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我想请你往罐子里录入一些东西。

- I should get going as well. See you all later! Make sure you get some good rest tonight. ｜ 先走啦，回头见。你们今晚一定要好好休息。

- I'm sure you have a very good sense of what this place is about by now. As you know, not everyone takes their sentence seriously — for some, this is just another place where they can eat, breathe, and sleep. ｜ 你们应该也有点熟悉这个地方了，大部分人还是自由散漫，不情不愿地度过每一天。

- Their magic is truly a thing of surpassing beauty, and they also have many unexpected ideas! ｜ 他们的魔术精妙绝伦，还经常有很多意想不到的创意。
- Although you have successfully rescued Momoyo, you still have a lot of questions. Ask her what on earth happened. ｜ 虽然成功营救了百代，但还有许多事没有搞清楚。问问她之前到底发生了什么吧。

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After your characters take DMG or are healed:</color> This card gains 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Lakelight</color> point.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When this character uses a Normal Attack:</color> If you have already accumulated 12 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Lakelight</color> points, consume 12 points, and this Skill costs 2 less $[K309], deals +1 DMG, and heals the equipping character for 1 HP (once per Round). ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色受到伤害或治疗后：</color>此牌累积1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「湖光」</color>。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色进行普通攻击时：</color>如果已有12点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「湖光」</color>，则消耗12点，使此技能少花费2个$[K309]且造成的伤害+1，并且治疗所附属角色1点（每回合1次）。

- Items from the Jade Chamber have been scattered across the seas to the east of Liyue Harbor. The nearby Treasure Hoarders, smelling opportunities for loot, have made their move. Board your Waverider and wipe out any Treasure Hoarder interference to your salvaging operations! ｜ 群玉阁的藏品零星散落在璃月港以东的海面上，附近的盗宝团已闻风而动。尽快驾驭「浪船」，排除盗宝团的干扰，夺回群玉阁的藏品吧！
- Did the evil dragon... ｜ 难道是因为那条邪龙…

- As the salt is sprinkled, Katou Shingo collapses, and the thing that the two brothers "summoned" manifests... ｜ 随着盐粒洒落，加藤信悟倒下，兄弟二人「招来的东西」显现出来…

- A device that can transmute elemental Ascension Materials and change their Elemental Type.\nIts practical uses notwithstanding, alchemy is the study of the nature of matter and the rules that underpin its transformations, and ultimately it seeks to comprehend the working principles of the world and the flow of the ley lines.\nIt is not known who would share alchemical achievements of this magnitude with the civilizations of the world and why. But although the power to fundamentally transmute elemental energy in its crystallized and inert form is a highly useful one, this device also conceals the grave danger of disrupting the elemental balance... ｜ 能够使元素突破材料发生变质，转变其元素属性的道具。\n刨除实用目的的话，炼金术实际上是研讨物质本质与其变化规律的学科，最终通向的是世界运转、地脉流通的规律。\n不知何者出于何种目的，在地上的文明当中散布的这种炼金术的极高成就产物，具有扭转完全惰性化结晶后的元素物质的能力。虽然相当便利实用，但也隐藏着打破平衡的巨大危险性…

- Thank you, my friend. I thought I was in deep trouble this time. It's a good thing you showed up. ｜ 谢谢你了朋友，我还以为这次麻烦大了，好在有你。
- In his early years living in Mondstadt, Thoma did not have particularly strong aspirations.\nEach day, he was awakened by the early morning sun and the fresh fragrance of flowers. After breakfast, he could choose to take a relaxing stroll through the city or explore the wilderness freely.\nAt that time, Thoma thought that people should have the happiness of living a leisurely life. Perhaps it would have been better to live a peaceful life.\nThis calm mood disappeared the moment when he was swept into a strange country by the waves, across the ocean in a small boat.\nHere, he had to receive a favor to survive, and thus the thought of "repayment" arose.\nTen years ago, when the Yashiro Commission's Kamisato Clan was losing its power.\nKamisato Ayato, who was embroiled in the dispute over the succession rights of the clan due to the death of both parents, told Thoma:\n"Now that the situation in Inazuma is unclear, the trouble the Kamisato Clan faces will only increase. You are someone who can see what's at stake, so if you don't want to get involved, leave early."\nCould Thoma, who had received so many favors from the Kamisato Clan, just leave like that? Choosing to leave would mean that he would have to return to his ordinary, stable life with regrets and guilt.\nThe storm was imminent, and Thoma was like a leaf drifting in the sea.\nBut after much deliberation, Thoma's answer was:\n"If I leave at this time, I will lose my loyalty and righteousness. Father has always taught me to be a loyal and righteous man... I would like to do my best to do my part for the young master and the young lady. You will certainly need me as a helper in the path you embark on in the future."\nThe will to burn for loyalty and righteousness forged a strong desire that drew the attention of the gods.\nAs if to respond to Thoma's choice — on this night of divergent destinies, a Vision, bright red like a blaze, appeared beside him. ｜ 早年住在蒙德时，托马自身并不具有特别强烈的愿望。\n每一天他被清晨的阳光与清新的花香味唤醒。吃过早餐，他可以选择在城中轻松漫步，或是到野外自由探索。\n在那时的托马看来，人本该拥有悠闲度日的幸福。或许，就这么平静地过完一生也无妨。\n这种平稳的心情，在他乘着小船漂洋过海被海浪卷进陌生国度的一刻荡然无存。\n在这里，他不得不受人恩惠，进而产生出「报答」的念头。\n十年前，正是社奉行神里家失势之际。\n因父母双双过世而被卷入家主继任权之争的神里绫人这样告诉托马：\n「如今稻妻局势不明，神里家面临的麻烦只会越来越多。你是能看清利害关系的人，如果不想卷入其中，就早些离开吧。」\n受到神里家如此多恩惠的托马，能就这样离开吗？选择离去，便意味着他要抱着遗憾和愧疚回归到平凡平稳的生活中。\n暴风在即，托马也如海水中打转的树叶一般。\n但深思熟虑之后，托马的回答是：\n「在此时离开，就会失去忠义。父亲曾要求我做一个忠义之人…我愿尽我所能，为少爷和小姐尽一份薄力。未来你们所要走的道路，也必定会需要我这个帮手。」\n为忠义而燃烧的意志铸就出强烈愿望，引来了神明的注视。\n像是要回应托马的选择一般——在这个命运分歧的夜晚，他身边多出了一颗鲜红如烈焰的「神之眼」。

- The Confuzzled Tubber toys can be placed within a fixed area, and they will only appear when the game mode is being played. Interact with the Seeker's Board to start the treasure hunt game. The player who finds the largest number of them in the time-limit wins.\nYou can also interact with the Seeker's Board to check game records, which include game dates, the nicknames of the participating and victorious players, and the number of Confuzzled Tubbers they found. ｜ 「迷糊圆圆」玩偶可被提前摆放在限定区域内，只在开游戏过程中存在。与「寻物木牌」互动，可以开启寻物游戏。在限定时间内找到「迷糊圆圆」玩偶最多的玩家胜利。\n与「寻物木牌」互动也可以查看游戏记录。游戏记录包含游戏胜利的日期、获胜和参与的玩家昵称以及寻找到「迷糊圆圆」的数量。

- Some of the boys have been telling me that he was the star of the show at the Vision Hunt Ceremony. I'm like — are you kidding me??? How come he gets his own special ceremony!? Was the hundredth Vision supposed to be, like, stronger than the other ninety-nine, or something? Pff, nah, it can't have been that, 'cause, uh, hello! They would've chosen me if that's what they were going for. ｜ 听弟兄们说，他是第一百颗神之眼狩眼仪式的主角？嗯？为什么他会有专属的仪式啊？欸，难道说第一百颗神之眼是比前九十九颗厉害吗？嘶…不对，真是那样的话，那应该是本大爷来当这第一百颗才对！
- <color=#00E1FFFF>Don't touch any strange elements</color>, either, or you'll ruin the taste. ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>还有别沾染奇怪的元素</color>，会破坏口感的。
- Yoooohoooo— *sigh* ｜ 呜噜噜——噜——唉。
- Once upon a time, Qiqi died. Then, Qiqi was saved by the adepti. Now, Qiqi is a zombie. ｜ 七七已经，死过一次。后来，被仙人救了。所以是，僵尸。

- Hey, Dori! Are you here to attend the Akademiya Extravaganza too? ｜ 多莉，果然是你呀。你也来学院庆典啦？
- Whoa, so even waterfalls can be turned solid... ｜ 哦，就连瀑布也可以被凝固起来啊…
- There's even a little Tepetlisaurus here... Was it you who brought these outlanders here, then? ｜ 这里居然还有一只小嵴锋龙…是你把这两位异邦人引到这里来的吗？
- But at least we've reached some other conclusions in the meantime? ｜ 但至少我们也有了一些阶段性的结论吧？

- #Oh, you must be {NICKNAME} and Paimon. Ms. Touyama said that you'd come looking for her. ｜ #哦，你们就是{NICKNAME}和派蒙吧，远山小姐和我说过你们会来找她。
- But wait, why is Paimon the one who's confused now!? ｜ 等一下，为什么啊！现在换我不明白了！
- Run... Hunt... No. No! Must... become stronger! ｜ 跑，狩猎。不够，不行！我要…更强。
- Give it a go, you'll see what I mean. ｜ 好了，你就自己去体会一下吧。
- Don't worry, I've got us covered. Time for my "little present..." ｜ 还好，就给我个机会弥补我的冒失吧，就用刚才我准备的「好东西」…
- Haha, so honest and forthcoming, you are after all the Honorary Knight of the Knights of Favonius. What impressive discipline! ｜ 你看，这位「荣誉骑士」也很自知，不愧是西风骑士团的「荣誉骑士」啊，真是严于律己。

- Tell me about Emilie. ｜ 关于艾梅莉埃…
- Would you? Oh, thanks! Just see if you can lure her away from here! ｜ 不好意思，拜托你了，只要能把她引走就行！

- Okay, I gotcha... Well, right now, the more helpers we got, the better, I guess... ｜ 是这样啊…我明白了，这个节骨眼上能帮忙的人的确越多越好…
- Hmph, you just want something to eat, don't you!? We'll make you something to eat! ｜ 哼，所以你就是想要吃的对吧！那我们就做给你吃好啦！

- The Yun-Han Opera Troupe has been led by the Yun clan, folk art aristocracy in their own right, for generations. Their present-day Director is the star artiste Yun Jin, famed throughout Liyue Harbor.\nMiss Yun has both a solid foundation and a wide range of acting skills, and in a departure from tradition, has personally penned many a moving work of theater.\nWatching her operas is akin to experiencing the life-courses of thousands upon thousands of characters. It is as they say, after all — that life imitates art, and art imitates life. ｜ 「云翰社」由曲艺世家云家代代传承，如今的当家是璃月港内风头正劲的名角——云堇。\n云先生功底扎实，戏路颇广。她还突破传统，亲自创作了许多讲述凡人悲欢的新剧目。\n看她的戏就如同体验万千角色的生命轨迹，正所谓人生如戏，戏即人生。
- I've been preparing to become a traveling scholar, so I've read that book many times, to the point where I can recite most of it. So it's fine to lend it to others. ｜ 我在为成为游学者做准备，所以来回读了好多遍，都能背了，借出去也没关系。
- The answer lies with the three of you. I'm sure you all know where she's gone to. ｜ 答案就在你们三位身上。你们很清楚，她会去什么地方。
- "...the bag guy brought the news: the people of Liyue want to eat alone, and His Honor is not pleased... Someone has to make them wear stiff shoes..." ｜ 「…皮包人捎来消息：璃月人要吃独食，大阁下很不开心…得有人请他们穿穿硬鞋子…」
- Dog in a Dress ｜ 穿裙装的狗

- That could be the case. ｜ 很有可能。
- Tengu was flying... Tengu is a cheater! ｜ 用飞的…天狗耍赖！
- A handy length of abandoned copper pipe that was once used as a weapon. It was famous — or infamous, depending — in some circles. ｜ 在过去曾经被当作武器使用的趁手废弃铜管，曾经在一些人当中享有盛名或是臭名昭著。
- I know that every detail here is the result of your hard work. I hold immense gratitude for all you've done. ｜ 我知道这里一草一木都来自你的汗水，我正怀着感激的心情和它们相处呢！
- Key, key, key, square, west... ｜ 钥匙，钥匙，钥匙，广场，西…
- Hm, Swordfighting Techniques VIII... A combat-class Knowledge Capsule. This class is something of a rare find these days, since most have been taken by the Eremites to augment their battle capabilities. ｜ 「单手剑战斗技巧·八」…嗯，是实战类的罐装知识。这类知识不太常见，很多都被镀金旅团的人拿去提升战力用了。
- I just want to distance myself from meaningless noise and look at everything objectively. ｜ 我只是想脱离嘈杂的环境，远离无意义的杂音，客观看待一切。
- Blue thing, good thing, key, protect. ｜ 蓝东西，好东西，钥匙，保护。
- You only realize how much someone really meant to you when you lose them completely. That's why I was so confident this would hurt Jemma... because I've felt it for myself. ｜ 只有彻底失去某个人，才能真正明白他在自己内心中的重量。这就是我笃定嘉玛会感到痛苦的原因，因为我也曾亲身体会过。
- Stop, Albert. Stop! ｜ 艾伯特先生，别再冲了——！
- Glide over the chasm ｜ 飞过断崖

- Uh-oh, here comes trouble... ｜ 呃，我闻到了麻烦事的气息…
- Is it "deep" enough here? ｜ 这里够「深」了吧？
- And that's where you'd be wrong! ｜ 错，大大相关。
- Agh... C'mon, don't just stand there! Take them out! Get rid of these two, and we'll be home free! ｜ 可恶…别看着了！一起上！解决掉这两个家伙，我们就远走高飞！

- See, things are never quite as bad as they seem. ｜ 天无绝人之路。
- For those that swiftly traverse the phlogiston-woven Spiritway, speed becomes a crucial variable, causing all they behold to appear differently. Not only must they follow the racing lines that flow like water; they must also learn to discern the true appearance of things and at the same time, seek inspiration through the tension between extreme curves and straightaways... ｜ 沿着燃素交织而成的「游隙灵道」迅疾穿行时，速度将为视觉带来关键的变量，眼底的一切都将呈现出有别寻常的面貌。捕捉流水般奔驰的线条，延展描摹事物本貌的技巧，在夸张的弧形与直线中，探寻聚焦张力的灵感…

- "The first clue lies hidden on the road of wisdom. The headstrong child finally sees the world for how big it truly is, filled with awe, yet struck with fear." ｜ 「第一个线索，藏在智慧之路上。莽撞的幼童终于见到了世界的广阔，惊愕之余，也产生了恐惧。」

- A stewed dish. The meat slices were fried first, followed by the vegetable accouterments, after which they were mixed together. The soup was then added and simmered until it thickened. After this patient, slow cooking process, the meat has become soft and tender, bringing those who eat it a down-to-earth satisfaction. ｜ 炖煮而成的菜肴。先煎制大块的兽肉，再炒香配菜，混合后加汤焖煮，直至汤汁收浓。耐心慢煮后，兽肉的口感也变得松软，给人以实打实的满足感。

- Collei wrote to me saying that her Eleazar has been completely cured... I'm so happy for her! I wish I could fly to her side right now and give her the biggest hug! She also said she misses everyone in Mondstadt, and that once she's ready, she'll come visit us in person and tell us all about her progress... Oh, it would be great if she could make it in time for the next Ludi Harpastum. Aaah I can't wait to see her again! ｜ 柯莱和我写信说，她的「魔鳞病」已经彻底康复…我太为她高兴了！真想下一秒就飞到她身边，紧紧地抱住她。她还说很想念蒙德的大家，想等哪一天独当一面之后，亲口来汇报自己的成长…啊，要是能赶上下一次羽球节就好了，我都快等不及了！

- #Travelers, please ensure that you follow our {REGEX#OVERSEA[Server_BrandTips_Oversea|Server_BrandTips_Domestic]} while using the Serenitea Pot and its Replication System. To create a healthy gaming environment, please read and confirm that you will not instigate or take part in:\n\n1. The creation of content that discriminates against any race, gender, religion, sexual orientation, ethnicity, government, or region.\n2. The bullying or insulting of any Travelers or groups of Travelers.\n3. Inappropriate sharing of Replica IDs.\n4. Replicas that are disrespectful to other Travelers.\n5. Any other content or behavior that violates the Terms of Service.\n\nWe may have to restrict your use of the game services if you do not follow these rules. This may include suspension, the deletion of Replicas, the clearing of all furnishings within your Serenitea Pot, restriction, or a permanent ban on the use of the Pot, forced disconnection, login suspension, or account forfeiture.\n\nAt the same time, you are welcome to use the Report function to send feedback to us, should you encounter the aforementioned violation of rules. ｜ #旅行者在使用本尘歌壶系统及摹本功能时，请按照{REGEX#OVERSEA[Server_BrandTips_Oversea|Server_BrandTips_Domestic]}使用，为共同营造良好的游戏氛围，您知悉并确认不会发起及/或参与:\n\n1. 任何涉及种族、性别、宗教、性向、民族、政治、地域等的歧视内容；\n2. 对任一旅行者或任一群体旅行者有任何的霸凌或侮辱等内容；\n3. 不适宜的洞天摹数分享行为；\n4. 不尊重其他旅行者的摹本成果；\n5. 其他用户协议中禁止或不适宜的内容。\n\n如果旅行者未遵守上述规范，您对游戏服务的使用可能会受到相应限制，包括但不限于禁言、删除摹本、清空洞天内所有摆设、限制或永久禁止使用尘歌壶系统、强制离线、禁止登录、封停账号等。\n\n同时，如果您遇到了上述情况，欢迎通过“举报”按钮向我们反馈。

- He's gone adventuring at the <color=#00E1FFFF>Temple of the Lion</color> with Stanley today. ｜ 杰克今天跟斯坦利先生一起去<color=#00E1FFFF>「南风之狮的庙宇」</color>冒险了。
- Then everyone would have to look up to me, mwuhahaha... ｜ 到那时，所有的人都得仰视本大侠，哈哈哈哈…
- Haha, in my line of work, I've got to have a pair of sharp eyes. ｜ 哈哈，干我这活计的，眼神不好使可不行啊。
- And I don't mean a hat to keep your ears warm or your head dry... I just think your hairstyle would look really neat with a hat! ｜ 倒不是因为在外旅行需要遮风挡雨之类的原因…我单纯是觉得你的发型很适合戴帽子啦。
- Unmovable Mountain ｜ 重嶂不移
- (Have I... reached my limit? No, perhaps I reached it long ago. Today, I didn't even notice my own tears.) ｜ （我是否已经到了极限呢…不，我应该很久很久以前就到极限了吧，今天的我就连自己落泪都察觉不到了。）
- Same deal this time. You set me up with some of Mondstadt's local specialties, and I'll spin you a little yarn. How does that sound? ｜ 这次也一样，你去帮我置办点蒙德城的特产回来，我再给你讲点「小故事」，怎么样？
- My sister and I grew up around textiles and have been making clothes since we were little. If my military duties didn't force me to be stationed here at the watch tower, I would be home helping out with the shop. ｜ 因为从小耳濡目染，妹妹和我都很了解布料和制衣方面的知识。如果不是因为我身有军职，必须长期看守哨塔，我也应该回家经营店铺才是。
- All these Flowcurrent Birds, their bobbing, rolling forms sitting within their swim rings! A sight so moving as to bring one to tears... ｜ 啊，浮流鸟，晃晃的滚滚的身子在游泳圈内…真是让人感动到落泪啊…
- Yes... At least, in theory, that's correct, but... ｜ 嗯…理论上来说是这样没错啦，不过…
- After two days have passed, you decide to visit the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor to see if Hu Tao has returned... ｜ 两天过去了，你们打算去往生堂看看胡桃回来了没有…
- Pheeeew... ｜ 呼…
- Qiaoying Village is in no way lacking ores right now, so feel free to take a look for any you might need... ｜ 翘英庄暂时不缺矿产资源，所以你可以去看看，有没有你需要的矿石…

- I'll keep an eye out. ｜ 我会留心的。

- *sigh* That seemed to do the trick. If you're sober now, then let's hurry and get out of here. ｜ 喂，老爹，你的酒醒了的话，我们就快点从这里离开吧。

- What were you thinking, gallivanting off into the desert alone, at your age!? What if you'd kicked the bucket, hmm? You told not a soul what you were up to, designated nobody to handle your affairs, and left everyone scrambling frantically to try and figure out how on earth to clean up the colossal mess you'd made! ｜ 一把年纪还冒这么大的险！出了事谁负责！烂摊子谁收拾！
- So it's been you this whole time!? ｜ 那不就是最开始吗！
- Purgatory? ｜ 炼狱？
- Yes! You two saved my brother just as I was praying for the adeptus' forgiveness, right here on top of the mountain. ｜ 是啊，我刚在山上祈祷，你们就搭救了我兄弟。
- Nothing to say, then? *sigh* This has proved more complicated than I anticipated. I'm afraid my judgment will have to wait for another day. ｜ 无话可说吗。唉，这次的事件看来比我想象中更复杂一些，裁判的结果恐怕要择日公布了。
- Whenever you feel like having a go, you can just come to me. ｜ 不管什么时候，只要你想试玩，直接过来就好。
- You really shouldn't be making money like that... ｜ 经费可不应该这么挣哦。

### Part 162

- You must equip your Kamera and interact with the photo-taking point(s) to enter Photo-Taking Mode.\nThe process is split into an adjustment phase where you determine the photo's settings, and a photo-taking phase in which you can move and use your Skills. ｜ 旅行者需要装备「留影机」，与留影点交互后进入留影模式。\n留影分为留影设置调整阶段，和可以移动以及施放技能的留影阶段。
- Well, generally speaking, forgetting things is like when the woven scrolls would gradually start to fade. As long as you re-paint and weave the threads again, the faded memories will come back to life. ｜ 普通的「遗忘」，可以看作是「织卷」在逐渐褪色，只要重新涂抹编织，那段褪色的记忆就会重新鲜活起来。

- Haha, it's fine, really! You're still alive, aren't you? Nothing matters more than that. Some things you just have to let go. ｜ 哈哈，没关系、没关系！还活着就好，没什么比身家性命更重要了…有些东西嘛，该放弃就是要放弃的。

- But we did not then know what lay beyond. Had we known, those thousands of years ago, we... ｜ 不，但是我们并不知道终点之后究竟有些什么，如果知道的话，在数千年前就已经…
- Anyway, for me to be happy and free again... I mean, for scientific advancement and the future of humanity, I'm counting on you to help me recover that old monitoring data! ｜ 总之，为了我能重新过上美好幸福清闲的…不对，我是说，为了科学的进步和人类的未来，就拜托您帮我找回之前的监测数据了！

- Hehe, come to think of it, someone like me would already be considered a hard worker back in my hometown. ｜ 嘿嘿，这么说来，像我这样的，在老家那边已经算是认真工作的类型了吧。

- You should thank me, Mihir. If it was not for our Elder... Ah, whatever. We do this to obtain the Twin-Horned Chaplet. For that reason, you must return with me to the Vourukasha Oasis. ｜ 米希尔，你可要好好感谢我。要不是前辈她…总之，这都是为了得到「双角的花冠」，你得跟我回甘露花海。
- But the door looks closed... ｜ 不过门看上去好像关着…
- Even though Jean said that that traveler was a big help to her, I'm sure she was just being modest. She must've done the lion's share of the work! ｜ 虽然琴大人说那位旅行者帮了大忙，但我相信这只是琴大人谦虚，最大的功劳肯定是她的！
- My... My duty here is to eliminate those monsters, but... why? Why do I have to do that? ｜ 我要…我在这里担负的职责就是，清理掉那些怪物，但是为什么…为什么我要那么做？
- Alright then, let me see your true abilities. Don't forget to come find me when you're done! ｜ 那就让我见识一下你的本领吧！成功了记得来找我哦。
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Really!? That's wonderful! There are many places on my wish list. Gimme a second. Let me find the list. ｜ 是吗！？太好了！我、我有很多想要看的地方，稍等一下，我找出来给你…
- An object obtained after defeating the monster known as the Tenebrous Papilla. It may look like a piece of fruit, but it is not.\nFormed from energy that has condensed in a single spot, its "eye" seems to gaze out from a distant, dark otherworld. ｜ 击败名为深邃摹结株的魔物后，获得的犹如果实却并非果实的事物。\n那聚集一处的能量所形成的「眼」，其后似乎有仿佛来自遥远而黑暗的彼端的视线。
- Mm, and same to you. ｜ 嗯，你也一样。
- Calla Lily. ｜ 嘟嘟莲。

- Highly Effective Cultivation: Rank III ｜ 高效栽培·三阶
- This wretched curse of immortality... Who knows how long I must continue to suffer like this? ｜ 该死的「不死诅咒」，不知道这样的日子还要持续多久。
- According to them, the ruins have been raided before, with numerous traps and contraptions having already been triggered. ｜ 从记录上看，这座遗迹早有被侵入过的痕迹，各种机关陷阱都已经被触发。
- But once you have someone there to brighten up the atmosphere, everything along the way will become lively and vibrant too. ｜ 一旦有了说笑打闹的朋友，所有的景色都会变得多姿多彩。
- Is it because I took too long and made you angry? Then... I'm sorry! ｜ 是不是可莉来得太慢，惹你生气了？那…对不起嘛！
- I'm very sorry, but... I actually wasn't planning to join the Adventurers' Guild at all. ｜ 实在抱歉…其实我没打算加入冒险家协会。
- But even so, people call Sumeru the "Nation of Wisdom," you know. If we can get a chance to meet the God of Wisdom, maybe she can give us some useful information. ｜ 不过，须弥也被称为「智慧的国度」，如果能见到这位智慧之神，应该能从她那里获得一些有价值的情报。
- Nepecha ｜ 妮佩卡
- People in Sumeru don't dream. What a strange phenomenon. ｜ 须弥人是不会做梦的，奇怪的现象。
- You finally free yourself and stand up, clothes intact. ｜ 你终于在不弄坏衣服的前提下站了起来…
- Talk to the staff member ｜ 与工作人员对话
- What's to stop the Tenryou Commission from stabbing us in the back? And what's to stop the Raiden Shogun from issuing another Vision Hunt Decree? ｜ 谁能保证天领奉行不会半路变卦？谁能保证雷电将军不会颁布下一次眼狩令？
- We're the bartenders, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙，我们是酒保啦。
- Sudden Discomfort ｜ 突如其来的不适
- Don't worry, just leave it to me. Things will be alright... just like Father said! ｜ 交给我吧！就像父亲大人之前教导我的那样，一定没问题的…一定没问题的！
- We're just passing through. ｜ 只是路过而已。
- So although this is where people formally reach an agreement, most of the groundwork is usually laid away from the table. ｜ 至于能在桌上达成什么协议…却往往取决于谈判桌之外了。
- Moo... ｜ 哞…
- I must say that Amber's development has impressed me recently. I hope that one day, her deeds will become the words of a bard's tale. ｜ 安柏这段时间确实有所成长。希望有朝一日，她的事迹也会被吟游诗人传颂。
- Have you all played Genius Invokation TCG before? ｜ 你们都打过七圣召唤吧？
- Uh, well how much does it cost to play? ｜ 这得…多少钱玩一局？
- That's right, your calling is with the gang. I mean, just look at you. You rock. You're totally hardcore. C'mon, am I the only one with chills right now? ｜ 对对，你还是适合混帮派。你看你，威风凛凛，英姿飒爽…对吧大家？
- Yes, I'm just trying to hunt the evil spirit you mentioned to prevent it from hurting anyone. ｜ 是的，我只是非常希望找到你们提到的妖邪，免得它伤害到其他人。
- No wonder Shriya was so worried... This guy thinks about nothing but his mechanical components... ｜ 我算是理解施芮娅为什么那么担心了…这个人脑子里真的全是机械零件…
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Lightning falls on the land of eternity. ｜ 雷光所至，永恒之土。
- ... ｜ ……
- Haha, now that's more like it! ｜ 哈哈，这才像话嘛！
- Bao'er claims to have lost a precious relic and is now frantically searching high and low for it. Perhaps she could use a hand... ｜ 宝儿自称弄丢了一件贵重的文物，正在焦急地搜索。看起来，她似乎很需要有人来帮忙…

- I must note down the time of his lecture before I forget... I can't miss it! ｜ 一定要记下讲座时间…千万不能错过了！

- I should be able to see the meteorites clearly from here... ｜ 在这里，应该就能看清楚陨石了…
- He went missing recently, and after searching his home, we found evidence that led us here. He appears to believe that somewhere in Sumeru lies the key to restoring our clan to its former glory. ｜ 不久前，那位劳伦斯突然失踪，从他家里调查的结果来看，他似乎是想前来须弥寻找复兴家族的办法。
- A straight sword, azure as antediluvian song, and as keen as the oaths of freedom taken in the Land of Wind. ｜ 如同悠古的歌声一般苍蓝的直剑，如同风之国土自由的誓言一般锐利的武器。

- A refreshing dessert. After taking a big bite, an intense assault of bitterness and sourness attacks your brain, wiping it clean. You can only surmise that too many Coffee Beans were added. Though the bitterness in your mouth may subside after some time, you might want to worry more about the quality of your sleep tonight... ｜ 沁凉的甜点。吞下一大口后，浓重的酸苦味刺激得大脑一片空白，大致推断是因为加入了过量咖啡豆。口中的苦味过一会儿应该能平复，现在更需要担心的是今晚的睡眠质量…

- Applies {SPRITE_PRESET#2104}Electro and can trigger the following Elemental Reactions:\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Overloaded</color>: DMG +2 for this instance, the target is forcibly switched to the next character\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Superconduct</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, deal 1 Piercing DMG to all opposing characters except the target\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Electro-Charged</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, deal 1 Piercing DMG to all opposing characters except the target\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Quicken</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [<color=#FFFFFFFF>Catalyzing Field</color>] that grants +1 DMG to the next 2 instances of Dendro or Electro DMG ｜ 附着{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}雷元素，可发生元素反应：\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FFFFFFFF>超载</color>：本伤害+2，目标强制切换到下一个角色\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}<color=#FFFFFFFF>超导</color>：本伤害+1，对目标以外的所有敌方角色造成1点穿透伤害\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>感电</color>：本伤害+1，对目标以外的所有敌方角色造成1点穿透伤害\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}<color=#FFFFFFFF>原激化</color>：本伤害+1，生成使下2次草元素或雷元素伤害+1的[<color=#FFFFFFFF>激化领域</color>]

- You're right! I've got to get a hold of myself, and be happy! It's what they all would have wanted! ｜ …说得很对！我要振作起来，要快乐一点，才对得起所有人！
- If one of your party members has triggered Burning, Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, Bloom, Hyperbloom, or Burgeon reactions before the <color=#FFD780FF>Floral Ring</color> returns, it will grant the character the Sprout effect upon return, which will continuously deal <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color> equivalent to 40% of Collei's ATK to nearby opponents for 3s.\nIf another Sprout effect is triggered during its initial duration, the initial effect will be removed. DMG dealt by Sprout is considered Elemental Skill DMG. ｜ 在<color=#FFD780FF>飞叶轮</color>返回前，如果队伍中自己的角色触发了燃烧、原激化、超激化、蔓激化、绽放、超绽放或烈绽放反应，则会在返回时为角色赋予「新叶」状态，持续对身边的敌人造成相当于柯莱攻击力40%的<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>，持续3秒。\n新叶效果持续期间再次产生新叶效果时，将移除原有的效果。新叶效果造成的伤害视为元素战技伤害。
- But if you don't get any points this round, you won't have a shot at winning! ｜ 但如果这一轮你还是拿不到积分的话，就基本没有夺冠的可能了吧？
- That should do it. This isn't much, but please accept it. ｜ 好了。这些东西请你们收下吧，虽然不多…但也算是我的一点心意。

- If we can use the power of the scattered Symphony, we can reconstruct the aqueducts as they once were. ｜ 若能利用这些散落的「乐章」力量，或许就能重现水道旧日的模样了。
- Maybe that's just how much she and the Archon trust each other. ｜ 可能这就是她和火神的默契？
- After all, we have a bartender and Nesmil here. Nesmil could handle most of the work alone. ｜ 毕竟，这里不是还有酒保和娜斯米儿吗。娜斯米儿一个人就能把事情做得七七八八了。
- Fulfilling the people's requests is the duty of the Ministry of Civil Affairs.\nWithout enough people to do the job, however, the Ministry and their subordinate Millelith are sometimes forced to send willing but inexperienced hands into the fray.\nAccepting Requests from Ms. Yu and completing them will increase your Reputation.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Request: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only take a certain number of Requests every week.\nYou can check the number of Requests you've taken this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared between all cities.\nNew Requests will become available every week. \n\nOnce your Reputation has hit the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Requests. ｜ 满足璃月居民的需求，是总务司的天职。\n但总务司及下辖千岩军的人力终究有限，所以有时不得不仰赖可靠的热心人出手。\n及时在小雨处领取「居民请求」并完成这些任务，可以提高声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【居民请求：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能接取的居民请求的数量是有限的。\n本周已接取的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的居民请求。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的居民请求。
- Mendacious Waves ｜ 狂浪谲波
- I had heard one of my adventurer friends speak of the "Eye of the Storm" before, but I had never actually seen one until just a few days ago. I was {0}, when all of a sudden I heard a great whooshing sound. I turned around and there I saw it... The Eye of the Storm was spinning around and charging straight at me! I managed to dodge out of its way and found a place to hide. I'm lucky I made it out alive. ｜ 之前听冒险家朋友描述过「狂风之核」这种东西，但第一次见是前几天的事情。我当时{0}，突然听到一阵呼呼的风声。回过头来，就看见它了。当时，狂风之核一边转一边朝我冲过来，但我一个滑铲躲了过去，然后赶快跑了。真的很可怕。
- Its former owner once fell into a cave and found the treasure trove of an exiled royal. This is a souvenir from that incident. ｜ 原本坠入落穴，却是被驱逐的旧宗族藏宝的地窖。是那次经历的纪念品。
- Very good! We did not labor in vain, then. I suppose this commission has also drawn to a close. ｜ 很好很好，我们没白忙活这么久，这项委托总算是结束了。

- But I fear that they'll be hard to find now. ｜ 不过，这种花应该很难看到了。

- Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nDuring Weinlesefest, you can take part in various specialized activities to obtain prizes.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 21 and complete the following prerequisite quests: the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom" and the Story Quest "The Meaning of Lupical."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nDuring the event, the following four phases will unlock in sequence: Autumn Crisis, Highwind Trial, Charity and Creativity, and Fecund Blessings.\n\nAutumn Crisis: Help hunters deal with the invasion of Forest Boars, and help a researcher from Sumeru search for clues concerning the Snowboars and complete the respective challenges.\nHighwind Trial: Use the power of Sublime Anemograna to challenge mighty foes.\nCharity and Creativity: Help the Knights of Favonius organize a charity sale and earn as much Fairbrew Jelly as possible.\nFecund Blessings: Search for Fecund Hampers placed by citizens of Mondstadt to obtain the gifts within. The Shop Components you can obtain from these gifts can even be used to decorate your stall in Charity and Creativity. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n归风佳酿节期间，旅行者们可以参与各种特色活动，获取丰厚的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到21级，并需要完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」、传说任务「卢皮卡的意义」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动期间，将陆续解锁「秋野防灾记」，「高风的演试」，「义卖与妙想」，「丰饶的祝愿」四种玩法。\n\n「秋野防灾记」：协助猎人应对野林猪的侵扰，并与须弥学者一同寻找雪猪的线索，完成挑战。\n「高风的演试」：借助「高妙风种子」的加护，挑战强大的敌人。\n「义卖与妙想」：协助西风骑士举办义卖活动，尽可能赚取更多「佳酿晶冻」。\n「丰饶的祝愿」：寻找居民们布置的「丰饶之箱」，获取其中的赠礼，赠礼中的装饰品「坊店部件」还可以用来装饰「义卖与妙想」中的店铺。
- Everything was ready to go, and I was positive that I'd be able to get some great data. ｜ 万事俱备，我当时觉得我肯定能拿到特别漂亮的数据。
- Correct! There's no fooling you two, eh? ｜ 答对了！果然难不住你们啊。
- Standing in the Water ｜ 站于水中
- Hail to the Almighty Dragonlord ｜ 向伟大圣龙致意
- Huh? Incredibly small? Then how did you get out of Inazuma in the first place? ｜ 欸？微乎其微？那你是用什么办法离开稻妻的呢？
- (I should be able to trim Hora's nails now...) ｜ （应该可以给霍莱修剪指甲了…）
- I suppose we have let our focus drift a little... but at the end of the day, you can't deny that this ocean view really is something. ｜ 虽然来海岛的缘由已经不那么单纯…不，无论我心中怎么想，都必须承认这片海景确实不错。

Likewise, Elemental Skill or Elemental Burst hits increase Normal Attack DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color> for 6s. ｜ 普通攻击命中后的6秒内，元素战技与元素爆发的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>；元素战技与元素爆发命中后的6秒内，普通攻击的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>。

- It seems less angry now. ｜ 它看起来好像没那么生气了。

- It's probably more accurate to say this was never a real scripted story to begin with. ｜ 不如说从一开始，这就不是一个普通的桌上剧团。
- No challenge at all indeed. ｜ 确实如此。
- A researcher who once worked together with Edwin Eastinghouse is now kicking storage drums around in a junk heap... ｜ 一位曾经和艾德温·伊斯丁豪斯共事过的研究员，如今却在废墟里踢罐子…
- Fontaine Research Institute Material Collation Team Director ｜ 枫丹科学院文材整理组主任
- I originally intended to find work here at the wharf as a sailor, but... I have no idea where to even begin looking for that job. ｜ 我本来是想在码头上找一份水手的工作，但是…连怎么找工作都不知道。
- The Kamera has already been properly set up. You only need to stand at a distance and press the mechanism. ｜ 画面远近我均调设妥当了，你站在远处，按下机关即可。
- Please contact us for all your legal consultation or support needs. ｜ 若您需要律法咨询及支援业务，敬请与我们联系。
- For now, why don't you come with me to the Hut of Blessings? Our Forest Fairy lives there. Maybe she'll know what to do. ｜ 不如二位随我去「赐福小屋」一趟吧，那里居住着这座森林的仙子，她或许知道接下来该怎么办。
- Hey there! You look lost, need any help? ｜ 你好！有什么需要帮忙的吗？
- Well, this is the humble Bantan Sango Detective Agency. And I am a detective. ｜ 这里是「万端珊瑚侦探社」，是一个很寻常的地方，而我嘛…是一个侦探。
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- For as long as I can remember, I've been accustomed to handling various matters myself... ｜ 从小到大，我已经习惯了一个人做各种事情了…
- A slime that uses a frozen <color=#FFE14BFF>Cryo Ward</color> to protect itself. If you use Pyro or other <color=#FFE14BFF>reactive elemental attacks</color>, perhaps you can break through its defenses... ｜ 通过冻结的<color=#FFE14BFF>冰元素护罩</color>保护自己的史莱姆。如果用火元素等能<color=#FFE14BFF>与之产生反应的元素攻击</color>的话，或许能突破它的防御…
- It's the thought that counts. ｜ 心意领了。

- See, I knew we'd meet again! Just in time, too — there's something I need your help with. ｜ 哈！我就说我们会再次相见的！正好有一件事需要拜托你们帮忙。
- Revives a character and restores 1,500 HP. ｜ 复苏选中的角色，为其恢复1500点生命值。

- One of your rooms is still being cleaned, I guess it should be ready within the hour. The other room is just through the door on the left. ｜ 其中一间客房正在打扫，估计半个时辰后会空出来，另外一间进门左转就是。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Funnily enough, I actually remember being in a meeting where the editing team was debating the potential risk of misleading the public with this story. They even went to the Maison Gardiennage for advice. ｜ 我亲耳听见了编辑们开会讨论的内容，编辑们也在担心，那篇小说会不会误导民众，还派人专门咨询了执律庭。
- Note: Improper heat control may cause unusual effects in the finished product. ｜ 注：火候控制欠佳时，制作出的产物会拥有离奇效果。

- Still, you should join us for a meal when you're free — I'll host. ｜ 但…酒可以挡，饭必须吃。等你有空了，我做东，咱们好好地大吃一顿。
- Dragonfall first emerged in the midst of a great battle, thousands of years ago. Powerful clashes of elemental energy gave birth to elemental crystals. When the fighting ceased, these geological remnants were miraculously preserved. ｜ 镇龙石诞生于千百年前的一场大战。强烈的元素力碰撞导致元素结晶，战斗结束后，这些石头奇迹般留存了下来。

- Having seized the Irminsul Fruit Fragment, these monsters have temporarily obtained its power. You may be able to defeat them with greater ease if you destroy the source of that strength first... ｜ 强占了地脉之果碎片的敌方短暂的获得了力量，如果先击破力量的源头，似乎能更轻松地击退它们…

- Might Cater, by any chance, be a kid who looks about the same age as you? ｜ 这个卡特哥哥是跟你差不多大的小孩子吗？

- More About Itto: I ｜ 想要了解荒泷一斗·其一

- And if my conscience is clear? ｜ 倘若我问心无愧呢？
- Trail of Delicacies ｜ 珍肴霞踪
- Sir, we're here to back you up! ｜ 长官，我们来支援你了！
- The words he spoke in court often replay in my mind, as if urging me on to do something... ｜ 沃特林在审判庭说的话时常在我脑中回响，让我觉得自己必须做些什么…
- Why did you want to create such a machine, anyway? ｜ 你为什么要制造「推数机」？
- I'll let you in on a little secret — at least half of the apples that Dawn Winery uses to make their Apple Cider come from us. ｜ 不瞒您说，晨曦酒庄出品的苹果酿，至少有一半用的都是我们的苹果。
- To do otherwise would be looking for trouble. ｜ 我当然不会自找麻烦。
- Unfortunately, everything here suddenly started changing before I'd had the chance to be a good host and show them around. ｜ 但我甚至没有来得及好好招待他们，蜃境就发生了奇怪的变化。
- So confusing! Let's have a look around... or up ahead! ｜ 搞不太懂，在周围或者前面找找看吧？
- That's right. Didn't make the cut this year, though. ｜ 是啊，今年没选上。
- You... Cutpurse cretin! Scurrilous slanderer! Well then, if you say Yun's been living well, why don't we have a showdown between it and Chili, then? ｜ 你这妖盗！你妖言惑众！既然你说云宝这几天过得好，敢不敢和老夫比一比？就让云宝和椒宝比一比！
- The odds are against us... ｜ 开战不利…
- So, you were saying — "The Little Oceanid"...? ｜ 刚刚提到的，「水的女儿」是？
- Xinyan ｜ 辛焱
- This time, I am coming as an interim representative of Fonta Co., and wish to discuss the rebuilding of the Institute. ｜ 这次回来，我是作为枫达公司临时代表，准备和院内讨论一下科学院重建的事宜。
- I've always been so careful! How did this happen— ｜ 我一直小心谨慎，怎么会这样——
- Oh, I know! Why don't you change your names to "Fog" and "Sea" respectively? ｜ 啊，对了！要不，你们分别把名字改成「雾」和「海」如何？

- Sure, no problem! Just be careful, Chevreuse. ｜ 好，这没问题，夏沃蕾你也小心。
- The Withering Zone you reported has been taken care of. No need to worry. ｜ 你们之前发现的那片死域已经处理干净了，放心吧。
- Well, when I happened to run into you two earlier, I was actually in the middle of distributing some supplies. ｜ 刚刚偶遇你们的时候，我正在分发物资。
- This seems like something right up my alley. I can even inquire with "the ones who no longer speak" for you. ｜ 这个我熟，连你们「问不到的人」，我都可以帮你们问到喔。

- Ahhh~! That was good. Feels like everything's finally wrapped up now. ｜ 呼——！我现在总算有事情都结束了的感觉啦。

- Jean! Are you okay!? ｜ 喂…琴小姐你怎么了…

- Father told me that even though Master Childe said that he was just coming to Fontaine for a vacation, he actually had some personal reasons. His agenda might be linked to his disappearance. ｜ 我听「父亲」说过，「公子」大人算是度假，但也有着自己的打算。他这次失踪，很难说会不会与私人目的有关…
- I have some questions... ｜ 哪里都有问题。

- Um... I'd like to return this item. ｜ 那个…我想退一下这套衣服。

- Please, let me finish! This idea of mine may not actually work... ｜ 请您听我说完呀。我这主意，不一定能帮到您…

- Hopefully, this trip to Liyue Harbor has been a different experience? ｜ 这次来璃月港，你的心境可有所不同？
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Boulder Run</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. Gain 1 point when collecting an <color=#FFCC33FF>Adventure Coin</color> during the challenge. Gain 5 points when collecting a <color=#FFCC33FF>Large Adventure Coin</color>. Reach the target score to complete the challenge.\n2. The challenge will contain fast-moving <color=#FFCC33FF>Giant Pinballs</color> that, when touched, will send the character(s) flying.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color> \nMona \n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 注意巨球来袭</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>冒险币</color>时获得1分，拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>大型冒险币</color>时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.挑战中存在快速移动的<color=#FFCC33FF>「巨大弹球」</color>，触碰时会将角色击飞。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n莫娜\n\n\n
- You don't have to abandon' anythin', Shiki Taishou. ｜ 「式大将」，你不需要丢弃任何东西。
- Cabin is a fair and kind person with a good temper. Be it man, woman, or anyone else, Cabin would never allow anyone to offer a tribute to it. ｜ 小屋大人脾气好，为人公正又厚道，无论好汉还是妇女，无论是谁要跟它奉献，它准不允许。
- Head for Dragonspine's summit ｜ 前往雪山山顶
- There's no need to rush. Let's see if we can find any other suspicious points about this case. ｜ 不要心急，再想想别的疑点吧。

- Chat: Thoma's Treat ｜ 闲聊·请客
- Talk to Lepine-Pauline ｜ 与乐平波琳对话
- As for the judgment passed by the Oratrice during the trial... ｜ 至于谕示机在那场庭审中的判决…
- Howler Monkey's Tail ｜ 吼猴之尾
- We're looking for the materials necessary to forge the Holy Blade of Narzissenkreuz. ｜ 我们是在寻找锻铸水仙十字圣剑的材料。
- He is the boldest, most inquisitive of our venturers. By dint of the windmill mounted on his ship, he sojourns to places most distant each time — to lands where even the light may fail, and yet, he always returns. ｜ 罗泽尔是最勇敢，最有好奇心的冒险客。凭着他船上的那架风车，他每次都要远游到很远，到几乎看不见灯光的地方。但他每次都能安然回村。
- Meeoww! ｜ 喵嗷！
- It is just an ordinary mushroom, very cunning. Very clever. ｜ 这就是普通的蘑菇，很狡猾，很聪明。
- Hmm... What do you think? ｜ 唔…你觉得呢？
- Yoimiya... ｜ 宵宫…
- Did someone steal the flowers we buried here? Let's give chase, and quick! ｜ 难道有人偷偷拿走了我们埋在这的花吗？快追上去看看吧。
- Wow, it's Sakura Mochi... Well then, I can't simply eat it casually. I'll have to find a nice place to enjoy it. ｜ 哦呀，居然是「绯樱饼」，这可不能随随便便就吃掉，得找个合适的地方好好品尝。
- Traverse, Realm of Sudden Change ｜ 纵横，交加骤变之域
- Maybe Inkanak was right after all... If a stable structure has formed inside the solid phlogiston, I'll need to hit all the weak spots at the same time to break it... ｜ 难道真像因卡纳克说的，固态燃素内部已经形成稳定结构…需要同时击中所有弱点才能清理？
- Seems like you've got friends all the way in Fontaine, huh? ｜ 看来你们在枫丹也有不少朋友啊。
- Connor's Brew ｜ 康纳的酿酒材料需求
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param10:P}/{param11:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param10:P}/{param11:P}
- As for me... it's got to be seafood. ｜ 我的话…果然还是海鲜。
- What do you mean "again"? ｜ 你为什么非要加一个再字啦…
- Fortunately, I wasn't far from shore, and even then it was a life-and-death game I played to get my feet back on dry land. The dive suit was damaged, but thankfully, my leg is mostly fine... I haven't much Mora for medical consultation. ｜ 还好那时候离水面不远，我玩了命地踩水才到了岸边，还好只是潜水服破了洞，腿没什么大碍…我可没多少钱去看医生啊。
- Oh, and the title... "He's a Jolly Good Fellow." ｜ 还有个题头，就写「真是好人」！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Especially after seeing our message, they'll definitely give this Sweet Flower an impressive name! ｜ 特别是看过我们留下的寄语后，会给这朵甜甜花套上很厉害的头衔吧？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- And what if I could? ｜ 如果我可以治好你的脸呢？
- #And... attack, {NICKNAME}! "The three adepti are manning the Guizhong Ballistas. Do not let the Fatui disturb their work!" ｜ #上吧，{NICKNAME}！「三位真君正在操纵归终机，不要让他们被『愚人众』干扰了！」

- As the Sun Rises and Sets ｜ 正如日出日落
- Go to Hotel Debord ｜ 前往德波大饭店
- Exactly. So if I went in, I'd be exposed right away. In theory, anyone who sees something that belongs to the tribe should have it retrieved... But I can't use it. ｜ 对，所以我要是进去，肯定一下子就露馅啦…而且按理说，如果看到了部族的东西，就该立刻回收，可偏偏我用不了。
- *gasp* Where'd all these slimes come from!? Was there something in that elemental dust we don't know about... ｜ 呜哇！好多史莱姆围上来了！是被刚刚吹散的元素吸引过来的吗？
- Players can keep two archive copies per song. If the archive from which the sharing code was generated has been overwritten, the player must challenge that song once more before its modified contents may be played by anyone else. ｜ 每首乐曲玩家可保留两个存档。若已生成分享码的存档被覆盖，玩家需要再次挑战后，修改后的内容才能被其他玩家玩到。
- We cannot... delay any further. Let's swim from over there... ｜ 已经…不能再耽搁了，我们…从那边，游过去…
- Also, why use a spirit-duffer in that case? You're basically setting yourself up for failure. ｜ 而且为什么要找一个灵性白痴来做这件事？这只会什么也得不到。
- Do Dendro slimes really eat berries? ｜ 难道真的有草史莱姆会来偷吃树莓吗？

- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- And of course, I have you, milady, my constant companion. ｜ 当然啦，还有一位始终陪伴着我的好小姐。
- Impatient Thief ｜ 不耐烦的贼匪
- Huh? Why do we need to throw them into the sea? ｜ 啊？为什么要扔进海里？
- You'd better leave at once. If you stay any longer, it'll be too late... ｜ 你们还是快点走吧，再不走就来不及了…
- Well, I'd like to ask you to head to Tianqiu Valley to investigate that huge cavern and report on the impact of the earthquake on the surrounding environment. ｜ 唔，我想拜托你去天遒谷的那个大空洞去搜索一下，看看地震对周围环境造成的影响。

- Then, what should we do? It's not too late, is it? ｜ 那怎么办？还来得及吗？

- The Flower Carriage will become <color=#FFE14BFF>immune</color> to the negative effects of collisions with obstacles for some time after obtaining a <color=#FFE14BFF>Buttressing Blessing</color>. ｜ 获得<color=#FFE14BFF>坚强祝愿</color>后的一段时间内，花车将<color=#FFE14BFF>免疫</color>障碍物撞击的负面影响。
- It'd better be! No more playing tricks on us this time! ｜ 真的吗，这次你不会骗我们了吧！
- I came from beyond the heavens. ｜ 我是天外来客。
- Head to the exit ｜ 前往出口

- One of the missing Kory Drums. This one has a Pyro marking on it. ｜ 佚失的俱利鼓之一。鼓上镌有火元素的标记。
- Is telling the truth also a "cost" as far as you're concerned? ｜ 向人说实话也是代价？
- Tee-hee! ｜ 哼哼。
- (He seems to have been fleeing from something, no doubt suspecting that something terrible was afoot.) ｜ （他拼命地想要逃离什么，多半是预感到有大事将要发生了。）
- But these domains can be dangerous. ｜ 但是秘境很危险哦。
- Talk to Tubby ｜ 与阿圆对话
- Huh, were you nervous or something? That wasn't a super good demonstration... ｜ 唔唔，你是不是有点紧张了？这样子示范可不行啊…
- A foreign goddess descends from the skies and takes away your only kin ｜ 陌生的神灵自天而降，带走了你唯一的血亲
- Mystical ability... ｜ 秘术选择…
- Old Merc's Pal ｜ 佣兵重剑
- My strength has reached its peak, but there are still many things I can never accomplish relying on my fighting power alone. There will still be many times when emotions and rules do not agree, but I think I'll find the key to striking the right balance in the journeys to come. ｜ 力量已达顶峰，然而仅靠这一身武力，仍旧有许多做不到的事情。人情与规则许多时候相互冲突，如何更好地兼顾，我会在今后的旅途中寻找答案。
- Fiery Sanctum Field ｜ 净焰剑狱领域
- A small timekeeping gadget. On moonless nights, it was the only way its former owner could know the time. ｜ 展示当前时间的小道具，在没有月亮的黑夜里是唯一的时间参照。
- Florian ｜ 弗洛莱恩
- Unlock teleport waypoints in Konda Village ｜ 解锁「稻妻 绀田村」传送锚点
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- So it's not that we don't want to solve certain issues, but that we just don't know how. ｜ 所以有些问题呢，不是我们不想解决，是实在无从下手啊。
- Nothing. I'll send you back now. Are you ready to depart? ｜ 没什么。我送你们回去吧。准备好出发了吗？
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon! You're here! I was just thinking about going to look for you! ｜ #{NICKNAME}和派蒙啊！你们来啦，我刚想着去找你们呢。
- Activate the Pursina's Spike ｜ 开启「普尔希娜光钉」
- Caterpillar... Wouldn't it be great to meet Grandpa Earnshaw and Lanoire right now? Are you sure about this? ｜ 卡特皮拉...以现在的样子去见恩肖爷爷和莉诺尔不也很好吗？真的这样就可以了吗？
- And the other? ｜ 另一件事呢？
- (According to that Ms. Gendou, this Ms. Gendou is...) ｜ （这个玄冬小姐，按照那个玄冬小姐说的…）
- Many of our tribespeople love music and dance, and have an amazing sense of rhythm. ｜ 我们部族有很多人都喜欢玩音乐和跳舞，他们的节奏感都很棒。
- Yes, sure... ｜ 那当然了…
- Shh... I—Isn't that Cyno? ｜ 嘘…那，那是不是赛诺先生？
- Mimi Tomo ｜ 折箭觅踪
- Huh!? No, you should emphasize that you were not in cahoots with the Fatui! ｜ 什么呀，应该先强调你没有和愚人众勾结！
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Paimon's just worried that... What if, well, just in case there's some kind of evil dark lord-y trap in it... ｜ 我只是怕…万一、万一箱子里有什么魔王邪恶陷阱…
- Opponents Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败怪物：#1#/%1%
- When a character's Normal Attack hits an opponent, the character will unleash a shockwave at the opponent's location that deals True DMG. This effect can be triggered once every {1}s. ｜ 角色的普通攻击命中敌人时，将在敌人的位置释放冲击波，造成真实伤害，此效果每{1}秒至多触发一次。
- Not bad. Be it chess or combat, you always seem to surprise me. Hm, working with you is quite the novelty. So... I look forward to continuing to work with you, partner. ｜ 你还不赖。无论是对弈还是战斗，都不乏让人眼前一亮的表现。不…这样的合作，对我来说也算新奇…那么，今后也同行吧，「吾友」。
- Please adjust camera angle to face the plant ｜ 需要将镜头转至正确角度，对准植物
- Ningguang hasn't taken a vacation in a long time, I'll bet? ｜ 凝光应该很久没放过假了吧？
- Increases all party members' Physical DMG by 25% and CRIT Rate by 6% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色物理伤害提升25%，暴击率提升6%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Layla ｜ 莱依拉
- A <color=#FFE14BFF>gold-glowing Multiplier Marvelfish</color> will appear in the fishing zone. Catching this fish will grant you <color=#FFE14BFF>5x the amount of action points you would get for catching an ordinary fish of the same size</color>. ｜ 捕鱼区将出现有着<color=#FFE14BFF>金色光效的倍增奇效鱼</color>，捕捉该鱼后，将获得<color=#FFE14BFF>同类体型普通鱼类5倍</color>的行动点。
- Defeat all opponents within the time limit ｜ 限定时间内击败所有敌人
- Freminet's Hobbies ｜ 菲米尼的爱好…
- What? Alright, well Paimon's staying here, then. You two can go in! ｜ 啊？那我不去了，你们去吧！
- Now, did we not find a Blank Score a while back? Slot it into this device, and our performance can begin. ｜ 我们之前不是发现过一本「空白曲谱」吗？就试着把它插进这个机关来开始演奏吧。
- Are you of Legio IX? What are you doing here? Should you all not have been ordered to retreat to Fort Charybdis? ｜ 你们是第九军团的人吗，在这里干什么？按照命令，第九军团应该已经撤回卡布狄斯堡了。
- Tsk, you've spent all your time hiding away in the Akademiya. This place has long since become our hunting ground. Brace yourselves! ｜ 谁叫你们一直龟缩在教令院不出来，这里早就是我们的主场了，认命吧！
- Knew we should've been quieter... ｜ 要是再小心点就好了…
- That should tide you over at least for as long as I'm on board. ｜ 这样，在我们离船之前，您都可以留在船上。
- "But I've heard over half of Rifaet's papers were ghostwritten." ｜ 「不过，我可听说，里法特的论文，可有一半以上是代笔之作。」
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- This is Baron Bunny. ｜ 这位是兔兔伯爵。
- Primordial Bathysmal Vishap ｜ 深海龙蜥·原种
- The Akademiya decided of late to distribute the Akasha Terminals to all tourists in Sumeru, hoping to help all feel the universal compassion from Greater Lord Rukkhadevata. ｜ 最近决定对全体旅客发放，希望大家都能感受到树王大人普世的慈爱。
- I wouldn't want to disturb anyone during my shooting practice. ｜ 我担心在这里练习打靶会吵到别人。
- Hmm... Before arriving in Sumeru, I asked a friend from the Special Patrol to look into the creators of "Auguste"... ｜ 是么…在来须弥之前，我请特巡队的一位朋友帮忙了解过，「奥古斯都」的缔造者们都有谁…
- You speak of the young adeptus of Guili Plains... *sigh* Still fulfilling his duty to this very day. Please, give this Remedium Tertiorum to him on my behalf. Oh, yes... be sure not to let Paimon eat them. Nothing of this world can withstand the power of this medicine. ｜ 你说，归离原的少年仙人…啊…直至今日，他仍在履行他的职责…哦，这副「连理镇心散」，请替我带给他。对了，可千万不能让小派蒙偷吃了去，这里的药力…绝非常人所能承受。
- Right — what I meant to say was that what we Mondstadters value most is freedom. ｜ 对了，我想说的就是，我们蒙德人是最看重「自由」的。
- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- Skyfeather ｜ 高翔之翎
- A tiara worn by those tasked with offering sacrifices in ancient times. Wind once freely flowed through the various openings in the headdress. ｜ 在古老的时代，司祭祀之人佩戴的礼冠。过去，风常常从礼冠构成的空洞中穿过。
- Not to brag, but I could beat ten of you in a fight. ｜ 这么讲很不礼貌，但我能打十个你。
- Clear out the monsters on the watchtower ｜ 清剿烽火台上的魔物
- Is now really a good time to go over? ｜ 现在过去没关系吗？
- I... I'm doing some training here, and I'm about to leave Liyue soon to travel abroad. ｜ 我…正在这里做些锻炼，准备过段时间就离开璃月，外出游历。
- Defeat Narzissenkreuz ｜ 击败纳齐森科鲁兹
- After hooking a Flamegranate in, shoot it forth to dispel the Abyssal taint and ignite the braziers. ｜ 勾取火榴果后射出，可以驱散深渊污染，并点燃传火盆
- Your search seems to have borne some fruit. Worried that his pure-yang spirit might scare the evil spirits away, Chongyun requests that you go and investigate alone first... ｜ 搜寻之后，略有斩获。重云担心纯阳之体会吓跑妖邪，拜托你先去前方调查一番…
- Select Kaeya's Elemental Skill, Frostgnaw ｜ 选择「凯亚」的元素战技「霜袭」
- Which means we made the right call to investigate. ｜ 说明我们决定调查是正确的。
- Mutual Security Enhancing Simulation ｜ 安固诸方之述演
- "The barrier is online. Keep raising that imbecilic repair barrier." ｜ 「屏障开启了，继续抬升那个愚不可及的修复屏障吧。」
- Fang of the Mountain King ｜ 山王长牙
- What are you doing? ｜ 你们在做什么？
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- I did consider that possibility, and I won't lie — it'd be a real bummer if that were the case. ｜ 我也想过这种可能性，说实话，真是那样的话我可能会很受挫吧。
- You're right, many of Paimon's favorite dishes use Sweet Flowers. ｜ 好像也说得没错，我喜欢的料理，很多都用到了甜甜花…
- Your attitude... ｜ 态度…
- This moving wall seems to be stuck somehow... ｜ 这扇活动墙似乎被什么东西卡住了…
- Please claim the contents of your Surprise Bundle, which are attached to this message.\nWe wish you a pleasant journey.\nPlease Note: the contents of each Surprise Bundle level can only be collected once per account. ｜ 请在附件中，收取「惊喜礼包」的所含内容。\n愿您能够一帆风顺。\n请注意：每个档位的「惊喜礼包」的所含内容每个游戏账号只能领取一次。
- Realm area not yet unlocked ｜ 该洞天区域未解锁
- Paimon took a quick peek before we left last time... There was some kind of light coming from inside. Don't you think that's a little strange? ｜ 那次我们离开之前，我还特地看了一眼…地上那个坑里好像有光，不觉得很奇怪吗？
- It's okay. Just keep hiding here, and tomorrow, I'll— ｜ 没事的，你在这里藏好了，我明天…
- "Your" bathhouse? So you run the place, huh? And business isn't going so great, you say? ｜ 原来是店老板啊…听起来，这边生意好像不太好的样子？
- A wondrous device present in several places throughout the Veluriyam Mirage, it uses some special mechanism to broadcast pre-recorded messages, allowing staff to communicate with guests with ease.\nAt the same time, this device provides a number of functions critical to the designer, such as allowing attractions including "Daiya's Three-Day Reverie" to exist and function smoothly, providing fresh and exciting experiences to guests. ｜ 布设在「琉形蜃境」多地的奇妙装置，能以某种特殊的机理转播配套装置记录的声音，从而让员工们轻松将信息传递给远处的客人。\n同时，这一关键的设备为设计者们提供了关键的基础功能，诸如「黛依阿的三日遐想」这样的游乐项目才得以实现并流畅运转，为客人们提供更多新奇的体验。
- And Yatlan... Easy does it, okay? Not every conversation has to turn into you plugging the family business. ｜ 还有娅特兰…不要随时随地见缝插针地推荐你们家的商品。
- Final Valor retained reached 40 ｜ 最终保有「豪气」达到40
- Wanderer ｜ 流浪者
- Alright, I need to go set things up again. Ugh... What should I set up this time? ｜ 好了，我得去布置场地了。呃…这次布什么好呢？
- Exile's Feather ｜ 流放者之羽
- Firework launches complete, Launch Tube has been returned to Inventory ｜ 烟花燃放完毕，烟花筒已收回至背包中
- Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, "the ones who no longer speak"... Did she mean talking to the dead? ｜ 往生堂，「问不到的人」，难道她说的不是活着的人？

- Mondstadt welcomes you, windborne travelers. ｜ 蒙德欢迎你们，随风而来的旅行者。
- (Zaha Hadi is still arguing back and forth with Cyrus. It seems that they're not actually angry anymore, but just arguing to pass the time.) ｜ （萨赫哈蒂依旧和居勒什有一搭没一搭地争论，不过比起真的生气，感觉他们更像是在打发时间。）
- But these inspectors seem to be always on edge, as if they are afraid of my wares exploding all of a sudden. ｜ 但这些官员总是神经兮兮的，好像害怕这些商品突然爆炸一样。
- Well, the problem's been resolved... Use the power of the "symphony" to undo the chains on the stone pillar. ｜ 麻烦算是解决了…使用「乐章」的力量，解开缠绕在石柱上的锁链吧。
- Do you know of the Kamuijima Cannon? It's a big gun built using the latest technology, powered by Electro. ｜ 您知道「神居岛崩炮」吗？那是一种采用了新型技术，使用「雷元素」驱动的大炮。
- Yanfei ｜ 烟绯
- Complete "Secret Pirate Treasure" ｜ 完成「海盗秘宝」剧情
- What's more, I sense that if we continue forward... we might just come face to face with Harunosuke himself. ｜ 而且，我有种感觉…继续向前的话，我们说不定真会遇见晴之介。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Her birthday's in a few days, so Tlazolli asked me to find a pure Volcanic Crystal to give her as a present. ｜ 过几天就是小妮赫佳的生日了，特拉佐莉也特意来拜托我，帮她找一块足够纯净的「火山晶石」，用来给妮赫佳做生日礼物。

- Cheesy Crab Hotpot ｜ 酪香蟹蟹锅
- You've got to come and watch the fireworks this meteor shower inspired as they soar high in the sky! ｜ 这次旅行的成果，说什么也要在你们的见证之下，让它升上天空！
- Delaroche's Fish Hook ｜ 德拉萝诗的鱼钩
- Ask the editors some questions ｜ 向编辑们询问
- Thanks, Kama! ｜ 谢谢你，阿釜！
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Stir-Fried Shrimp ｜ 清炒虾仁
- #Paimon, Melusine! {NICKNAME}, Pahsiv! ｜ #派蒙，美露莘！{NICKNAME}，珀西芙！
- They're so lively. ｜ 都很有活力。
- An enthusiastic slime breeder invites you to play with them. ｜ 热情的史莱姆饲养师邀请你来跟史莱姆一起玩。$UNRELEASED
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- *sigh* It's all my fault. You need to look after yourself, and take any symptom seriously, even the smallest ones... ｜ 唉，都是我的错。你要多关心自己，任何小的征兆都不要忽视…
- ... ｜ ……
- Rewards ｜ 奖励
- Help Mamere fix Seymour. ｜ 帮助玛梅赫修好了西摩尔。
- We've just saved the world, right? ｜ 我们刚刚拯救了世界对么？
- "Enemy"? Heh, I think we're a little closer than that. ｜ 用「敌人」来称呼我，未免太生疏了。
- Hmm... I wonder what's really going on with my scryglass... ｜ 水占盘…究竟是怎么一回事呢。

- Talk to Fujin ｜ 与浮锦对话
- Xiling ｜ 汐零
- I will perform "The Sanctification of Tao Dou" one more time, for all my friends who were unable to join the festivities during the Lantern Rite. My apologies for not being able to set up a grander stage. ｜ 今夜再唱一曲八奇炼桃都，给几位错过海灯节的好友。没有那晚的舞台，还请不要见怪。

- Pay a visit to Ioroi ｜ 造访五百藏
- Carving Marks ｜ 遗迹的铭文
- This war... ｜ 这场战争…

- Apologies, our business has me distracted... Was there something you needed? ｜ 抱歉，部落事情繁杂…请问有什么事情吗？
- We'll take three orders each of Masala Cheese Balls, Potato Boats, and Curry Shrimp, and ten orders of Panipuri. ｜ 马萨拉芝士球和土豆船各三份，绿汁脆球十人份，咖喱虾也要三份。
- Oh! No, it's alright. You've already accomplished a lot today, you should rest up. ｜ 没事的！没事的…今天大家都辛苦了，还是多多休息，多多休息。
- You may return to your work, Ganyu. One shall see to this matter on one's own. There will be many an occasion to dine together in the future. One is certain the opportunity shall present itself most readily. ｜ 你先忙吧，不必随本仙同去了。以后相聚的机会想必还有很多，无需拘于一时。
- Besides, I want to give her a surprise, so I can't afford to let her know... ｜ 而且我要给她个惊喜，千万不能让她知道这件事…
- "Hang on. I never said that! Don't take me so literally each time!" ｜ 「等等，我没这么说！你不要每次都只看字面的意思！」
- You're so relaxed, Thoma! You act like we're just out on another hike! ｜ 托马好从容！感觉就像在郊游！
- I like things that look orderly. See? All of my research notes are compiled in notebooks of the exact same thickness. All my potions are lined up according to effect and hue— Wha—What!? What is this purple potion doing here!? Sorry, I—I need to reassess the order of these potions! ｜ 我喜欢看起来很规则的东西，你看，书架上每一本实验记录，厚度都是一样的，实验台上的几百瓶药水，都是按功效与颜色分别排好…欸？…欸欸？！为什么这瓶紫色的药水会出现在这里！我、我要全部整理一遍！
- Every Windblume Festival, young hunters like me go to Wolvendom to catch foxes. ｜ 每到风花节，像我这样的年轻猎手要去奔狼领等地捕捉狐狸。
- "An Investigation Team That Doesn't Investigate, and a News Conference With No News" ｜ 「调查小组不调查，新闻发布无新闻。」

- He's not in here... ｜ 不在房间里…

- It said, Zohrah Mushroom went to a cave that has Marana, which has dissolved in the water. It's very dangerous. ｜ 蘑菇说，「须罗蕈」去了有「无留陀」的洞穴，「无留陀」溶在水里，在那边聚集。很危险。

- #{M#You hug Jeht before parting ways with her in the desert.\nShe holds you tightly, and you notice that she seems to be holding back sobs...\nHowever, she quickly draws back and rubs her wet eyes before smiling broadly at you once more.}{F#You hug Jeht before parting ways with her in the desert.\nShe holds you tightly, almost as if afraid that a blinding sandstorm would sweep you away. You notice that she seems to be holding back sobs...\nThen she pushes you away lightly and rubs her wet eyes before smiling broadly at you once more.} ｜ #{M#婕德与你在黄沙中拥别。\n她紧紧地搂了你一下，你感受到她似乎正强忍着抽泣…\n然后，她快速抽身离开你的怀中，若无其事地擦了擦眼角，对你咧嘴笑了。}{F#婕德与你在黄沙中拥别。\n她紧紧地搂着你，仿佛生怕你被遮蔽天幕的沙暴带走，你感受到她似乎正强忍着抽泣…\n然后，她轻轻把你推开，擦了擦湿润的眼角，对你露出微笑。}

- Ever since I was a kid, I've always had a problem with authority. There was a period when I hated the rules, and would always insist on going against the grain. Thanks to this headstrong character of mine, I've had to go through a lot of suffering. But eventually, I came to understand that rules aren't completely a bad thing. What I really can't stand is the feeling that I can't make decisions based on what I truly think. ｜ 我从小就不喜欢被管教，有段时间特别讨厌「规矩」这东西，一定要和它对着干。托这倔脾气的福，我吃了不少苦头。但后来我渐渐明白，「规矩」不全是坏事。我真正讨厌的，是那种不能按自己想法做出决定的感觉。
- Edict of Absolution ｜ 赦免宣告
- Her extraordinary abilities drew the attention of the adepti, and they took her as one of their own. Her story became the stuff of legends... But alas, the paths of mortals and adepti seldom cross, and she would never again re-enter the mortal world. ｜ 再后来，她因为资质过人被仙家收留，成就了一段佳话。只可惜仙凡永隔，她也从此无缘再入尘世。
- Phew. Only the base is burned. We can still use the cooking pot, it just needs a bit of a wash. ｜ 呼…还好还好，只有底部焦了。锅具洗洗还能用。
- (No matter what... Must save them... Must break this...) ｜ #（但是…一定要救出{M#他们}{F#她们}…要打破这个…）
- Sayu agilely comes upstream and reaches the destination. ｜ 早柚很灵巧地逆流而上，抵达了终点。
- What just happened was just a small setback. I can overcome it for sure. ｜ 现在我经历的还只是小小的挫折而已，我可以克服的。
- Wink ｜ 眨眼
- Our surveillance shows that in his whole time here, he has made numerous purchases but no sales. And yet he has no stock in his possession. We believe it's highly probable that he has been supplying the Tenryou Commission behind the scenes! ｜ 据我们观察，他长期只买不卖，身边却一点货物都没有，很可能是偷偷运到天领奉行去了！
- It's terrible that they're ruining the scenery and everything... but why are you getting so worked up? ｜ 从破坏风景的角度说是很可恶…不过有必要连你也这么生气吗？
- The recording ends here. ｜ 录像到这里就结束了。
- I did remember something else, though. When my mother left, she only carried some small personal luggage with her. She left most of the belongings in the house to me. ｜ 不过，我刚好想起一件事。母亲临走前只带了些随身物品，她把家中大部分东西都留给了我。

- He stole the flaming phlogiston seed from the giant dragon and created the Upper Sanctum using that power, before teaching it to everyone in the tribes. ｜ 他从巨龙那里盗取了燃素的火种，利用燃素的力量创造了「浮土静界」，并且在那里将燃素的力量教给部族中的人。
- S—So that's how things stand... Traveler, do help us find Mr. Ahangar as soon as possible. I shall be waiting here. ｜ 总，总之就是这样…旅行者，请您快些去找阿汉格尔先生请教一下吧，我就在这等您。

- Voyaging far and wide has made them a well-traveled group with a wide range of experiences. They may just know how to break through the storm. ｜ 他们常年远航，见多识广，或许有突破那片风暴的方法。
- Well, don't worry about the rest. *sigh* Guess it's time to run some errands... ｜ 接下来的事你就别操心了，我马上又要去跑腿了，唉…
- Haha, nonsense, we all know what a talented businesswoman you are. Oh, and don't forget, she's the Boss now. ｜ 呵呵，都知道你路子广办法多，你开这种玩笑没人信的。不过现在她已经是老板了哦。
- Does that mean... Bongo-Head is hanging out with us by choice right now? ｜ 也就是说，现在的「咚咚小圆帽」，正在凭自己本来的心性和我们共处吗？

- I climb trees to fly further and see farther. I don't usually stop for a nap. ｜ 我上树是为了飞得更久看得更远，一般不会在树上休息。

- After many years, the awesomely powerful Primo Geovishaps have grown accustomed to changes in their elemental environment.\nFolktales hold that after the great "draconic calamity" that led to the ruin of Tianqiu Valley, the Geovishaps and Primo Geovishaps burrowed deep into the earth, awaiting their chance to rise once more... ｜ 经历了长久岁月，拥有伟大力量的巨大岩龙蜥，能够适应元素环境的异变。\n根据民话，导致天遒谷毁灭的「龙灾」发生后，岩龙蜥与古岩龙蜥们沉入大地之中，等待着复起的时机…
- The Measure of a Mushroom ｜ 菇测高度

- A fishing point located in the south of the Heart of Force Inversion. It has considerable quantities of fish, but for most anglers, coming here to fish is considered quite dangerous. For this reason, the abundance of fish here has been preserved for many a long year, awaiting champions who have mastered both sword and rod... ｜ 位于力向逆心以南的钓点，鱼类资源可观，但对于多数渔师而言，前往此地钓鱼的风险较高，因此，丰富的鱼类资源正为鱼竿与剑的双重强者长久留存…

Each Rainstorm can only heal characters this way once ｜ 电涌效果持续期间，将生成<color=#f39001>雳云</color>，每<color=#f39001>{0}</color>秒随机进行一次以下形式的攻击：\n1.<color=#b863ee>雳云落雷</color>：对影响范围内的敌人造成雷元素伤害，为当前场上角色恢复<color=#f39001>{1}</color>点元素能量；\n2.<color=#0075de>雳云暴雨</color>：对影响范围内的敌人造成水元素伤害，为当前场上角色恢复<color=#f39001>{2}%</color>生命值，一次暴雨期间，至多通过这种方式为角色恢复1次生命值

- Though I believe you're capable of dealing with the monsters ahead, I'd still like to ask you to watch out and take care. ｜ 虽说你应该有能力应付这前面的怪物了，不过还是要说一句，请注意安全哦。
- This was a very traumatic experience for her, and she could never come to grips with it by reasoning alone. ｜ 这对她来说是非常沉重的心理阴影，只靠讲述道理不可能让她释然。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 3 consecutive sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to perform a twirling slash.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多三段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，进行一次旋转斩击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Pear Orchard Screen: Deft.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「梨园画屏-『巧下』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- I borrowed every book on love from the library that I could find. ｜ 我把图书馆里关于「恋爱」的书全都借来了。
- Upgrades <color=#B09057FF>Glacial Bloom's</color> Basic Attack to decrease hit opponents' Elemental RES temporarily. ｜ 强化<color=#B09057FF>「奇术机关·鲛冰万华」</color>，使它的基础攻击命中敌人后，会使其所有元素抗性降低。
- Huh? No! I meant, uh... taxes! Hehehe... Yeah... ｜ 是税、税款！咳咳…
- Whoa, there really is an endless flow of lava coming out from here... But how are we gonna smash this big thing? ｜ 呜哇，确实不断有岩浆从这里涌出来…不过要怎么把这个大家伙打碎呢…
- Dain was just saying how these ancient machines are from Khaenri'ah... ｜ 戴因刚才说，这些古代机器也是源于坎瑞亚…
- Since the Masterful Chefs competition, you could say that Yanxiao and I are not only competitors, but good friends as well! I visit him at Wangshu Inn sometimes to discuss our cooking. ｜ 自从上次厨王争霸赛以来，我和言笑也算是好对手好朋友啦，有时会去望舒客栈找他讨论做菜。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- This proved to be a good opportunity for me. While that impostor was out, I used methods of my own to bring you here. ｜ 对我而言，这也是很好的机会。趁冒牌货今天不在，我用「自己的方式」把你带到了这里。

- Hey, Idyia seems much more lively. That's so wonderful! ｜ 嘿嘿，现在的伊迪娅看上去精神好多了，真是太好了！
- Number of times hitting opponents using shockwaves generated by Plunging Attacks ｜ 下落攻击的冲击波命中敌人的次数
- Each move of the starting point cart or boxes within the stage will be recorded. Use the Recall function to restore the stage layout to its previously recorded state. <color=#ffcc33>It can be used 3 times consecutively</color>. ｜ 起点小车或关卡内的箱子每次移动，都会进行记录。使用回溯功能，即可将关卡布局还原至上次记录时的状态，<color=#ffcc33>至多可连续使用3次</color>。
- Thanks for the match, I've learned a lot from our encounter. ｜ 感谢赐教，这次的牌局交流，给我提供了不错的学习样本。
- Aw, it's a baby Iktomisaurus. So cute... although, why is it staring at us? ｜ 这是幼年的暝视龙？还蛮可爱的…不过，它为什么要这样盯着我们看？
- Everyone Together ｜ 众人齐声
- Message ｜ 留言
- Don't you worry, we'll take care of everything from here. We will definitely get your belongings back! ｜ 别担心，剩下的事情就交给我们了。一定会把你的东西取回来的！
- #So many bad, bad Fungi... Because of Marana, all Fungi are very angry. It's impossible to communicate with them. Nara {NICKNAME}, can you defeat the Fungi? ｜ #有好坏好坏的蕈兽。因为「无留陀」，所以蕈兽都很生气，没办法沟通。那菈{NICKNAME}能击退蕈兽吗？
- Windtrace Coin bonus for attaining "I'll Give You 2.5 Minutes" ｜ 达成「让你先逃2分半」的「迷踪币」加成
- Potions Most Potent ｜ 神奇药剂
- Everyone should enjoy the break while it lasts! I'll convene everyone when the fish arrives. ｜ 没关系，请尽情游玩，等鱼回来我再召集大家。
- Gambler ｜ 赌徒
- Excuse me, great shaman, but we have a situation over here. We could really use your help! ｜ 尊敬的大萨满女士，我这边遇到了一些麻烦，或许您可以提供一些帮助？
- Again, maybe this is a conversation we can have when you look less like you're gonna keel over... ｜ 都说啦，你还是先把伤养好再说吧。
- A wall decoration comprised of a shield and two ceremonial swords engraved with the devices of the Knights of Favonius.\nBoth the sword and shield are trimmed with precious metals and are of good quality. They are not legendary weapons, for sure, but they are certainly no worse than high-quality equipment one can find on the market.\nSome knights once found the following clause within an old edition of the rulebooks — "Feel free to use these weapons in case of an emergency."\nHowever, these arms have incredible proportions and weight, and ordinary knights cannot use them at all, with some reckless young people almost causing alarmingly dangerous incidents.\nAs such, the new rulebooks now contain no such clause. ｜ 镌刻着骑士团徽记的盾牌与两柄礼仪大剑组成的墙饰。\n剑盾均以贵重的金属镶边，品相上好，不谈神兵利器，至少不逊于市面流通的高级装备。\n曾有骑士在旧版守则中找到这样一则条文——「如遇紧急情况，请取下剑盾使用」。\n但无论盾牌和大剑，尺寸和重量都太过惊人，普通的骑士根本没法驾驭，不自量力的年轻人们还闹出过惊险的事故。\n因此最新版的骑士守则中，这则条文已被删除。

### Part 163

- Important Message ｜ 重要消息

A character can only equip 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#3003}Weapon.) ｜ 此牌会记录本局游戏中你打出过的名称不存在于本局最初牌组中的不同名的行动牌数量，称为<color=#FFFFFFFF>「声援」</color>。\n如果此牌的<color=#FFFFFFFF>「声援」</color>至少为2/4/8，则<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色造成的伤害+1/2/3</color>。\n（<color=#FFFFFFFF>「{SPRITE_PRESET#3203}双手剑」角色</color>才能装备。角色最多装备1件「{SPRITE_PRESET#3003}武器」）

- According to a popular theory from the Vahumana Darshan of the Akademiya, rejecting impractical motions at the beginning of a planning session will give more weight to the actual proposal. ｜ 先否定一些不可行的方案，会让即将提出要施行的计划变得更有分量，这可是教令院因论派中非常主流的观点。

- An anemometer made from "Ashen Aratiku Wood" paired with a conical cloth bag, primarily used to help people monitor wind speed and direction in real time. It is a unique device of the Flower-Feather Clan.\nIt is said that although this cloth-based anemometer is not as precise as propeller-style ones, its low cost and intuitive design make it a favorite. Even a Saurian rider flying high in the sky can judge the approximate wind speed and direction on the ground with a single glance, as if grasping the very tail of the mountain wind. ｜ 以「灰灰楼林木」配合圆锥形布袋制成的风速计，主要用于帮助人们实时掌握当前的风速和风向，是「花羽会」特有的装置之一。\n据说，虽然这种以布袋制成的风速计在测量精度上不如风车型的风速计，但胜在造价低廉且极为直观。即使是正在高空中飞行的龙骑士，也能一眼判断出地面上的大致风速和风向，就像是抓住了山风的尾巴一样。

- When you believed that you had found the wreckage of the "Ruin Wanderer," you tried to switch in wreckage that you had excavated previously to pull the wool over the Akademiya's eyes. ｜ 在发现疑似「遗迹徘徊者」的残骸后，你计划用此前挖出过的机械残骸代替它，来瞒过教令院。
- Regarding the air current... ｜ 关于那股寒流…
- Seriously? Did we really do that? Huh, we should remember that in future, then. ｜ 有，有这么夸张吗？那我们之后要好好回忆一下！
- I've hit rock bottom? ｜ 我已经滚到最底下了？

- Any recommendations? ｜ 有何指教？
- Seriously? And nobody thought to tell me? ｜ 不喊我一起看，不够意思…
- I'll make it short, then. A rich old man in the Akademiya hired us, the Eremites, to find the Zohrah Mushroom in the forest. ｜ 那我就长话短说，教令院的有钱老头委托我们「镀金旅团」深入森林取得那个什么蘑菇，「须罗蕈」，没错。

- An ancient, intricate crown that was once used by a forgotten clergy member. Today, this relic has been enshrined with great ceremony by the people of Watatsumi. ｜ 古老精致的冠冕，由被遗忘的「神人」所拥有。如今被海祇之民精心封存起来。

- Oh, now that's a rare sight! Someone besides a journalist who can tell if something is secret or not. ｜ 喔，那倒真是稀奇。除了记者之外，居然还有人能分辨出一件事是否有关保密。

- A long time ago, the people of the Lord of Deserts carved these imperial insignias based on robust beetles to memorialize the bright sun that marked the shifting of day and night, as well as the infinity of such times. Though the name of that Lord is no longer mentioned, these imperial insignias have been preserved through time, each bearing a faint ambiance of those past glories.\nThese insignias travel with the descendants of the Eremite Tribe, silently telling the tales of their then-Lord. ｜ 很久很久以前，黄沙的居民以顽强的甲虫为原型雕成王印，用以纪念朝暮轮回的红日与无始无终的时光。尽管那位王者的名讳如今已不再被人挂在嘴边，但这些小巧的王印却保留下来，隐约透露着旧日的威名。\n它们随镀金的子孙流散四方，依然沉默地倾诉着旧主的往事。
