- Ah, curses, curses... ｜ 喔，见鬼。
- Hello! ...A distinctive but elusive dress sense, defined yet atypical facial features, and followed around everywhere by a floating elf companion. Hmm... nope. Can't place you. ｜ 您好啊。打扮、面庞…还有奇怪的伙伴小精灵。猜不出来了呢…
- Thank you, Traveler. I... apologize for my previous attitude towards you. ｜ 非常感谢你，旅行者。我为我之前的态度…向你道歉。
- Y—You could say that. ｜ 算、算是吧。
- Bloom Pruner would struggle to deal with opponents that many times its size, even at full power. ｜ 就算「花羽叶月神机」用出最强的力量，也不可能和许多大家伙抗衡啦。
- ...And then bank on the "unexpected" happening? ｜ 然后被「意外」定胜负？

- Why isn't anyone here? No trail to follow, either... ｜ 怎么没有人呢？附近好像也没有什么痕迹…
- No wonder they're so close to each other. What would they say? ｜ 难怪他们如此熟悉，他们会说些什么呢…

- Her Excellency has both ability and political integrity, and is skilled in many different fields. She is the undisputed leader of Watatsumi Island. ｜ 「现人神巫女」大人德才兼备，熟悉各个领域的事务，是海祇岛名副其实的领袖。
- My customers tend to prefer objects of the more inanimate variety. ｜ 因为…肯定会自己跑掉。
- When Lyney is on the field, he will gain a stack of Crisp Focus every 2s. Each stack will increase his CRIT DMG by 20%. Max 3 stacks. This effect will be canceled when Lyney leaves the field. ｜ 林尼在场上时，每2秒将获得一层「集意专注」效果，使林尼的暴击伤害提升20%。此效果至多叠加3层，将在林尼退场时解除。
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- One of the <color=#00E1FFFF>sheets</color> on that wall! ｜ 那面墙上的<color=#00E1FFFF>纸片</color>！
- An outlander? Interesting... ｜ 是外国人？有趣…
- A unique-looking long stone table that may be found in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame, imposing its rather impressive surface area on its surroundings. As the name suggests, this table's design is inspired by large shields. Its unique pitted design not only provides excellent support for the user's arms but also allows their torsos to lean closer to the table center, thus improving on the usual "long-table experience." However, this complex outer structure also causes high construction and maintenance costs, which have prevented its widespread use. ｜ 造型特异的石质长桌，有着颇为可观的桌面空间，能在圣火竞技场内见到。据说，如它的名字那样，这张长桌的设计灵感正是来自于大型盾牌。而其独特的凹陷桌沿设计，不仅为使用者的手臂提供了良好的支撑，还令使用者的躯干更加靠近桌面中心，从而提供了相比通常长桌更为舒适的使用体验。不过，它更复杂的外形也使得制造和维护成本更高，因此尚不能广泛普及。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- The Captain was right. The situation is not looking good. Just look at the amount of people we've had to rescue. ｜ 正如「队长」大人所言，情况很不乐观，我们已经救下了好几队纳塔人。
- This place is very suitable for planting flowers. No matter what seeds you sow, before you know it they'll bloom into a sea of blossoms. ｜ 这里很适合种花的，无论播了什么种，都能很快开出一片的花海来。
- Fang of the Mountain King ｜ 山王长牙
- An earring that you picked up in the ruins after completing the duel against The Knave.\nThe red symbol upon it resembles the image in her eyes, a declaration and a rejection alike.\nThe orphaned live lives filled with suffering from childhood — this she sees and keeps in her heart.\nAs fate casts an examining eye on humanity, so too will humans cast judgment upon fate. Someday, honor, injustice, misery, and tears will be denied alongside the old world. Before that moment comes, the last child of the Crimson Moon will record fate's every sin. ｜ 完成与「仆人」的决斗后，在废墟中拾起的耳钉。\n红色的符号如同她眼中的图案，既是申敕也是否决。\n失怙失恃的孩子们自幼就蒙受诸般苦难，这些她都记在心底。\n命运审视人间，亦将有人审视命运。终有一日，荣耀、不公、苦厄与泪水都将伴着旧世界一同被否定。裁断命运的时刻到来前，赤月的末裔也将忠实记录命运的一切罪状。
- Titu ｜ 蒂图
- Mr. Asfand! ｜ 阿斯法德先生！
- *sigh* But I'm nowhere near as powerful as Jean. ｜ 唔…不过，我可没有琴大人那样的力量。
- Uh... I mean, isn't measuring their value in Mora the easiest way? This also matches the traditions of Liyue, does it not? ｜ 这、这…文物的价值，用摩拉来衡量，不是最直白吗！也很符合璃月的传统吧！
- Ah, it's you guys! ｜ 啊，是你们！
- I was worried that something may have happened to you. So I went outside to check, and caught sight of my master. ｜ 我担心你们出事，到外面找你们，正好看到了师父的身影。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 击败所有敌人

- Huh. Why's Azariq just up and leaving on us like that? Isn't he gonna go deeper into the ruins with us? ｜ 欸…为什么阿萨里格大哥突然离开了，他不跟我们继续深入遗迹了吗…？

- Aww, that's so nice! She's doing a whole new performance for everyone who couldn't attend last time! ｜ 呜哇！云堇专门唱给你们这些错过的人听呢！

- How is it, Dad? Are you feeling any better now? ｜ 怎么样，爸爸？心情是不是好些了呢？
- Chase the Treasure Hoarders away for Kiminami Anna ｜ 帮助木南杏奈赶走盗宝团

- Do you say that every year? ｜ 你该不会年年都这么说吧？
- Just look at you! Could it be that you're a lapdog of the Dendro Archon? ｜ 瞅你这样子，难道是草神的走狗吗？
- Looking for a way out. ｜ 我只是在寻找出去的办法罢了。
- Scholar's Lens ｜ 学士的镜片
- Meow? ｜ 喵？

- Agreed. Allow me to explain. ｜ 嗯，还是让我来说明吧。

- Come on, gotta find that weak spot... ｜ 弱点在哪…
- Hey, Gaming, we're over here! ｜ 嘉明——我们在这边！
- Aha, traveler! ｜ 哟，是旅行者啊！
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- So... One day when I was gazing out to see, something in me just snapped. I just took the nearest vessel I could find and set out to sea. ｜ 因此，又一次遥望大海的时候…我就临时起意，捆了一艘小木筏，就这样出海啦。
- The scenery perfectly recreates the lively atmosphere found in the festivals of Inazuma.\nInazuma City holds several festivals each year, but the biggest, most memorable ones often fall during the middle of summer. The food stalls, games, and fireworks in the night sky will make visitor linger a little longer. The stalls may disappear after the last day, but the good times shared with companions will last forever. ｜ 热闹非凡的祭典，完美复现了稻妻传统节庆的情景。\n稻妻城每年都会举办多次祭典，但份量最重，最令人们心心念念的数场祭典，大多会在盛夏时节举办。贩售料理的屋台、趣味昂然的游戏，还有夜空中的绚烂焰火，会令每个到场的游客流连忘返。同行伙伴的容姿和耳畔低语的话音，也会被深深刻入回想。
- Price cut, price cut! Once they're gone, I'm gone! It's now or never, so don't miss out! ｜ 降价了降价了，卖完就走，现在就是最后机会！
- Primo Geovishap Challenge Event Character DMG Boost ｜ 古岩龙蜥挑战活动角色伤害提升

- Well then. Let's do this. ｜ 好了，我们上吧。
- Mualani ｜ 玛拉妮

- Hmph, "traveling around"? ...I'm sure there's more to it than that, but I won't press you. ｜ 哼，到处旅行…不肯说就算了，我不会追问的。
- So cold... It hurts... ｜ 好冷…好痛…

- "The specifics of the game are a little unclear to me, and I've only watched my brother play... - She seems to take a lot of pride in her mechanical gizmos, so it's probably best if Paimon doesn't go changing the name willy-nilly. ｜ 机关里说不定寄托了制作者的心意，还是不随便修改人家想好的名字了。
- She's still alive, and she's doing great. ｜ 她还活着，过得很好。
- The firewood got wet... a big hole got gouged in the bottom of the pot, and while I was plating up, I was hit by some flying stones from out of nowhere... One of them even bounced onto my head. Now that one really hurt! ｜ 生火的柴被打湿啦…锅底被铲了个大洞啦…装盘时被不明飞石砸中啦这些…有一个还弹到了我的脑袋上，挺痛的！
- My judgment... has failed... ｜ 审判，失败了…
- Yoimiya's Message ｜ 宵宫的留言
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "The Fruit Farmer's Thrift."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『果农的勤俭』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- That must be the guy Ayaka told us about. Let's go over and see! ｜ 那位想必就是绫华所说的人了，我们快过去看看吧！
- Yeah! We should be able to go to the upper level to see King Deshret's throne now. ｜ 嗯！这下应该可以去上层见识一下赤王的「御座」了。

- When Rosaria unleashes her Elemental Skill, she sprints behind her target and strikes with her polearm, dealing Cryo DMG.\nWith her Elemental Burst, she performs a sweeping horizontal strike against surrounding opponents before summoning an Ice Lance of coalesced cold, which strikes the ground.\nWhile the Ice Lance is on the field, it intermittently releases waves of cold, dealing Cryo DMG to nearby opponents.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 罗莎莉亚释放元素战技时，会冲刺至目标后方，挥舞手中的长枪，造成冰元素伤害。\n她的元素爆发在横扫身边的敌人之后，能凝聚出极寒的冰枪刺入大地。\n冰枪在存在期间内，会间歇性释放寒气，仍会对附近的敌人造成冰元素伤害。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。
- Hehe, so it's decided then? I'll have every stone in its proper place by the time you arrive! ｜ 嘿嘿，那就说好了哦？我会细心安放好每块石头的位置，等你来的！
- You obtained power? ｜ 获得了力量？
- My worry is that we won't be able to find her. Honestly, it'd save me a lot of trouble if she were to show up on her own. ｜ 我正愁找不到她。她要是这么轻易就出现，我也省了很多事。
- It's nothing... ｜ 没什么…

- R—Really, what a shame. But anyway, shouldn't you be getting back now to warn your friends? ｜ 是吗，真可惜。不过你现在是不是应该先回去，提醒你的朋友了？

- We need more glue... ｜ 胶水得再多点…
- Arataki Itto closes the door. ｜ 荒泷一斗关上了门。

- A <color=#FFE14BFF>Driving Storm</color> will appear at intervals in the area. Observe the storm's direction and use it to swiftly push Roaming Spirits into the Spirithub and gather them more efficiently. ｜ 区域内将间歇性出现<color=#FFE14BFF>驱灵风暴</color>。观察风暴的方向，利用风暴迅速将游灵推入回归区，即可更高效地完成游灵的搜觅。
- To be honest, I want to know about the past, I want to know how you and mother met each other and fell in love, I want to know what you and mother had been through, the sweet memories and everything else... ｜ 虽然说实话，我很想知道过去发生的事，想知道老爹和母亲是怎样相识又相爱，想知道你们走过了哪些路，看到了怎样的风景…
- Is it that necessary? How hard can it be? ｜ 有这么难吗？应该不难吧？
- "Ah, Jami, well done! A student I am proud of, indeed!" ｜ 「贾米，你做的好哇，不愧是我最骄傲的学生！」
- A base based on the wilderness in Mondstadt. The lush grass is like a pale carpet that seems to spread endlessly with the wind. The small flowers have a signature color of Windwheel Asters. ｜ 以蒙德境内的原野为原型的「茵席」。葱郁的草地如同苍色的地毯，似能随风无垠蔓延。细碎的小花则有着风车菊般标志性的色彩。
- Safe zones and new Prosperous Teabricks are about to appear... ｜ 安全区域与新的「长青茶饼」即将出现…
- See you. ｜ 再见。

- Haha, I appreciate it. You may call me conceited for this, but I would also like to think I'm talented enough to be able to lead a decent life without compromising my pride. ｜ 哈哈，多谢了。其实，我比一般人自负，我还相信自己能在不放弃骄傲的前提下把生活过好。
- If it is not important, please move along. If you need anything, please seek the Matriarch or Jeht. ｜ 如无要事请通过吧，如有要事请去找主母或者婕德。
- Investigate the clues we discovered. ｜ 调查发现的线索。
- A fabric band dyed indigo by the darkness of night. Can also double as a bandage in the event of an emergency. ｜ 被夜色染得靛青的织物。能在紧急时充当绷带。
- Well, now I can say I've definitely drunk enough! ｜ 哼哼，我已经喝得饱饱的了！
- I have, of course, asked for the help of the Adventurers' Guild, but I have received no news from any adventurer so far... ｜ 虽然我已经拜托了冒险家协会帮忙，但冒险家们也一直也没给我点消息…
- If you're not happy about it, why don't you file a complaint at Yujing Terrace? ｜ 降魔大圣若是不满意，不如改日去玉京台，告她一状如何？
- Time to get back to Vanarana... Golden Nara should visit too. ｜ 该回去了，桓那兰那…金色的那菈也要去看看呀。
- Stonehide Lawachurl ｜ 丘丘岩盔王
- If you're interested in botanical evolution, you should visit the Akademiya. They'll have more on the subject. ｜ 如果你对植物演化感兴趣，就去教令院吧，那里的植物学教育更加完备。
- Mimi tomo! Mosi mita? ｜ Mimi tomo! Mosi mita?
- A door frame made from Aralia Wood that has the same design as the front gate of the Police Station. This door frame has its own unique design, which is said to invoke the "storm clouds" and represent the great ability of the station to keep the peace all over the land of thunder, and thus speak of its ability to deal with many matters in Inazuma City itself.\nThat said, few citizens actually pay much attention to these design features. Rather, it is the birds that seem to enjoy nesting in such places, a fact that has given any Doushin in charge of clean up a world of trouble. ｜ 由「孔雀木」制成的门框，与奉行所的庭院正门有着相同的设计。门框顶部设有独特的弧形构造，据说有着「雷云」之意，代表奉行所的治安之能上达雷云之底，遍及雷之国的全境，处理稻妻城内各项事务，自然不在话下。\n不过，很少有民众在意这一设计，反倒是有些鸟雀喜欢在此筑巢，给负责打扫的同心添了不少麻烦。
- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param7:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param7:P}
- If I continue winning like this, I'll finally be able to claim the title of king of Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 只要能这样接连不断地取得胜利，最后，我一定能够成为「七圣召唤」的王者吧。
- Either will do. Upon their return, there will be no desert, no pain, no Samiel-Control Engineers, no Bimarstan doctors. ｜ 哪个都行吧，让沙漠消失，病痛消失，防沙工程师失业，健康之家的医生也失业…
- Dropped by Lv. 60+ Fatui Agents ｜ 60级以上愚人众·债务处理人掉落
- Yes, the chef is unwilling to delegate tasks to others. He's overconfident about his own cooking abilities, and tries to accomplish everything on his own. ｜ 大厨不愿将深爱的事业交给伙计，又过于信任自身手艺，凡事都要亲力亲为。
- Hehe, not at all. Just tell me more about your adventures when you next get the chance. ｜ 呵呵，不会不会，等以后有机会，多给我讲讲你们的冒险故事就好。
- A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven. ｜ 从世界之外漂流而来的旅行者，被神带走血亲，自此踏上寻找七神之路。
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- What... a Doushin! Today is the worst! ｜ 怎么还…还有同心！今天真是倒霉…
- You plebeians miss the point. All the same, the state of this place tells me that she shall not hold out long by herself. How pitiful... ｜ 不懂修辞的俗人，哼。说回正事，虽然从此地的现状来看，她多半是早已独木难支了吧。哎呀呀。
- The savings we worked so hard our whole lives to build up, decimated just like that. All we want now is a chance to start over. ｜ 我们辛辛苦苦半辈子，所有积累都变成了泡影。现在我们只想要一个改过自新的机会。
- Ooh, are you going further in? Take me with you! Please? ｜ 你准备继续深入秘境吗？带上我行不行？
- But if the treasure was all you cared about, why plant all those explosives? Wouldn't they just destroy the treasure, and bury you along with it? ｜ 如果只是为了宝藏的话，为什么要放这些炸药？这不是会把你自己也埋了吗？
- Marvelous Merchandise Event Description ｜ 百货奇货规则介绍
- When you put it that way, even I'm starting to feel a little worried... Alright, let's go. We've been here long enough, and the boys are as chatty as the floor. ｜ 你这么说，我都好像有点担心了…走吧走吧，反正这里早就待够了，这两个人也一直不说话…
- Oh, it's you... I was just looking through the various commissions that have come in to the Guild. ｜ 是你啊…我只是在看协会每天接受的委托而已。
- The relevant people have been informed, so when the time comes, I will put the word out and increase the intensity of our advertising. ｜ 相关的人员也联络好了，等到时机合适了，我就会开始投放广告，加大宣传的力度。
- Okay, I'm going to look for some Small Lamp Grass in the area. ｜ 那我先去附近采一些小灯草来。
- Alright. Find a way to repair the aqueducts first. ｜ 嗯，先想办法修好水道吧。

- This seems to be a special biological device made by some ancient civilization in Fontaine, created for various types of training.\nWhen activated, it generates visible sound waves that can detect <color=#FFE14BFF>invisible objects</color> nearby... ｜ 似乎是古时在枫丹的文明基于各种目的培育的特殊生物装置。\n在激活后，能够发出可视的声波，寻找附近<color=#FFE14BFF>不可视的事物</color>…

- Whoa! This guy's head is so twisted... Paimon doesn't care if you believe us or not — we've always been bleeding hearts anyway. We didn't do it for Mora, but you at least owe us a "thank you"! ｜ 哇这人的心理怎么这么扭曲…不管你信不信，我们就是老好人啦。而且就算没有摩拉，讲道理，你应该说句谢谢才对！

- ...I see. ｜ …这样啊。

- Hmph, maybe in the flying squad, but they don't give a hoot about the rest of us! ｜ 哼，是你们飞行队的伙伴才对吧？它们可从没把我们放在眼里！

- The following effect will trigger every 10s: The equipping character will gain <color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color> of their Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK for 12s, with nearby party members gaining 30% of this buff for the same duration. Multiple instances of this weapon can allow this buff to stack. This effect will still trigger even if the character is not on the field. ｜ 每10秒，产生如下效果：基于装备者的元素精通的<color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>，提升该角色的攻击力，并基于该提升的30%为队伍中附近的其他角色提升攻击力，持续12秒，多件同名武器产生的此效果可以叠加。角色处于队伍后台时也能触发效果。
- Um... I'd rather not talk about him, if that's okay? Oh, no — the General Mahamatra isn't a bad guy or anything. Matter of fact, I have him to thank for bringing me back from Mondstadt to Sumeru and finding me a safe place to stay. It's just that... whenever I'm reminded of the sealing process just before leaving Mondstadt... ooh... the back of my neck starts hurting again... ｜ 欸…我们能不提他吗？不，大风纪官不是什么坏人，当初就是他带着我从蒙德回到了须弥，才让我有了安身的地方。只是一想起回须弥前那个「封印」的过程…唔…脖子后边又开始觉得痛了…
- Mm-hmm! ｜ 嗯嗯！
- There are no shortage of devious people who are willing to take advantage of these festivities to mask their own nefarious deeds. ｜ 想趁热闹浑水摸鱼做坏事的人可不是少数呢。
- Let's duel. May both our rolls be lucky. ｜ 开局吧，希望我们两人都有好骰运。
- Asilah ｜ 艾希拉
- You don't have to try so hard... ｜ 不用这么拼吧…
- Heh, Uncle Rocher cares deeply about you, Madame. ｜ 嘿嘿，罗谢大叔还是很在意夫人的啦。
- I defeated a Fatui Harbinger. ｜ 击败过愚人众的执行官。
- Zzz... Zzz... ｜ 呼…呼…
- Yep... we're definitely faring a lot better than this poor guy on the ground... ｜ 对，怎么说都比趴在地上这位过得好多了…
- No worries, Aragaru got this! Aragaru can use Kusava to crack the rock open. ｜ 别急，让我来吧！用「苦舍桓」让大石头裂开吧！
- You can make as many mundane weapons as you like, and they would all be meaningless. That's the life of a blacksmith, not that of a weaponsmith. ｜ 平庸的兵器造再多也毫无意义。埋头打铁的是铁匠，不是武器铸造师。
- Consumable ｜ 消耗品
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh, novels in Fontaine have weirdly long names. This one's called "Do Clockwork Meka Dream of Cogwheel Chiropractors?"\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But the writing style and themes are pretty different from Inazuma's light novels.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>According to the synopsis, this novel is about a clockwork meka experiencing back pain due to bending over for extended periods. It finally gives in, quits its job as an illustrator, then goes on a long journey looking for a chiropractor to cure its mechanical spine...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>That actually sounds pretty interesting.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>But why a chiropractor, though? Wouldn't an engineer do the job better? They could just go to the Fontaine Research Institute, and save themselves the long journey.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Well yeah, but... Having met some of the engineers from the institute, Paimon can see why they wouldn't want to...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Oh yeah, that's true. But anyway, even though the protagonist of the story is a clockwork meka, you can still tell that it was written by a human. Imagine if they got a real clockwork meka to write a novel... I wonder what they'd write about?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hmm... How about this: "I Awoke One Morning and Found Myself Human!"\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hey, that's a good one, Paimon. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔，《发条机关会梦见齿轮正骨师吗？》枫丹也有些标题很长很奇怪的小说呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过和稻妻的轻小说相比，写法和题材好像都有些不一样。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我看看简介，故事讲述因为长期弓身导致背脊疼痛的发条机关，终于不堪重负放弃了绘制报纸插画的工作，四处寻找能够拯救它机械背脊的按摩师…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听上去还蛮有意思的嘛。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>可是也太奇怪了，这个发条机关为什么要找按摩师，为什么不直接找那些工程师帮它处理，比如…嗯，枫丹科学院的工程师？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呃，不过，枫丹科学院的工程师感觉都有些…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那倒也是。哎，虽然这个故事是以发条机关为主角，不过一看就知道还是人写的啦。如果真的让发条机关执笔的话，会写出什么样的故事呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我想想…《一觉醒来，变成肉做的人！》\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>噢，派蒙很有想象力嘛。

- True, but Paimon feels these researchers always hide behind the pretense of "pursuing knowledge"... ｜ 话是这么说没错啦，但是总觉得这帮学者，把追求知识这四个字当做面具在用…
- I've heard that there's someone named Vahid who sells specialty fertilizer in Ritou. It's said to be a local specialty from Sumeru. ｜ 虽然我听说，离岛那边有一个叫瓦希德的人正在卖特色化肥，还说什么…是有须弥特色的特色化肥。
- Hmm, maybe some of your neural circuitry is less intact than I thought... ｜ 还是说，你的脑袋回路，果然还是出了些问题呢…
- ... ｜ ……
- #Then this must be the renowned {NICKNAME}? ｜ #那这位就是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}了吧。
- Give the present to Viktor ｜ 将礼物带给维克多
- Unyielding Rocks: Left ｜ 磐固山石·左
- Go to the event page to view your Navigation Guide ｜ 请前往活动界面查看「航行指引」
- Good Sign ｜ 好兆头
- Frigid Regimen ｜ 寒稽古
- Oh, get off my case. ｜ 去你的。
- International Trade Association Advertisement ｜ 「万国商会」广告
- Striking Hound: Thunderous Force ｜ 犬突·动如雷
- It was in a cave in the mountains! I ducked inside to get out of the rain and saw an offering table in there, so I put the Cornbread Buns I'd brought with me on it. ｜ 嗯，我和锅巴是在一个山洞里遇到的！那天我到山洞里躲雨，看见里面有供桌，就放了随身带的辣肉窝窝头上去…
- Don't worry, you two. With us around, our base is definitely secure. ｜ 二位放心，有我们在，据点绝对安全。
- You are not Ororon. Who are you? ｜ 你不是欧洛伦。你是谁？
- Your eyes are sparkling. ｜ 眼睛都亮起来了。
- A cup carved out of ice that is as chilly and biting as winter. Its former master would drink an unfreezable liquor from it. ｜ 用寒冰雕制成的杯盏，如冬天一般坚利。曾经的主人从中啜饮过不冻之酒。
- Complete "The Rainbow Destined to Burn" ｜ 完成「命定将焚的虹光」剧情
- Me? Oh— I'm looking for a very dodgy person. ｜ 找？哦…我正在找一个可疑的家伙。
- My good friend! ｜ 我的好朋友哦！
- Enhanced Repelling Fist DMG|{param1:F1P} Normal Attack DMG ｜ 强化斥逐拳伤害|{param1:F1P}普通攻击伤害
- Um... The gear doesn't quite... look right. ｜ 呃…这齿轮看着好像…不太对啊。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Aralia "Fusen" Cupboard.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「孔雀木『不染』橱柜」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- The strange thing is that they turned to meteors all of a sudden, and fell from the sky... Why this happened I am not yet sure. I need some time. ｜ 奇怪的是，不知为何，它们化作陨石坠落了…原因暂时还不清楚，给我一点时间。
- Every home's character is unique to its owner. It's not a question of good or bad, just... personality. ｜ 人们家里总是会留下只有主人才能布置出的感觉，来别人家看的不是别的，是性格。
- Going from admiration to assessment will take a lot of time and specialized knowledge. And I'm afraid that some superficial speed training won't be enough to take you there. ｜ 两者之间存在巨大鸿沟，需要用海量专业知识去填补。那种肤浅的教材帮不上什么忙。
- If it wasn't for you asking me for sugar, I would have forgotten about all these things. Why would it be like this... ｜ 如果不是因为你问我要糖，这些事情，我应该早就全忘了才对。为什么会这样呢…
- Wafting from Afar ｜ 香飘十里
- Keqing, can you spare the time? ｜ 刻晴有空吗？
- Cipher Letter (V) ｜ 密图函·其五
- Hehe... On that note, think we should take a closer look around? You never know when we'll find something nice. ｜ 嘿嘿…不然，我们再仔细去周围看看？说不定真会有什么收获呢。
- Indeed. I... I also feel pretty bad about the whole thing, so I often send them snacks as a token of my gratitude. ｜ 是啊。我也…我也挺不好意思的，也经常寄些特产零食过去，作为答谢。
- Then you'll finally understand. ｜ 你肯定能理解的。
- The current disguises in this Contested Zone are: <color=#FFCC33>hay rolls and wooden crates</color>.\nThe clarion calls of conflict have been sounded in this small sleepy town by the resistance.\nThe complicated terrain, rolls of hay, and haphazardly-placed wooden crates can help the Rebels get through this trying time.\nBut the path that runs from the north to the south of the village is narrow indeed, and there is a high chance of running into a Hunter, so it is best to exercise caution! ｜ 当前「周旋之地」中的伪装物：<color=#FFCC33>干草卷、木箱</color>。\n宁静的小镇中，反抗组织吹响了斗争的号角。\n错综复杂的地势，干草卷和散乱堆放的木箱，都能协助游侠们撑过危险时间。\n但贯通小镇南北的道路极为狭窄，有可能与猎手迎面相遇，请务必谨慎通行！
- Head to the place where the "end" awaits ｜ 前往「结局」所在之地
- Paimon almost forgot! Didn't Zhongli say Hu Tao was also planning on spending some time in Qiaoying Village? ｜ #对了，{NICKNAME}！你还记得吗，钟离说过胡桃最近想去翘英庄玩？
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is a mysterious melody from Natlan. ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含着来自纳塔的神秘旋律。
- That's Pir Kavikavus, all right! A paragon of genius! ｜ 迦毗鸠师不愧是迦毗鸠师，天才不愧是天才！
- I'm okay with the deaths of enemies, but now that we're allies, I'm against the meaningless loss of our own. ｜ 如果是敌人，死在这里我也毫无意见，可你们是同伴，我反对己方阵营遭到这种损耗。
- Great! Thanks for helping. ｜ 那就太好了，谢谢你愿意帮忙。
- Wow, a coincidence. Mine does too! ｜ 巧了，我也是。
- Have you brought the meal to those little ones? ｜ 汝等已经把饭带给那些小家伙了吗？
- I'm just here to watch Noelle train. ｜ 就是来看看诺艾尔练剑。
- Cannot publish Domain in current state ｜ 当前状态无法发布秘境
- You did WHAT? How could you!? They were my carrier pigeons! ｜ 喂！你做了什么，这些鸽子都是用来寄信的！
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- A little something, yeah. ｜ 还行吧。
- Use the power of Dendro to "awaken" the Golden Rose ｜ （test）用草元素的力量「唤醒」金蔷薇
- Tales of the past remain radiant even now. ｜ 早已过去的故事，如今也在熠熠生辉。

- Obtain Vermillionite from the Ruin Hunter ｜ 从遗迹猎者处获取霞生石
- Have a wonderful excursion. ｜ 一路平安。
- All I remember is seeing a flash of fire... but I felt safe. I only saw his silhouette but it felt so... familiar. ｜ 就只记得…令人感到安心的火光，莫名有些亲切的背影…

- It's almost time for tea. What should I eat? ｜ 喝茶的时间快到了，吃什么比较好呢…
- Hehe, see? What did I tell ya? Just trust my instincts. ｜ 哈哈哈，相信本大爷的直觉就行了！
- 30% ｜ 30%
- Layla and Yae Miko go off to play with their Fungi. ｜ 莱依拉和八重神子带着蕈兽去远处玩耍了。
- Activate Solidification Process ｜ 启动固化
- #Well! There's no time to lose, kind {M#sir}{F#lady}! I'll go find my supervisor and request the key to the central processing station! Please wait for me! ｜ #总之，事不宜迟，好心的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我这就去找主管申请中枢处理站的钥匙，请您稍微等我一下！
- A sundial that has survived the ages, always silently recording the cycles of the sun and moon as they pass through the sky. ｜ 饱经沧桑的时晷，永远在静默地记录着日月循环。
- Recipe: Panipuri ｜ 食谱：绿汁脆球

- Jafar has the ingredients ready and starts cooking... ｜ 贾法尔拿出其它食材开始烹饪…
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon, over here! I've found something interesting! ｜ #{NICKNAME}和派蒙，请过来一下！我发现了有意思的东西！
- That's kinda spooky. ｜ 好邪门。
- Let's have a look at our production record... ｜ 查看商品目录…
- Failed to complete the trial... ｜ 没能完成试炼…
- Uh... ｜ 唔…
- Come on in! ｜ 进来坐坐吧！
- Uh, Mualani... ｜ 玛拉妮，那个…
- Hey! ...Paimon didn't quite get the implication, but Paimon can tell when you're being a meanie! ｜ 啊——！完全不懂你的意思，总觉得是在欺负我！
- You are? With that outfit... You're the Traveler, right? Sorry, I'm just a little homesick... ｜ 你是？这身打扮…你就是旅行者吧。抱歉，我就是有点想家了…
- Oh, oh! And the "Ray-more-young Golems" Mountain was just talking about sound really, really cool too! I wonder if they're bigger than Bluey? ｜ 还有还有，大山刚才说的「累牡蛎牙魔像」，听上去好像很有趣！不知道和阿蓝比起来哪个更大呢？
- Sabotage the Slime Balloon ｜ 摧毁史莱姆气球
- Stop trying to talk your way out of it! I will never believe your lies! ｜ 你就不用在这里卖弄你的唇舌了！我是不会相信你的鬼话的。
- How should the recipient of this gift envelope be addressed... ｜ 对于会收到这份祝柬的人，应当用何称呼…
- I found some near the entrance of the blacksmith's. However, they don't look all that good, which is probably why the blacksmith didn't mind giving them to me. ｜ 我在铁匠铺门口捡到过几块矿石，不过，它们的品质都不太好，铁匠师傅觉得送给我都无所谓。
- Increases all party members' Geo DMG by 25% for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色岩元素伤害提升25%，持续300秒。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- How can you call this fishing when you're using a fully automatic rod!? ｜ 用自动鱼竿钓鱼，还算钓鱼吗？！
- Those two can run so fast when they're motivated. We'd better catch up! ｜ 一旦有了干劲，这两个人就跑得好快，我们快追上去吧。
- See you later, and stay safe. ｜ 请慢走，要注意安全哦。
- After I met Dopey Dazzler, she invited me to do graffiti together with her, but... Don't get me wrong, I love those pretty patterns. I just don't think I have the talent to come up with anything interesting. ｜ 认识「炫彩呆子」以后，她邀请我一起去涂鸦。我喜欢那些漂亮的图案，但好像没什么天分，想不出有意思的画面。
- Dynamic Skin Exchange ｜ 影幻牌面兑换
- Guest Challenge: Lynette ｜ 来客挑战：琳妮特
- A reasonable inference. I agree. ｜ 合理的推测，我同意。
- Ah... sorry. Paimon will try to stay quiet, hehe. ｜ 对不起，我小声一点。
- (These two idiots! Time to move...) ｜ （这两个呆瓜，该出发了…）
- Err, maybe the Corps of Thirty just didn't have anyone available? Or maybe someone recommended us? I've never given it too much thought... ｜ 「三十人团」人手有限，或者是有熟人介绍，我之前没细想…
- Alright, break time is over, let's get ready to move! ｜ 准备动身吧，休息的时间结束咯。
- We'd vowed to become the greatest adventurers in the world, just like his legendary grandfather. ｜ 那个时候我们约定要一起成为世界上最厉害的冒险家，就像他那个传奇的祖父一样。
- Every corner of Dunyu Ruins is filled with ancient vestiges, suspended in time inside the dead lake.\nWithout a doubt, there is still a large amount of treasure of unknown origin yet to be discovered. ｜ 诸多古时的遗迹遍布在遁玉陵各个角落，它们的时间静止在了止水古潭里。\n虽然来历不甚明了，但是毋庸置疑这里还有相当的秘宝有待发现。
- Total Logins <color=#D3BC8EFF>Seize the Day</color> ｜ 累计登录 <color=#D3BC8EFF>把握每日</color>
- David and Goliath ｜ 歌利亚
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Do we have to share our own poems with everyone? ｜ 要和大家分享自己写的诗吗？
- A word of caution, however... The road ahead of you will be fraught with danger and intrigue, so be on your guard. Please stay safe... ｜ 只是啊，孩子…只是前路艰险无比，阴谋密布，你一定要小心探索，注意安全才好…
- Hello, what can I help you with? ｜ 你好，有什么需要帮助的吗？
- All party members gain a 75% Pyro DMG Bonus. ｜ 队伍中所有角色获得75%火元素伤害加成。
- A combination of wooden chests with a rather unique appearance. It is said that three different colored slimes are named "Hey Hey" "Ha Ha" and "Hoo Hoo." The craftsmanship is a bit shoddy, but it creates a rather endearing effect. A common sight within the Veluriyam Mirage, they are often used as decorations, but the staff of various attractions use them to store tools or their personal belongings. In addition, their popularity with guests has led to their inclusion on the list of potential prizes for many attractions.\nHowever, as the latches are rather flimsy, they are not recommended to be used as storage containers, and so are filled with lots of fragrant plants and anti-moisture barriers, so that it can be used as an interior decoration without need for long-term maintenance. ｜ 造型独特的木箱组合，据说三种颜色的史莱姆分别名为「嘿嘿」、「哈哈」和「唔唔」，做工不算精致，但却有着独特的可爱观感。作为「琉形蜃境」中较为常见的陈设，这种木箱组合既能起到装饰的作用，又能收纳游乐项目的工具和员工的个人物品。由于深受游客们的喜爱，又被加入了游乐项目的奖品清单。\n不过，由于木箱的开合机构较为脆弱，送给客人的版本并不能作为储物箱使用，而是在其中加入了大量香气浓烈的植物和防潮材料，以便客人将其当作纯粹的房间饰品，长期摆放也无需费心打理。
- The ink bottle has a fearsome power. ｜ 墨水瓶里拥有可怕的权力。
- Sacred Seal: Precipice ｜ 圣章石·峭崖
- Starlight Slug DMG|{param1:F1P} Max HP ｜ 星光弹伤害|{param1:F1P}生命值上限
- Guard Captain & Sensible Conservative Citizen ｜ 卫兵队长&沉稳的保守派
- But even though we're all well-acquainted by now, I think this festive gathering deserves something ceremonious. ｜ 不过虽说都是熟人，但过节聚餐，仪式感的东西还是要搞一些的。
- Anemo DMG Bonus|{param2:F1P} ｜ 风元素伤害加成|{param2:F1P}
- Kautilya... Everyone's eager to try them out for themselves. There's no need to delve into all the details right now. ｜ 考特里亚，大家都跃跃欲试呢，眼下不必解释得这么细致。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Lyney does a flourish with his hat, unleashing a firework surprise!\nWhen used, he will clear all current Prop Surplus stacks and deal <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> to opponents in front of him. DMG will be increased according to the stacks cleared, and this will also regenerate Lyney's HP based on his Max HP.\n\nWhen a Grin-Malkin Hat created by Lyney is on the field, the fireworks will cause it to explode, dealing <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> equal to that of a Pyrotechnic Strike.\nThe DMG dealt through the Grin-Malkin Hat in this way is considered Charged Attack DMG.\n\n<i>"Everyone knows that magicians will intentionally misdirect the audience... Ah, yes, while you were looking my way, the hat and assistant over there have both disappeared... Fascinating, is it not?"</i> ｜ 林尼挥动礼帽，引爆惊喜的礼花。\n施放时，将清除已有的「隐具余数」，对前方的敌人造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。根据清除的层数，提升造成的伤害，并基于林尼的生命值上限为林尼恢复生命值。\n\n场上存在林尼自己创造的怪笑猫猫帽时，礼花将使其猛烈爆炸，造成等同于礼花术弹伤害的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。\n通过这种方式引爆怪笑猫猫帽造成的伤害视为重击伤害。\n\n<i>「众所周知，魔术师经常用的手法就是故意引导观众的注意力…对，在你看向这边的同时，那边的帽子和助手就都不见了，怎么样，很有趣吧。」</i>
- Luxurious Chest ｜ 华丽的宝箱
- Aw, come on, don't be like that! ｜ 欸，别这样呀！
- I have high hopes, though. This seems like Miko's style, so I'm sure the stories are very entertaining. ｜ 但我还是很期待的，感觉这很像神子的风格，一定很有趣。
- Adventurer's Entrance Exam ｜ 冒险家的入门考试
- Realm Currency maxed out ｜ 洞天宝钱已达上限
- Faithful Hourglass ｜ 忠实的砂时计
- The last fishing spot is near Vimara Village. A much safer place for fishing. Let's get moving. ｜ 最后一个…垂钓点就在维摩庄附近，那边比较安全，我们赶紧过去吧。
- S—So that's it... ｜ 原、原来是这样…
- That person then condensed this "blessing" into your name, and gave it to you as a gift. ｜ 那个人将这「祝福」浓缩成了你们的「名字」，再赠予给了你们。
- A secret mantra? Oh, no, no. I was just reading the annotations in this book, "Chronicle of Cleansing Ink." ｜ 秘诀？哈哈哈，不是不是，我刚才只是在读这本《洗墨录》里的注释。
- Phew, we made it out. Dunno if we'll still be needing this clockwork key, but I yoinked it out before we ran, just in case! ｜ 呼，总算逃出来了。虽然发条不知道还有没有用，总之我跑路前先捎上了！
- After all, everybody excels at different things, and the work they can take on also differs. ｜ 毕竟每个人所擅长的事情不同，所能负担的工作也不一样。
- Well then, there you go! Those sort of headlines become old news faster than you can read them. Surely a bit of tabloid drama isn't worth cutting off my supply? ｜ 那不就得了，人们没多久就会感到腻烦。用得着连时装周的饰品都不给我吗？
- Charge Level 2 DMG|{param5:F1P} DEF ｜ 二段蓄力伤害|{param5:F1P}防御力
- Your bones are still holding you up, then? ｜ 身子骨还硬朗着吗？
- Traveler, great timing! I was just looking to ask you something. ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}！你来得正好，我有事情想问你！
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P}+{param6:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P}+{param6:F1P}
- May wisdom accompany you throughout your journey. ｜ 愿智慧与您的旅途始终相伴。
- Uh, not even close. ｜ 唉，根本不对。
- Just calm your mind and breathe steadily, you'll fall right asleep. I'll be sure to wake you up in the morning. Goodnight. ｜ 静下心来，平稳呼吸，很快就能入眠。明天早上我会叫你，睡个好觉。
- Maybe my relationships seem like a mess to you... But, it's okay. I won't let any one of them fall by the wayside. ｜ 可能在你看来，我的人际关系简直一团糟…但没关系，未来我会把这些每一件都处理好。
- Still, we haven't seen your partner anywhere. ｜ 不过，怎么没有看见你的搭档呢。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- We have time. What do you wanna talk to us about? ｜ 好是好，不过聊什么呢？
- She even said "Don't show yourself for anything," "If anything happens, it's me using spells to provoke you." Weird, right? ｜ 说什么「绝对不要现身」、「如果发生了什么事，那就是我在用法术挑拨你」之类的，口气很奇怪得很呶。
- Hold CD|{param9:F1}s ｜ 长按冷却时间|{param9:F1}秒
- But that's impossible. It's always avoiding me and keeping me in the dark... And that won't change, even if you're around. ｜ 但是，不可能啦，它就是想躲着我，不让我知道…就算你在也是一样的。
- I see. So it is as I feared. ｜ 这样啊。果真如此。

- I didn't get that, but bring it on anyway. ｜ 虽然听不懂，但是来吧。

- Kinich ｜ 基尼奇
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Bravo, bravo! Thank you for your aid! ｜ 痛快，痛快！谢君相助！
- Little Yu, my dear daughter... By the time you read this, Mommy and Daddy will have already left to go on a long journey. ｜ 小玉，当你看到这封信的时候，爸爸妈妈已经出远门了。
- A portable dish made with rice. It is simple to make and remains delicious at room temperatures, which has made it very popular with civilians and soldiers alike. ｜ 由米饭捏成的便携食物。制作简单，常温食用也无损其美味，因此得到兵士和民众的普遍欢迎。
- Well, I didn't, but I wanted to do something memorable with you, so... I got my friends at the Grand Bazaar to help me learn in secret. ｜ 我原本不会，但我想和你一起做一件很重要的事…就请教了大巴扎的朋友，悄悄练习了一下。
- "This is the very same deck that the main character's nemesis used in King of Invokations!" Isn't this Yae Publishing House editor with the powerful deck just using the match as a pretext to find material that might help the novel's author break through their writer's block? ｜ 「这就是《召唤王》中拦在主角身前的劲敌所使用的牌组！」摆出强大牌组的八重堂编辑，真的不是在以打牌为名，搜罗帮助作者突破创作困境的素材吗？
- Even though I don't think Citlali is the kind of person to turn down an order from the Pyro Archon, working together with us will help her focus and not get distracted by the whole Ororon situation. ｜ 虽然我认为茜特菈莉并不会拒绝来自火神大人的命令，但达成「合作」能让她更加投入，不至于因为欧洛伦的事而分神。
- ...Because of you! It's all because of you! ｜ …是因为你，就是你！
- Understood. ｜ 了解。
- That sounds complicated... ｜ 真复杂…
- Is there anything else? ｜ 还有什么要求吗？
- ... ｜ .......
- When you went to wake up Nahida, Paimon was listening for any sounds outside. ｜ 你去叫醒纳西妲的这会儿，我一直在门那里偷偷听外面的声音…
- Calls upon "Yuegui: Throwing Mode," a special device created by a certain adeptus to help Yaoyao solve her problems.\nThis skill will be used differently in Holding Mode.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nEnters Aiming Mode to adjust the throw direction.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Yuegui: Throwing Mode</color>\nThrows out White Jade Radishes that will explode upon hitting characters or opponents, dealing <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color> to opponents within a certain AoE, and healing characters within that same AoE based on Yaoyao's Max HP. If a radish does not hit either an opponent or a character, the radish will remain where it is and explode on contact with a character or opponent, or will explode after its duration expires.\nYuegui: Throwing Mode will choose its radish-throw targets.\n·If all nearby characters have more than 70% HP remaining, then it will throw the radish at a nearby opponent.\n·If nearby characters have 70% or less HP remaining, it will throw a radish at the character with the lowest HP percentage remaining. If no opponents exist nearby, Yuegui will also throw White Jade Radishes at characters if they all have more than 70% HP and less than 100% HP remaining. Otherwise, it will throw radishes into the area at random.\n\nA maximum of 2 instances of Yuegui: Throwing Mode can exist at any one time.\n\n<i>"A radish a day keeps trouble away! ... Oh, this isn't about a radish's medical properties, exactly, but it does have some health benefits, yeah!"</i> ｜ 请某位仙人特制的机关「月桂·抛掷型」上阵，帮助瑶瑶解决烦恼。\n长按时将以不同的方式施放。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n进入瞄准状态，调整投掷方向。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>月桂·抛掷型</color>\n会投掷白玉萝卜，白玉萝卜会在命中角色或敌人时炸裂，对一定范围内的敌人造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>，并为其中的角色恢复生命值，回复量受益于瑶瑶的生命值上限；若未命中敌人或角色，白玉萝卜将会留在命中的位置，并在触及角色或敌人时，或持续时间结束时炸裂。\n月桂·抛掷型会依据附近的情况，选择投掷白玉萝卜的目标：\n·附近的角色如果生命值均高于70%，会向附近的一名敌人投掷；\n·附近如果存在生命值低于或等于70%的角色，则会向附近场上生命值百分比最低的角色投掷。若附近不存在敌人，在角色的生命值均高于70%、低于100%时，也会向角色投掷；否则会向周围随意投掷。\n\n同时至多存在2个月桂·抛掷型。\n\n<i>「萝卜上市，郎中无事！啊，这不是说萝卜治百病的意思，不过，多吃萝卜确实有好处！」</i>
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Never mind, what difference is telling you going to make? What're you still doing here anyway? Aren't you supposed to be helping him with something? Go on, on your way! ｜ 算了！说给你听做什么，你还杵在这不走？我师兄不是让你帮忙吗？还不快去！
- A mask once covered in gold leaf. Perhaps it is a relic from some ancient officer of the legions. ｜ 曾经覆以金箔的面具，或许是古时统帅军团之人的遗物。
- It's the Abyss Order! They're here! ｜ 深渊教团的家伙，他们真的来了！
- In the end, that sneaky kitsune pleaded with the Shogun on my behalf, and I was spared. Not only did the Shogun let me live, but she also bestowed upon me the sacred duty of the Protector of the Grove. ｜ 最后还是那个臭狐狸帮我说情，将军才网开一面。不但放吾辈一条生路，还赐我「保生司正」之职。
- Let's talk in the courtyard just outside headquarters. Come with me. ｜ 不如咱们就到骑士团旁边的庭院去吧，随我来。
- Advance Quest progress ｜ 增加任务进度$HIDDEN

- It's Sango's plan. ｜ 这都是社长的嘱咐。
- The Abyss has begun to stir once more, so watch your step... Just like before, restore the Inscription's energy before the power of the Abyss takes effect. ｜ 深渊又开始蠢动了，小心地面…然后，还是那样，在深渊产生影响之前，让铭印的能量恢复。
- Snazzy spot! ｜ 好靓啊！

- A Xiao Lantern made by Dummy. It looks surprisingly intricate... ｜ 阿笨所做的霄灯，看起来意外地有些精致…

- "Cocouik" ｜ 「绿松石」
- Ooh! ｜ 哦哦！好厉害！

- We... ｜ 我们…

- Oh, in that case... We should take you back to Gandharva Ville first. Then we'll look for your dad and tell him where you are. ｜ 啊，那么是不是先带你回化城郭比较好？我们再去找他，转告他你在哪里。

- In my recently issued Post-War Temporary Decree, I included restrictions on the prices of essential everyday goods. These items will ultimately reach the people at a reasonable price. ｜ 在最新的「战后临时法令」中，我限制了必需品的价格上限。这些东西，最终还是会以合理的价格流入民众手里。

- A Genius Invokation TCG Card Back that can be obtained and switched around. They say that card backs with different designs also come with minute differences in make and texture. Some players also make collecting card backs of different styles their pursuit and hobby. ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得并替换的牌背。据说看上去造型各不相同的牌背，其材质与手感也有微妙的差别，也有牌手将搜集不同的牌背作为追求与爱好。
- Explore This World ｜ 探索这个世界
- I hate the dragon, even though I know that these feelings are not good. But I miss Ney. He was like my real brother, just like Al. ｜ 我恨魔龙…虽然，这样的感情很不好。但是，我很想念奈伊哥哥。以前他对我很好，和阿尔哥哥一样，就像真正的哥哥。

- He thinks all mighty people have unique personalities, and prefers to understand what makes them tick and the way they think before properly interacting with them. ｜ 他认为强大的人都有独特的个性，要了解这些人，理解对方的想法后，再和他们深入交流。

- Don't associate with that fellow — you'd not clean that mud and filth off your hands, not even with a tower's worth of pure water. ｜ 您可千万不要和他交往，想把一个烂泥坑清理干净，再倒满清水绝不是一件容易的事。

- A dully gilded catalyst secretly guarded in the Blackcliff Forge. It seems to glow with the very light from the sky. ｜ 黑岩厂中秘藏的金珀法器。其中黯黯绽放着日月星光。

- Wait, does that mean everyone in Sumeru is into puns? Huh, is it because the people are so clever? ｜ 你的意思是，须弥人都很喜欢冷笑话吗？因为那边的天气很热？

- But at the end of the day, Yilong Wharf is a commercial port, and foreign visitors wouldn't understand even if we told them. ｜ 可是遗珑埠毕竟是个商港，你和外国的客人说这些，他们不懂的啦。

- Challenge 3 ｜ 挑战3
- But y'know, it's not as if Paimon really knows the difference between drum types or anything. ｜ 唔，我也分不清不同的鼓有什么区别…

- Flowers and plants? ｜ 花卉？

- We ocean wayfarers fear no battle! Lay on! We'll take 'em all on, and beat 'em too! ｜ 海上的浪客不惧战斗！上啊！把他们全消灭了！
- I believe that this discontent is not meaningless, and that's why I go around exploring dangerous areas. I mean... ｜ 我相信这份不甘的心情并非毫无意义，所以才会不要命地跑去探索那些险地。毕竟呀…

- Folktales tell that once upon a time, there lived an oni named Torachiyo. Torachiyo was a highly skilled warrior, such that it was once said the Torachiyo might dance amid a thousand blades, juunihitoe robes becoming shredded like falling violet petals, and yet not receive a single wound. Yet this oni would eventually betray the Shogun and revolt, becoming shorn of an arm and a horn in the battle before fleeing and slaying itself in a fit of furious madness.\nHearsay holds that the stubborn oni often hold fear and distress in their hearts. That they should fantasize about eternity yet fear the moment, and are apt to become swallowed by terror or anger is their just reward. This mask depicts Torachiyo, fangs bared. ｜ 民话传说中，过去有名鬼人「虎千代」。武艺高强，曾有在刀剑一千柄当中狂舞，被割破的十二单如同菫花般零落，身体却未受一丝伤害的说法。后来却对将军大人露出獠牙，拔刀反叛，被斩下一臂一角后遁逃，最终郁愤发狂，自裁而殁。\n狂言称怀抱执妄之鬼往往内心惊悸而忧患。妄想永恒却恐惧须臾，总会为恐惧与怨怒吞没，是为自业自得。这种面具刻画的就是露出尖牙的虎千代。

- Inazuma, the nation of lightning, is far away across the sea, and can only be reached by boat. We met Kazuha, a native Inazuman traveling with a fleet who'd been wandering the world just like us, and together discussed many things concerning Inazuma. We heard about the Grand Narukami Shrine's Fortune Slips, and how popular they are among believers. We sometimes go draw a slip or two ourselves — when we're feeling lucky, of course! ｜ 雷电的国度稻妻远在海外，只能乘船前往。船队的水手万叶出身稻妻，和我们一样，正在浪游四方，我们聊了许多稻妻的事情。据说鸣神大社的御神签非常受信徒欢迎，我们偶尔也会去求签，看看今日运势如何。

- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。

- My notes... thank goodness, my notes are still intact. ｜ 笔记…笔记…还好没缺页…

- Thank you so much. As for me, I need to head down to that campsite in the foothills to get a bowl of hot soup... ｜ 多谢你了。我得回山下的营地去，好好喝口热汤…
- That... can't be! We just came on an adventure here with her. She couldn't have been alive for so long, could she? ｜ 唔…不对吧，我们明明是和玻娜一路冒险才来到这里的，难不成玻娜已经活了几百年了？
- When I'm wholeheartedly devoted to my work, all of my troubles and even my sense of time seem to just slip away. Hmm, Grand Master Varka did say to me: "Jean, there is no better candidate for this task"... ｜ 全身心投入工作的时候，烦恼和时间会一并被忘却。「你是最适合做这种事情的人选。」…那个时候，大团长法尔伽就是这样对我说的。
- Backed into a corner, huh... ｜ 这边走不通哦。
- I can tell you two are already raring to go, but it'd be best to conserve your energy and get some rest tonight. ｜ 你们两个可真有干劲呢，那今天晚上可要好好休息，养精蓄锐。
- My father's been getting on in years lately, so I asked for a transfer. Now that I'm in a more leisurely department, I finally have time to spend with my family after work. ｜ 我最近因为家父年迈，申请了工作调动，现在转去了十分清闲的部门，工作之余终于有空陪伴家人了。
- Hey, what are you doing!? Quick, stop him! ｜ 喂，你要干什么！快拦住他！
- Yes. I hope that I can learn more beautiful fishing techniques from you two in the future as well. ｜ #嗯，希望之后还有机会向{NICKNAME}老师和派蒙老师学习美丽捕捞技巧。
- Enhance 5-star artifacts a total of {param0} levels ｜ 强化5星圣遗物，累计提升{param0}级
- Nahida, you already knew last night that we didn't break out of the samsara! Why didn't you tell us? ｜ 纳西妲，其实昨晚你就知道「花神诞日的轮回」还是会继续的吧？怎么不直接和我们说呀！
- Enlightened Blessing ｜ 启蜇之祝词
- Default ｜ 默认
- Rock 'n' roll originates in Fontaine and is just starting to find its feet in Liyue Harbor, where Xinyan is pioneering the art.\nEvery night, she slings on her self-built instrument, steps onto her self-constructed stage, and plays her self-composed songs to a crowd of enthusiastic supporters.\nHer music reflects her personality: bold and defiant, loud and proud.\nShe is no virtuoso, but this doesn't bother her dedicated fans one bit as they let loose and enjoy the show, singing their hearts out and shaking off the stress of the day.\nIn the heat of the moment, the fire that leaps from Xinyan's Vision seems ready to turn night into day.\n"She is a rare rock 'n' roll talent and a master performer who really knows how to create an atmosphere," said a review of one of her live shows in The Steambird.\nLiving in Liyue is expensive, especially when you want to enjoy the finer things in life. But as Xinyan would say to those tied down by worldly worries:\n"If you know how to rock, then it's easier to roll." ｜ 摇滚发源于枫丹，在璃月港属于新兴艺术，辛焱则是这门艺术身先士卒的践行者。\n每到夜里，她就会背上亲手做的乐器，站上亲手搭建的舞台，为每一位前来捧场的听众演奏她亲手谱写的乐曲。\n她的曲子正如其人，直爽豪迈，自信骄傲。\n她在音乐上的造诣或许算不上顶尖，但她的忠实观众会忘情地与她一起欢呼，用声音和肢体发泄平日中的烦闷与苦恼。\n当辛焱忘我之时，从她的神之眼迸射出的火焰，像是要带领人们把黑夜点成白昼。\n「一位演奏摇滚的奇才，更是一位演奏气氛的大师。」\n「蒸汽鸟报社」曾经这样评价过她。\n璃月米贵，居大不易。但辛焱会告诉困于尘世冗杂的世人——\n摇滚起来，很容易。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Superfast Hat Trick</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. During the challenge, knock a Pyro Slime into any of the <color=#FFCC33FF>Vine Goals</color> to gain 1 point. Knock a Large Pyro Slime into the goal to gain 5 points. The challenge will be deemed successful when the target score is reached.\n2. During the challenge, the Pyro Slimes and the Large Pyro Slimes will not attack nor die and will continuously affect themselves with Pyro.\n3. During the challenge, there are moving walls that Pyro Slimes and Large Pyro Slimes can bounce off of.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color> \nShikanoin Heizou\n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 超极速帽子戏法</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中将火史莱姆投入任意一个<color=#FFCC33FF>「藤蔓球门」</color>时获得1分，将大型火史莱姆投入时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.挑战中的火史莱姆和大型火史莱姆不会攻击或死亡，持续为自身附着火元素。\n3.挑战中存在移动守门墙，会弹飞碰到的火史莱姆和大型火史莱姆。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n鹿野院平藏\n\n\n

Word has it that they are more than convinced that all things betray, even their own eyes. ｜ 镶有简单装饰的红色绸缎。\n老练的战士能够从对手眼神中的破绽，找到先机。镀金旅团早已失去了可效忠的主，能够相信的只有自己。据说，他们坚信万物皆会背叛，连自己的双眼也不例外。

- Up till today, one can hear Kshahrewar students discuss and speculate about their alumnus Kaveh at the Palace of Alcazarzaray and various parts of the Akademiya. In the hearts of his Darshan-mates, Kaveh is a genius nigh-unparalleled in the last few decades and an architect of great fame. Kaveh has, by his outstanding works, engraved his name into the history of the Akademiya. If you are to meet Kshahrewar students, it wouldn't hurt to listen to them extol his achievements: Single-handedly designing the Palace of Alcazarzaray, renovating the landmark lighthouse of Port Ormos, modifying the port's elevators and cargo-handling structures, his pioneering role in the spatial optimization of the peripheral areas surrounding forests and valleys... The list goes on.\nClad in these achievements, Kaveh has become more than a simple name, but a synonym for achievement in the field of design. Many wish they could have a resume like his: brilliantly talented in school, invited to work in various major construction agencies after graduation, and leaving after several years to do work under his own name.\nAll outsider readings of his life stop here, and almost none know of the hidden truth behind the stories — the truth that Kaveh himself is trying to hide. It is true, of course, that he is an exceptional designer. It is a shame, then, this has not allowed him to live the perfect life that others think he does.\nHe would summarize his past experiences in this way: Misunderstandings are troublesome but inevitable. All people are vulnerable to momentary lapses in judgment and to the influence of rigid labels. For example, their first reaction to "designer" is the fantasy of someone who earns Mora with a flick of their fingers, who becomes famous with but a few strokes of a pen. And when people think about "the arts," the first thing that emerges is the bizarre, unfounded image of some lackadaisical, self-centered soul who swings between bouts of gloom and mania, and who is all too fond of bossing others about.\nKaveh does not fit any such imaginative fantasies. He cannot complete his designs in a single stroke, instead approaching every job earnestly. He dresses like a successful person, but in truth, he does not judge the merit of a project by the remuneration alone. He is principled beyond most other people in Sumeru, believing that "art" is the wellspring of a life in design, and yet does not forsake humanistic purpose or practicality in the process. Indeed, he is willing to make some compromises for these two things. Sometimes, he compromises on rest time, other times it is the ornamentation and trappings of the project... and sometimes it is his own pay.\nAfter many years, he finally succeeded. The Palace of Alcazarzaray was completed, and he returned to Sumeru in glory. His colleagues had naught but praise for the fabled palace atop a large tree, stunned as they were by its designer's astounding imagination. They gorged themselves upon the way in which the structure united architectural function and human narrative into its elegant design values, resulting in luxurious craftsmanship that yet exists as a testament to precision and elegance, rewriting the atmosphere of the surrounding mountainous space with its very presence. No one would say that the Palace of Alcazarzaray was any less than an exceedingly successful experiment.\nThose colleagues, however, were blissfully unaware of how Kaveh went bankrupt over this project due to a mix of personal principle, the vagaries of life, and other problems layered atop one another. After all, the truth — much like the troubled gestation of this success — has remained well-hidden thanks to Kaveh's efforts. ｜ 直到今天，行走在卡萨扎莱宫或教令院各处都有可能听到妙论派学生们对已毕业的前辈卡维的想象和议论。在同校同院学生心中，卡维是近几十年数一数二的妙论派人才，一个赫赫有名的设计师。凭借过人的作品，卡维成功将名字留进了教令院历史。如果有妙论派学生在路边探讨，不妨听听他们数出的卡维的成就：独立设计卡萨扎莱宫、翻修堪称奥摩斯港地标性建筑的古灯塔、改建港口升降机与货物搬运结构系统、率先提出环林及环谷地空间优化方法…等等。\n成就加身，对许多人而言，卡维已不再是个单纯的名字，而是更趋于某种设计师生涯成就的代名词。许多人渴望拥有他那样的履历：在校时展现出优异才能，毕业后被各大建筑机构邀请入职，又于数年后离开团体以个人名义工作。\n世俗的解读无非停留于此，藏在成就背后的真相和往事几乎无人知晓，而那正是卡维一直在隐藏的东西。他当然是个很好的设计师，可惜，就算是这样的他也没能过上人们想象中的完美生活。\n结合卡维过往经验，他会说：误会是永远无法避免的麻烦。人在一些时刻难免失去判断，被呆板的标签影响，例如听说「设计师」，第一反应都是动动手指轻松赚钱、简单挥笔涂几下就能功成名就之类的白日梦，而听说「艺术」二字，眼前更会浮现出吊儿郎当、自我中心、性格或阴沉或狂躁、酷爱颐指气使等一系列不知从何而来的古怪印象。\n卡维本人并不符合上述想象。他做不到大笔一挥就完成设计，总是诚挚对待每一份设计工作；他打扮得像个成功人士，实际上却从不单纯以报酬多少论项目好坏；他对设计的原则远超须弥绝大部分人，视「艺术」为设计生命的源泉，又不为此丢弃人文意义与实用性，为此，甚至在项目过程中让渡一些事物，有时是休息时间，有时是艺术装饰效果，有时则是自己的酬劳。\n积累多年，卡维成功了。艾尔卡萨扎莱宫问世后，他名满须弥。同行为巨木上的传奇宫殿赞叹不已，惊讶设计者想象力天马行空，也陶醉于它优美的结合价值——集建筑功能与人文叙事于一体，承载奢华工艺的同时允许建筑本身以精准、精确、精美的形式存在，借由这一作品直接覆写了周边山体空间的氛围。没人会否认卡萨扎莱宫是一次极为成功的尝试。\n至于卡维因个人原则与生涯遭遇等积压问题致使其在此项目中破产一事，那些同行尚不知情。真相就像成功背后的苦难，被卡维努力藏得很好。

- This large bookshelf can be seen in the Duke's office, neatly arranged with numerous volumes of organized case files. All written information within the Fortress of Meropide is encompassed within the dossiers on these bookshelves. As some guards have remarked, only the word "vast" can accurately summarize the quantity of information contained within, and to go through them all is no mean feat. However, if one wishes to master Fortress affairs, this is the place to start... ｜ 可在「公爵」办公室内见到的大型书架，其内依序排列着大量被整理成册的案卷资料。梅洛彼得堡内所有的成文信息都被囊括于这些书架的卷宗之中。诚如某些看守所说，只有「浩繁」一词才能准确地概括这些资料的数量，看完它们并不容易。但若想对整个梅洛彼得堡的情况有所了解，恐怕还是要先从阅读这些资料开始…

- I've managed to get myself to a pretty comfortable place in life, but there's still some things I want that are outside my reach, like a peaceful and happy childhood, or the ability to trust other people. Maybe some people would see those feelings as shameful or contradictory, but I don't see a problem with sharing them. After all, why should anybody be afraid to admit what they want? ｜ 我现在过上了还不错的生活，但也仍然羡慕一些我得不到的东西——比如安逸快乐的童年，和轻易信赖他人的能力。可能有人认为这很矛盾，或者难以启齿，我倒觉得没什么不好承认的——何必和自己的本心过不去呢？
- The Crimson Oni greatly missed his friend, the Blue Oni, after the latter's departure. He scaled mountains, crossed rivers, and he searched everywhere before finally discovering the Blue Oni's trail. Knowing that his friend was trying to hide from him, the Crimson Oni left a letter inviting the Blue Oni to join a meeting of friends, saying that he didn't need to show his face. After much thought, the Blue Oni eventually decided to go. Watching the warm bonfire from afar, he was at once comforted and envious... At this moment, the Crimson Oni appeared behind him. After all, this was a meeting of the Crimson Oni's friends — and what sort of meeting would that be without his best friend? ｜ 童话故事中的赤鬼在青鬼离开后，一直思念着这位好朋友。他跋山涉水，四处寻找，终于发现了青鬼的踪迹。赤鬼心知青鬼有意躲藏，于是赤鬼留下信件，邀请青鬼参加朋友们的宴会，并且不用露面。青鬼思考再三，决定赴约，他躲在远处看着温暖的篝火，心中欣慰又羡慕。而这时赤鬼突然出现，因为这场属于朋友们的宴会，一定不能少了他最好的朋友。
- Starting From Zero ｜ 从零开始
- Well, we've recorded all these murals down. If we connect them, we should be able to put the pieces together. ｜ 已经记录了这么多壁画了。连起来看的话，也能大致理解上面记录的事了。

- Oh, little one... not to toot my own horn here, but when I was alive, I wasn't just another kitsune, no. I was a mighty and powerful Daiyouko. The memories of other youkai can't possess human bodies at will like I can. ｜ 小家伙，不是老身自夸，老身活着的时候，也是叱咤风云的大妖狐。老身的记忆有能力钻进人类身体里，其他小妖怪可做不到。
- Have you run out of food as well? ｜ 你们的吃的，也吃光了吗？
- The "scented wind" is synonymous with the "south wind" in Liyue, so this Elixir Artificer who made our Smoldersleet Elixir must be someone who lives in the southern area of Liyue Harbor. ｜ 听说「薰风」这个词在璃月有着「南风」的意思，所以创造出「烟霞丹剂」的「丹剂宗匠」应该就住在璃月港的南部区域。

- And Mr. Xavier was actually very kind to me. Once again, I... I'm so sorry! ｜ 而且泽维尔对我其实很和善，我…再一次，对不起！
- D—Did the volcano just... erupt? ｜ 刚才…火山喷发了…？

- A sophisticated and imposing piece of machinery, primarily designed for the mass production of a widely beloved snack — Puffed Grainfruit Bars. It is said that its fundamental working principle involves utilizing a high-temperature, high-pressure chamber to rapidly expand and puff up the Grainfruit. Its inventor originally named it the "High-Pressure Single-Axis Food Extrusion Furnace," but this overly cumbersome title was soon eclipsed by the far more intuitive name coined by children: the "Grainfruit Puffer." Over time, this moniker was officially adopted. Hearing its name will instantly evoke images of the delicious treat it produces. ｜ 外表精致，颇具气势的复杂机械，主要功能是批量制作广受欢迎的零食——粒果膨膨棒。据说，其主要的工作原理是利用高温高压的炉膛，使颗粒果迅速爆开并膨化，因此它的发明者将它称为「粮食用高压单轴膨化炉」。只不过，这个名字过于拗口，远不如孩子们口中的「制作粒果膨膨棒的机器」来得好记，于是到现在它正式名称也定格为了「粒果膨膨机」，一听就能联想到具体的美味。

- Originally designed to hold drinking water, this cup was stained black after a scholar used it to wash their paint brushes. ｜ 原本是饮水用的容器，因为常用来洗笔而被染黑。
- It's easy to lose track of time when you're adventuring where the sun doesn't shine, whether that's the depths of the abyss or the ruins of a lost city. ｜ 常在不见天日的巨渊还是失落的古都流连的冒险家，会经常忘记时间。
- Should we get the adults in town to pressure them? ｜ 要利用村里的大人施压吗？
- All credit to Paimon. ｜ 都是派蒙厉害。

- Uh, Ahem! I'm sorry. I'm just a bit upset because my subordinates aren't doing their jobs properly. When did you get here? ｜ 啧…咳，实在抱歉，手下人不顶事，正在气头上，让你见笑了。你是…什么时候来的？
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- If I remember correctly, Lady Ningguang sourced her Starsplinter Iron from the Mt. Tianheng area. They say it <color=#00E1FFFF>resonates with Visions.</color> ｜ 如果我没记错，凝光小姐上次应该是从天衡山附近找的矿。「碎星铁矿」有种特性，据说是<color=#00E1FFFF>会和神之眼共鸣</color>。

- Perhaps he means to say that although Mondstadt and Inazuma may seem greatly different, they do share some common aesthetics — just as how the two of us, despite being from these different nations, were able to bond as poets. ｜ 是想告诉我，蒙德和稻妻，虽然看起来大相径庭，但是却也有共通的美感吧。正如我们二人抛开蒙德人与稻妻人的身份，单纯作为诗人的交流一样。

Their shape is similar to that of Flamegranates.\nThe Quenepa Berry's unique color can serve as a reference point when mixing paints, facilitating the creation of the kind of bright, contrasting blocks of color that work so well in graffiti art... ｜ 青蓝色的，汁液丰富的莓果。其果树大片生长在「悬木人」部族附近，是形态与火榴果相近的植物。\n青蜜莓的独特色彩，能为调配颜料方向提供参照，从而画出明艳而通透的涂鸦色块…

- It was Mualani who introduced me to him! To be honest, I was a little scared of him at first, because his eyes... well, he's got a scary look. It was only later that I found out that he secretly taught my bullies a lesson. But when I tried to give him a gift to thank him, he refused to take it. He said something along the lines of having already received enough compensation... ｜ 基尼奇哥哥还是玛拉妮介绍给我认识的呢。不瞒你说，一开始我有点害怕他，因为他的眼神看起来…稍微有一点凶。我后来才知道，他私底下教训过欺负我的坏蛋。但在我送他回礼的时候，他又不肯收下，说是已经得到了足额的报酬…
- ...I got complacent. ｜ …是我轻敌了。
- Namecard style.\nThe early onset of white hair is often correlated to one's sorrows. Since "comb" and "scatter" are similarly read in Liyue's language, they believe that combing one's hair is the same as scattering one's misfortunes. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n早生白发，多缘愁苦。因为「梳」「疏」同音，璃月人认为，以梳栉发，可以疏愁。
- But if you're too busy and don't mind letting me take care of it, I'll be more than happy to continue organizing the Tournament! ｜ 要是你们太忙，而且不介意的话，也可以把所有事务安排给我，我来继续操办！
- Most architects would probably prioritize cutting costs and removing extra features in this situation. Indeed, converting the building into a simple bungalow would solve most of our problems... However, I do not think this would be the best solution. ｜ 一般这种情况下大部分设计师会以成本优先，选择去除装饰，将这栋建筑改为最基本的平房。但我不认为那是最优解。
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- Hmm, this plate... Looks like there's some writing on it. ｜ 咦？这是什么，这个圆盘上面好像写着什么东西。
- In other words... Once you set off down this path, you'll get lost in the clouds — and then who knows when you'll come back down to earth... ｜ 也就是说，此行一去，绝竟云间。

- This type of glazed pottery is large in size, elegant in shape, and painted with gorgeous cerulean patterns, the making of which has utilized the most cutting-edge firing and coloring techniques available today. It is thus often considered a top-notch masterpiece of Sumeru pottery. It has been exported to other nations and has found a warm welcome as a worthy collectible with customers such as wealthy Fontaine merchants.\nIt was also included in a large amount of pottery gifted to Zubayr Theater by a huge fan, which was later returned by the theater. The dancers also tend to gaze at these works for the longest period of time when they stop by the shop. The connections between varied art forms often hide in the details of daily life. Dancers can find inspiration from the many colors and shapes in nature, and imbue their dance moves with moving details. Perhaps the patterns and the curves of this pottery will be brought onto the stage someday in an awesome dynamic form through those dancers' performances. ｜ 尺寸硕大、形态优美、且绘有「菘蓝色」华美图案的釉彩陶器，应用了现今最高级的烧制与着色手法，堪称须弥陶器的大成之作，已成功出口到其他国家，被诸如枫丹富商的客户购买，置于家中作为藏品。\n曾被忠实观众赠予祖拜尔剧场，又被剧场感谢后退回的众多陶器中，就包含有这种宝瓶。它亦是舞者在商店前驻足时，注目最久之物——艺术的相通之处往往浮现于生活的细节之间，舞者能从自然界的诸多色彩和图形中寻获灵感，为自己的舞姿注入更多令人感动的细节，这型宝瓶绘有的花纹和曲线，或许也会在舞者将来的某次演出中，以绝妙的动态再现吧。

For the duration of the effect, once every 1.5s, lose 1 stack after a Normal Attack hits an opponent; once every 1.5s, gain 1 stack after triggering a Vaporize reaction on an opponent. - A true blue Fontinalia Festival snack. That said, a true tragedy seems to have befallen this serving, reminding one of nothing so much as a Cryo Whopperflower... Are you sure the Lakelight Lilies in this one weren't, in truth, Whopperflowers? Uh, best you get rid of this on the down low... serving a dish like this during the festival might just be a chargeable offense! ｜ 蓝盈盈的千灵节甜点。外形看起来有点不妙，让人联想到了冰霜骗骗花，难道参照时选的湖光铃兰是骗骗花变的？在千灵节端出这样一份甜点，说不定会被审判…还是悄悄解决掉吧！

- Besides, taking care of a library IS important work. I've never considered it a waste of my time. ｜ 而且保管图书可是很重要的工作，我从不觉得那是浪费时间。

- The Carp and the Carp Adeptus have been nothing but kind to everyone in Chenyu Vale, but I might have hurt some of the Carp when I was fishing. ｜ 鲤鱼和鲤鱼仙人对全沉玉谷的人都有恩，说不定我埋头打鱼的时候，就误伤了几尾鲤鱼…
- Of course we will. Your adventure is only just beginning, there's still a whole wide world out there for you to explore. ｜ 怎么会呢，你的冒险故事才刚刚开始，还有广阔世界等你去探索。
- Go deeper into the desert and explore according to Soheil's archaeology notes ｜ 根据索赫尔的考古笔记，深入沙漠探索

- Buff:\nGeo DMG increased.\n\nNotable Hazard:\nDue to the power of the Abyss, monsters in the area have significantly higher HP. ｜ 增益效果：\n可造成的岩元素伤害提升。\n\n需要注意的危机：\n受到深渊力量的影响，此地魔物的生命值都得到了显著提高。
- Go, White-Iron Lavender Melon! Show 'em the might of the Arataki Gang! ｜ 白铁小堇瓜！你要拿出荒泷派的气势来！
- You can't back out this time, Idyia! The manager of the fairgrounds is waiting to see you. She said, "Idyia is the only person who could help." ｜ 不可以退缩哦，伊迪娅小姐！「游园会」管理人还等着见你呢，说是…「只有你才能处理」。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- *sigh* If I had given up earlier, or stopped trying to fool myself... perhaps I would already be on the right path. ｜ 唉…要是能更早放弃…或者没有死要面子…说不定现在已经走在正确的路上了。
- Sort out the information you have ｜ 整理当下的情报
- Cut that racket out! I'm doing experiments here! ｜ 别吵别吵，正在实验呢！
- From a certain point of view, a "magician's assistant" is a contradictory sort of work.\nThe cheers and applause are for the magician, the protagonist, and similarly, the flowers and fame are not directed at the protagonist's sidekick.\nYet a brilliant performance cannot exist without an assistant's cooperation.\nAs the one closest to the magician onstage, the assistant knows all the magician's secrets, and in dangerous performances, the assistant's every move means life or death for the magician.\nOnstage, the magician and assistant are like a double-sided mirror. One tends toward the light, absorbing the audience's attention. The other faces the darkness, pulling levers and strings in the rear to complete the trick — each side turns the other in endless permutations.\nIf they are to operate in harmony, the assistant's skills cannot be far behind those of the magician themselves.\nBut with such skill, how could one long be content to live in another's shadow? Thus do many assistants, once their skills are fully developed, strike out on their own — they will not forever remain the pupil.\nWhen Lyney became famous, many notables took notice of Lynette's potential, believing that she could achieve greater stardom still should she become an independent act. Some even asked her to take up the role of a leading actress in their films.\nCat ears on young lady, who was also a magician... Even with those gimmicks alone, there was a fortune to be made!\nAlas, these passionate entreaties fell on deaf ears, and not only would Lynette reject them... She could not even be bothered to come up with reasons for doing so, instead leaving the task of coming up with them to Lyney instead.\nThis was quite the conundrum indeed, for many of those making requests were distinguished members of society. "Father" had left clear instructions — they were not to be treated with contempt.\nAnd if his authorship were to be discovered, any further meetings with them might turn awkward.\nSo Lyney had no choice but to write letter after letter of refusal in Lynette's manner of speech, filling each to the margins with polite and earnest words.\nEven one as silver-tongued as Lyney found it exceeding difficult to mimic her laconic manner of speech.\nExhausted in hand and spirit, glancing at his sister lounging on the sofa, Lyney could not help but think — why not try it for real? He could play the assistant, no problem.\n"...Don't even think about it." Even that flicker of thought could not escape Lynette. She stretched, before flipping over to face him. "I like being your assistant." ｜ 从某种角度来说，「魔术助手」是一个矛盾的职业。\n台上的喝彩与掌声，属于身为主角的魔术师；台下的鲜花与名利，也不曾眷顾主角的助手。\n然而一出精彩的表演，却又少不得助手的配合。\n身为舞台上最接近魔术师的人，助手清楚魔术师所有的隐秘，在危险的表演中，助手的一举一动更牵连着魔术师的生死。\n舞台上的魔术师与助手就如双面的镜子，一面向光，吸引观众的注意；一面朝暗，在背后完成手法，两面彼此轮转，变幻无常。\n要想配合得圆融如意，助手本人的魔术造诣，就不能比魔术师低多少。\n可有了这等技艺，又怎么会甘心久居人下？是以大多数学徒出身的助手，在学艺有成后就会自立门户，不会永远安于助手之位。\n林尼出道成名以后，也有不少名流看中了琳妮特身上的潜力，觉得她若独立出来，肯定能成为更耀眼的明星，甚至还有人想邀请她出演映影片的女主角。\n猫耳、少女、魔术师…光是这些噱头一堆，就足以赚满眼球！\n无奈琳妮特自己对这些盛情置若罔闻，不但拒绝了所有挖角…甚至连拒绝的理由也懒得编，所有回信都扔给林尼来写。\n这可愁苦了林尼，这些观众大多身份显赫，「父亲」大人吩咐过不能轻慢。\n如果被发现试图从林尼处挖角的信是由林尼本人回的，下次见面恐怕会相当尴尬。\n于是他只能模仿琳妮特的口吻，编出一封封的礼数周全，态度恳切的拒信。\n即使巧舌如林尼，要用琳妮特平日那副惜字如金的口吻写这种信，也是相当费心思的。\n每每写到心累手酸，看着一旁正悠然趴在沙发上的琳妮特，林尼也忍不住想想：要不然真让她去试试吧？换我做助手也行。\n「…别想。」琳妮特敏锐地捕捉到这一闪而过的念头，伸个懒腰翻身看向林尼，「我就喜欢当你的助手。」

- I'm something of a kitchen god myself. ｜ 其实我也是隐藏的厨神呢。
- Hidden Strife ｜ 残像暗战
- If we follow these clues to the end, I'm certain that our suspicions about Mr. Nacker will be proven. ｜ 只要顺着线索查到底，我相信，纳克先生身上的「嫌疑」很快就会成真。
- An exquisitely carved piece of fragrant wood that is used in ceremonial rites and gives off the scent of something burnt. Judging from its shape, there seems to be another piece of fragrant wood to complement this one. ｜ 雕刻精美的祭祀用香木，散发着淡淡的烧焦气味。从形制判断，似乎与另一块香木是配套的存在。
- Xinyan ｜ 辛焱
- Confused Adventurer ｜ 迷惑的冒险家
- Hm... I suppose that's accurate. Ah, allow me to introduce myself... I'm Emilie, a perfumer from Fontaine. ｜ 嗯…可以算。我是从枫丹来的调香师，名字是艾梅莉埃。
- A shot taken from a medium position and distance. It can capture the character and their surroundings. However, the available scale and detail are also somewhat middling... ｜ 距离适中的机位，基本能拍摄到角色和物件的全部轮廓，不过画幅和细节都处于适中水平…
- Guest Message ｜ 客人留言
- Alright... ｜ 好吧…
- Lady Ningguang is right. Let's swap the goods for cash and use it to pay off our debts, and be done with it. This is a lifeline, and we should be grateful for it. Forget about making money. ｜ 凝光大人说得对，我们现在能把货换成钱，还清欠账就不错了，别想着赚钱了。
- +1 HP ｜ +1生命
- It doesn't look like he's fishing, either... Let's go over and have a look, shall we? ｜ 看起来也不像是在钓鱼…我们过去看看吧。
- A filming device created by the engineer Helene that can remain stable and film actors even in high-speed motion, or don a doll outfit to be part of crowd shots filmed from a distance. For some reason, one is distinctly reminded of Helene's distressed expression during testing whenever one looks at the tear-stained eyes of the Blubberbeast doll on the imaging platform. ｜ 由工程师伊莲设计的摄影器材，可以在高速运动中稳定跟拍演员，或是装上玩偶服后，扮演集群行动的远景。不知为何，看着稳像平台上眼角啜泪的膨膨兽玩偶，脑海中总能浮现出伊莲在测试前心神不安的神情…
- Opponents' HP increased by 150%. ｜ 怪物血量提升150%。
- Manyoya ｜ 曼尤雅
- #{NICKNAME}, prepare for take-off! Raptor awaits you once you <color=#00E1FFFF>defeat all these enemies</color>, then that gliding license is yours! ｜ #那么，起飞吧{NICKNAME}。<color=#00E1FFFF>消灭所有敌人</color>，怪鸟和飞行执照都在前方！
- Stupid Abyss... ｜ 该死的深渊…
- Tenacious Blubberballs will briefly expose their weak points. Only by <color=#FFE14BFF>destroying a certain number of weak points</color> can you cause them to enter a stunned state. ｜ 坚韧膨膨球会短暂暴露出弱点，只有<color=#FFE14BFF>击破一定数量的弱点</color>才会使坚韧膨膨球陷入瘫痪状态。
- He's talking about himself, Paimon... ｜ 他在说他自己…
- Rawr? ｜ 呀？
- Talk to Akatanga ｜ 与阿卡坦加对话
- But it turned out you had come to rescue me... You came for my sake, to help me reach the best possible outcome. ｜ 结果原来是你想要救我…你们为我而来，帮助我迎来了最好的结局。
- That's what you thought, right? ｜ 你是这么想的，没错吧？
- A wild and robust photo frame, capturing the formidable figure of the little creature in the film. The image of the "Mighty Meaty Fireball" is a manifestation of the fiery vortex of rage burning within the protagonist's heart!\n"This time, this time your remorse shall be great indeed!" — Such is the record of this scene in Akatanga's film... ｜ 野性十足的相框，其上记录着小家伙在映影中威风凛凛的身影。而那图像中摄人心魄的「大炖肉火焰」，正是映影主角心中熊熊燃着的盛怒涡旋！\n「这一次，这一次，一定要让你后悔到死呀！」——在阿卡坦加的映影中，对于这个场景是如此记载的…
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Go to collect ｜ 前往采集
- Hey! Ugh, Paimon's had it with you, you silly dog! ｜ 喂！气死我了，你这个笨狗！
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Boyan ｜ 博言
- Iris, stay away! ｜ 爱芮丝，别过来！
- Okay okay, enough idle chitchat. ｜ 哼，少啰嗦少啰嗦。
- Meow~ ｜ 喵喵~
- Equip it to utilize the power of Aranara.\n"Fatty fruit, bitter fruit."\nA temporary home for Aranara memories. Kusava makes Aranara strong.\nNow inside it are stored the cherished memories of Aranakin, Aragaru, and Aranaga. The power within is ready to be unleashed at any minute for the sake of beloved friends. ｜ 装备后，可以在特定的场合下施展兰那罗的力量。\n「既是胖胖的种子，亦是苦涩的果子。」\n是兰那罗记忆的暂居所，也是兰那罗力量的暂存处。\n如今其中积蓄了兰纳真、兰迦鲁与兰纳迦的宝贵记忆，时刻准备着为珍视的朋友而释放其力量。
- How does an old spirit have such determined will...? ｜ 没想到，仅仅是一缕残魂，也有这么坚强的意志…
- Be good kids and stay out of trouble, alright? Stay in the city for now, and I'll come play with you after the fireworks start. ｜ 你们听话，留在城里，等烟花会开始了就和大家一起玩吧。
- Scholar's Quill Pen ｜ 学士的羽笔
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Magatsu Mitake Narukami no Mikoto will continuously absorb Ominous Destiny, and will gain more upon hitting characters. When Ominous Destiny is filled up, she will enter the Baleful Shadowlord form. ｜ 祸津御建鸣神命会在战斗中持续汲取「恶缘」，并在攻击命中角色时获得额外的恶缘。在恶缘充满时，将进入「恶曜影向天魔」状态。
- The Mechanical Crab doesn't seem to be that aggressive. Perhaps you could try communicating with it ｜ 机械螃蟹似乎并没有很强的攻击性，能够试着和它交流一下吗？
- In her current condition, working away from the team is simply far too reckless... ｜ 以她现在的状态，脱离队伍擅自行动完全是在胡闹…
- Let's keep going. ｜ 我们再往前去看看吧。
- Use Honed Focus to defeat {param2} opponent(s) ｜ 利用「锐势焦点」击败{param2}名敌人
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- Ceremonial War-Plume ｜ 昭武翎羽
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- A luxurious toybox from Mumu. This was once something they all desired in their childhood. May all wishes come true in the future. ｜ 从木木那里获得的华丽玩具箱，听说这曾是他们童年时期共同的愿望。希望一切梦想在未来都能实现。
- You wanna cook for 'em yourself? ｜ 你要亲自下厨吗？
- So wait, the Abyss Order wants to make some sort of... Cybernetic Squid-God of Mass Destruction!? ｜ 难道深渊教团想要制造…「终极杀人机器，机械魔神乌贼」？！
- Whether you want to be their friend or not... You owe them an apology! ｜ 无论想不想做朋友…你都要先向它们道歉。
- Ah... ｜ 啊…
- You're right. But you do already have a version of the story in your heart — your own interpretation, yes? ｜ 你说的很对。但是你心中，也有一版故事了吧？一版属于自己的诠释。
- You have gathered all the ingredients, and Harris has also come up with his recipe. However, he seems to want you to make this Goulash with your own hands... ｜ 搜集齐全了材料，哈里斯也整理好了食谱。但是，他似乎想让你来亲手做一下这道「稠汁蔬菜炖肉」…
- We've taken too long, this food's gone cold... ｜ 拖太长时间，这道菜都凉透了…
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- Investigate the ore pile ｜ 调查矿堆
- I have to work harder in my duties as a shrine maiden to earn the approval of Lady Yae, after all. ｜ 为了八重大人的认可，我要更加努力地完成巫女的职责。
- Pay respects at the shrine ｜ 参拜神龛
- Just like Chuychu always hoped. ｜ 这是葵可最希望看到的吧。
- Y'know, if the Ninken really met up with our fungal friends, they might really get along well... ｜ 感觉…忍犬如果和蕈兽伙伴们见面的话，两边应该很合得来…
- #{NICKNAME}'s a registered adventurer. It should be no surprise finding {M#him}{F#her} in every corner of Teyvat! ｜ #{NICKNAME}可是在册的冒险家呢，出现在提瓦特的任何角落都不奇怪！
- Woohoo! We can finally leave! ｜ 太好啦！终于可以出去了！
- Increases all party members' Max HP by <color=#3399CCFF>20–25%</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色生命值上限提升<color=#3399CCFF>20%-25%</color>，持续300秒。
- Dreams of Dragonfell ｜ 陨龙之梦
- Thank you all. Prince should be somewhere around the marketplace or the residential area. It's a black cat you're looking for. ｜ 靠你们咯，「小王子」应该就在城里的商业区和居民区附近，你们应该记得的吧，「小王子」是一只纯黑色的猫哦。
- Maiden's Fading Beauty ｜ 少女易逝的芳颜
- Heated Battle Mode: Sprinting Stratagems ｜ 热斗模式：奇策竞驰
- Polishing sunglasses! ｜ 擦亮墨镜！
- Ooh, that's nice. We've always had to rely on our own memory to figure the puzzles we encountered elsewhere. ｜ 哦哦，那太好了。以前在其他地方，各种看不懂的谜语都得靠我们自己猜。
- Huh? Who are you? What are you doing here? Why are you asking about that? ｜ 嗯？你是谁？来干什么的？问这个干嘛？
- The present owner of Naganohara Fireworks. Hero to the children, Queen of the Summer Festival — also known as Yoimiya.\nInazuma has yearly festivals that all feature fireworks painstaking made by her. Her creativity itself burns hot and brightly, and brings people endless, incomparable joy.\nYoimiya's heart has yet to lose its childlike innocence, and she often plays simple but evergreen games with the children, or goes with them to find some shiny objects. The purity of these children brings her great happiness.\nThough fireworks are fleeting things, their radiance remains in peoples' hearts. This miracle is momentary yet also eternal, and this is how she "protects" those around her. ｜ 「长野原烟花店」现任店主，「夏祭的女王」，孩子们的英雄大姐姐，这些称呼形容的都是同一个人——宵宫。\n稻妻城每年举办的各式庆典都会用到宵宫精心制作的烟花，她有着焰火般旺盛的创造力，总能为人们带来无与伦比的惊喜。\n宵宫童心未泯，时常与孩子们一同玩些简单又不失趣味的小游戏，或是陪他们一起去找亮晶晶的小玩意儿。孩童的纯粹让她感到无比快乐。\n烟花虽然转瞬即逝，绚烂的光影却能永远留存于人们心中。既是一瞬，也是永恒。这份短暂的奇迹，便是她给予周围人的「守护」。
- *sigh* I just wonder if that... As... Astromona, or whatever she was called, will be in this time... ｜ 唉，也不知道那个…阿斯…阿斯…什么莫娜…这次在不在家…
- #Hmph, don't you dare start copying {M#him}{F#her}! ｜ #哼，这种时候不许学{M#他}{F#她}！
- I see. I understand. ｜ 原来如此。$UNRELEASED
- During the event, craft and release Xiao Lanterns to receive rewards. ｜ 活动期间炼金合成制作霄灯，每日放灯可获得奖励。
- DMG dealt by all party members using polearms increased by 50%. ｜ 队伍中所有使用长柄武器的角色造成的伤害提高50%。
- The primitive wandering inhabitants of Teyvat's wildernesses.\nHilichurl Shooters who wield simple crossbows. Hilichurls do not, in truth, possess the craftsmanship needed to build crossbows. As such, it is commonly believed that there is an organization that controls the hilichurls from behind the scenes and furnishes them with equipment and material supplies. The Abyss Mages that often accompany these hilichurls are especially suspicious. ｜ 提瓦特荒野中游荡的原始住民。\n手持简陋弩机的丘丘人射手。丘丘人实际上并不具备制造弩的工艺水平。因此，一般认为，在丘丘人背后，存在着操控丘丘人，并为它们提供设备物资的组织。而与丘丘人走得很近的深渊法师尤为可疑。
- Huh... That looks like a piece of a sword... Thanks. I'll bring it back with me and examine it more closely. ｜ 唔…这确实是一把剑的碎片…多谢，我会拿回去好好看一下的。
- But if you're replaying the kind of actions you perform every day, you just need to let go and your subconscious will guide you through. ｜ 但如果是自己最习以为常的动作，只要顺着潜意识的引导，就能顺利演出来了吧。
- I don't know... You seem to me to have itchy feet. Places you have to go, things you have to do. ｜ 但看你的样子，也有不得不做的事情，有不得不去的地方吧。
- Charged Attack & Swift Stormflight Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击与雷霆飞缒体力消耗|{param6:F1}点
- Increases all party members' DEF by 215 and healing effects by 6% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色防御力提高215点，治疗效果提升6%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- I'm sick of being pushed around like this! I won't let him off so easily! ｜ 我真是受够你们的欺负了，这件事可没那么容易就算了！
- Ei ｜ 影
- This midday sun is fierce... I should go check on the building materials I left out to dry. ｜ 正午阳光好烈，我晒在外面的材料怎么样了…

- "Delivery? What delivery?" ｜ 「外送？是什么东西呀？」
- Collapse Hand ｜ 收起手牌区

- Redacted Message ｜ 被涂改的留言
- "Hooray! It's a cold platter feast. Time to eat, comrades!" ｜ 「好耶！是冷盘大餐！兄弟们，吃饭啦！」
- · The Elemental Node in this challenge will apply a Cryo buff to nearby opponents at intervals. Pyro attacks can remove this buff effectively through the Melt reaction and deal more DMG using the Ley Line Disorder here. ｜ ·挑战中的「元素试炼仪」将间歇性使周围的敌人获得冰元素增幅效果，强化敌人。火元素攻击可以通过触发融化反应，解除敌人的冰元素增幅效果，并利用地脉异常的效果造成更多伤害。
- Together, let us go back to where we belong. Stories follow rules, unfolding in cyclical patterns... Each follows its own course. ｜ 与我一起，同归归处。故事循规蹈矩，往复来回…每一篇都有自己的路途。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Hmm? Thanks for the recognition. If you have a chance, why don't we have a friendly spar next time? ｜ 嗯？多谢认可。有机会的话，下次来切磋一番如何？
- ♪~ ｜ ♪~~
- Investigate the plants in the specified locations ｜ 调查特定地点的植物

- Changsheng ｜ 长生
- Looks like you'll have to seek Darcy out first... ｜ 看来只能先去找那个叫「达希」的人问问了…
- Have you tried some before? If you haven't, you can get a sample now. ｜ 你尝过了吗？如果没尝过的话就来一块吧。
- Wow! Have you also been to Mondstadt? ｜ 哇！难道，「蒙德」也去过？
- Ruin Guards have incredible regenerative capabilities. When their HP falls under 15%, they will recover an immense amount of HP after 6s. This effect can be triggered once by each Ruin Guard. ｜ 遗迹守卫拥有强大的恢复力。生命值低于15%时，会在6秒后恢复大量生命值。该效果每个遗迹守卫能触发1次。

- Time to clean up. ｜ 该打扫战场了。
- What's Theater Mechanicus? ｜ 「机关棋谭」是什么?

- ...Oh, if there are living creatures gathered there, then the area should still be full of vitality. ｜ …喔，既然有生物聚集在那里，那就说明那块土地还有着很强的活力。
- Look! The treasury gate is open! Look out, treasure, here Paimon comes~ ｜ 快看！宝库的大门开启了！宝藏宝藏，我来咯~
- May the Electro Archon bless you! I shall be counting on you two, then. ｜ 雷神保佑，就有劳两位了。
- Only a drop of water from an Oceanid can open it. I can't allow it to be taken by just any ignorant adventurer. ｜ 所以只有纯水精灵的一滴才能开启。我不能允许这一块被无知的冒险家拿走。
- ... ｜ ……
- Pick Up ｜ 拾取
- Marana urges everything towards death. As for the tall, dark, and warped beings, they are the avatars chosen by Marana, the heralds of death. ｜ 无留陀的力量就是令一切走向死。而高大、阴暗、扭曲的东西就是无留陀选中的化身，带来死的使徒。
- "The green umbrella gazes at the pearl curtain." ｜ 「青伞怀宝望珠帘。」
- Joel's been doing pretty good. Having people to play with has put him in a good mood. ｜ 乔尔他呀，有人陪他玩可开心了。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param12:P}/{param13:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param12:P}/{param13:P}
- If something like this happens again, call me and Albedo. It'll be easier if we go and apologize to Jean and the affected people together, alright? ｜ 你以后要是碰到这种情况，记得找我和阿贝多，最好是我们几个一起处理，诚恳点向琴和受影响的人道歉。
- So hurry up and get that wheat! ｜ 所以——快点去找小麦啦！
- How did it go? Has my wood arrived? ｜ 怎么样，我买的木头已经到了吗？
- Welcome to Floral Whisper. We're always very busy during the Windblume Festival. ｜ 欢迎光临「花语」，每年风花节的时候店里生意都很忙呢，呼呼。
- Yep, that's right! ｜ 没错！
- One of the fishing points registered with the Mondstadt Fishing Association. It is located in the Stormbearer Mountains and contains a wide variety of fish. ｜ 蒙德钓鱼协会注册钓点之一，位于望风山地，鱼类资源丰富。
- Continue onward through the Cave of Eerie Murmurs ｜ 在「幽谈窟」中前进

- Good Night ｜ 晚安…
- Maybe we should tell that to Zhihua anyway and let him decide. ｜ 嗯…还是把这个告诉志华先生吧，让他自己判断吧。
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Don't worry about me though. I wouldn't be joining you this time, even if I was able to get in. ｜ 两位不必替我困扰，就算不考虑这一点，我也不能跟随两位进去。
- Talk to Teucer ｜ 与托克对话
- I am, yes, but Miss Yumemizuki is a major shareholder. The business never would've gotten off the ground without her investment... ｜ 老板确实是我，但梦见月小姐是秋沙钱汤背后的大股东，多亏了她的资助，我这家店才能开起来…
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Bribe NPC 3 ｜ (test)对NPC3贿赂$HIDDEN
- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- For the s—sake of my readership, I... w—won't back down! I'll b—b—beat... b—beat you! ｜ 为为为了写出深入人心的作品，我绝绝绝不会退缩，一定会会会击败你们的！
- Whoa, as expected of a long-standing martial arts clan... ｜ 哇啊，真不愧是历史悠久的武学门派呢…
- I am Dandy. I'm an adventurer specializing in mountaineering and other highly dangerous activities. ｜ 我是冒险家丹迪。主要活动范围是高山和险境。
- Are you feeling embarrassed now? ｜ 芭尔瓦涅，你不会是不好意思了吧？
- Enemy Routes ｜ 敌人来袭方向
- ...Truly? ｜ …嗯？
- You lack the curiosity befitting a man of knowledge, nor do you have respect for mechanical life forms. You're not fit to be a researcher! ｜ 你既没有身为求知者的矜持，也没有对机械生命的尊重，根本不配做一名学者！
- Actually, now that you mention it, I'd like to ask a question... Did you really have no other goal in presenting your "true name"? ｜ 话说回来，有一个问题我还是想问…你将「真名」献出，难道就没有其他目的了吗？

- It's the most important line in the whole script. I think it's a symbolic statement about our director's life and legacy. ｜ 这是剧本里的核心台词，我觉得这就是团长一生的写照。
- What a condescending guy... What's his deal? ｜ 来势汹汹的样子，这个人搞什么啊？
- Forgive my presumption, but perhaps that too might be seen as a form of kindness. ｜ 恕我冒昧，那或许也是一种温柔。

- I would hazard a guess that we're most likely to find good leads if we investigate these anomalous areas first. ｜ 总之，我认为应该先调查一下那些异常区域，很可能会将结果导向我们的目标。
- Specialized refinement material for "Ultimate Overlord's Mega Magic Sword."\nCan gather many wishes (including super cool cardboard ones) and put them together, forming an ultimate super-duper mysterious power.\nThough you can buy a toy version in Damoville Purveyor that looks similar (okay, basically exactly the same), in reality, there is (probably) a qualitative difference between the two, so definitely don't mix them up! ｜ 「究极霸王超级魔剑」专用的精炼道具。\n能够将许多心愿（以及帅气的硬纸板）牢牢地拼合在一起，从而诞生出究极无敌的神奇力量。\n虽说造型差不多（或者说完全一样）的小道具在达莫维百货也买得到，但两者之间其实说不定有着本质上的区别，所以千万不要搞混。
- Such a thrilling story! It's a shame they didn't get to have their happy ending. ｜ 真是感人的故事啊，可惜最后没有一个圆满的结局。
- Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle ｜ 胜利时，角色被击倒次数小于2

- She's a researcher from Sumeru. She's rather reckless, but she has a beautiful voice... ｜ 她是须弥来的学者，做事冒冒失失的，但说话的语调很好听…

- Looks like we need to start by repairing its internal structures... ｜ 看来只能从内部结构开始修理了…
- Until then, we should stay hidden. We wouldn't want the Tenryou Commission to see us wanderin' around. ｜ 在此之前我们得隐藏好自己，别被天领奉行的人发现我们还在这一带徘徊。
- The Commission wouldn't normally cause this big of a fuss over a stowaway. ｜ 不然只是因为偷渡，应该还不至于这么兴师动众。

- Maybe I'm using it wrong? But I don't know how to track him down, ugh... ｜ 难道是我哪里操作错了？但我现在也不知道去哪找他啊，唉…
