- When Bennett uses his Elemental Skill, he can charge it up to multiple levels, which have different effects: from smoothly dealing Pyro DMG to dealing greater DMG but sending himself flying in the ensuing explosion, though he will not be injured by it.\nHis Elemental Burst strikes the ground with Pyro to create an Inspiration Field.\nThis field continually infuses characters with Pyro, and regenerates health for characters with low health. When the health of characters within the field exceeds 70%, the Field provides an ATK Bonus instead.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 班尼特释放元素战技时，可以进行不同程度的蓄力，并会有不同的结果：从顺利造成火元素伤害到造成更大伤害并把自己也炸飞，不一而足。不过班尼特不会因此受伤。\n他的元素爆发可以用火元素轰击地面，并制造一个鼓舞领域。\n领域可以持续为角色提供火元素附着，并为低生命值的角色提供恢复。当领域内的角色生命值高于70%时，领域改为为其提供攻击力加成。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- Yes. Although the Fungi you normally see are capable of using elemental powers, they're merely borrowing elemental power from nature around them. ｜ 嗯，平时你们见到的蕈兽虽然也可以使用元素力，但那只是它们借用了自然中的元素力而已。

- A simple unadorned clay jar of rather rough make, but which excels in terms of the thickness of its walls. No matter rain, wind, sun, or shine, they will not easily damage this jar, thus making it very suited for a public water point. Caravan Ribat once used jars like this to provide fresh water to passers-by. A jar of water is provided every morning, noon, and night, which is just enough for a hundred to use. However, some mercenaries would come to draw water using bottles that had been used to store wine, causing the water to become contaminated with strong wine and affecting the usually sober merchants. As such, the use of this sort of public water point has been discontinued as of late. ｜ 不加装饰的朴素陶缸，做工较为粗糙，但胜在罐壁相当厚重，无论风吹雨打日晒人砸都不易损坏，适合用作公共取水点。喀万驿曾以这样的陶缸为路过之人提供淡水。每天早中晚各提供一缸水，刚好可供百人使用。不过，经常会有佣兵用装过酒的水壶打水，导致水体受到残留烈酒的污染，醉倒大量滴酒不沾的商人，因此，最近这种取水点已被暂停使用。
- I have a vague impression of my ancestral home, but I can't recall clearly anything I saw on my journey... ｜ 家乡的风景还有浅浅的印象，但沿途的风光实在记不真切…

- Yoimiya leaps into the air along with her original creation, the "Ryuukin Saxifrage," and fires forth blazing rockets bursting with surprises that deal <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> and mark one of the hit opponents with Aurous Blaze.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Aurous Blaze</color>\nAll Normal/Charged/Plunging Attacks, Elemental Skills, and Elemental Bursts by any party member other than Yoimiya that hit an opponent marked by Aurous Blaze will trigger an explosion, dealing <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color>.\nWhen an opponent affected by Aurous Blaze is defeated before its duration expires, the effect will pass on to another nearby opponent, who will inherit the remaining duration.\n\nOne Aurous Blaze explosion can be triggered every 2s. When Yoimiya is down, Aurous Blaze effects created through her skills will be deactivated.\n\n<i>Fireworks are man-made starlight, comets fired into the sky. Though they last for but an instant, the memory of their brilliance shall surely live on.</i> ｜ 宵宫随着自创的烟火「琉金云间草」腾跃至空中，向前发射满载惊喜的焰火箭，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，并对命中的其中一名敌人附上「琉金火光」。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>琉金火光</color>\n队伍中所有角色（不包括宵宫自己）的普通攻击、重击、下落攻击、元素战技、元素爆发命中处于琉金火光影响下的敌人，会引发爆炸，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。\n处于琉金火光影响下的敌人在持续期间内被击败时，琉金火光将转移至附近的另一名敌人，并继承持续时间。\n\n琉金火光每2秒至多引发一次爆炸。宵宫倒下时，由宵宫自己的技能产生的琉金火光效果会解除。\n\n<i>烟火是人造的星光、向天而行的彗星。即使只能停留一瞬间，煌煌的光也能在大家的心中长留吧。</i>

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Did you know that there are all kinds of strange Shroom-Kin in Sumeru?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Oh, yeah. Here's a fun one — legend has it that there were some forest boars who couldn't live without mushrooms, and the two species gradually formed a symbiotic relationship with each other. Now they're known as "Shroomboars."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Whoa, that's a lot like us! Paimon can't live without {NICKNAME} either.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>If you can't live without me, that means... I'm the shroom, and Paimon's the...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Boar!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey, wait a second... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你知道吗，须弥有各种各样奇特的蕈类。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯，有意思的是，据说有些林猪离不开蕈类，逐渐就形成了共生关系，于是便被称为蕈猪。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哇，那和我们很像呢！我也离不开{NICKNAME}。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙离不开我，所以我是蕈，派蒙就是…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>猪！ \n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？喂——

- A flower pot made from simple pieces of Karmaphala Wood, filled with unique-looking plants. The appearance of the leaves in full bloom is indicative of the joy of life. But these plants didn't start out that way. After surveying the ecology of the rainforest, the Forest Rangers occasionally find areas that have not been sufficiently nourished, so they transfer the fragile plants into the pots, and once they're past their critical growth period, the Rangers will choose the right place to return them to the wild. Blooming leaves are also seen by Forest Rangers as a response to good deeds. ｜ 由简单的业果木板材拼接而成的花盆，栽有形貌独特的植物，叶片盛放的姿态像是在述说生命的欢快，但其实这些植物起初并非如此——对雨林中的生态进行调查后，巡林员们偶尔会发现养分不足的区域，将较为脆弱的植物移栽到花盆中，待到它们度过了生长的关键期，再选择合适的地点，让它们回归自然。盛放的叶片也被巡林员们视为植物对善行的回应。

- I definitely owe him a visit. I haven't seen him in some time, and I do have fond memories of the days when he was teaching me to pick grapes... ｜ 确实好久没见到特纳先生了，有点想念他教我摘葡萄的日子了，我去看看他吧。
- In Liyue, a form of divination is often used to predict fortune and peril or ask the gods for guidance. The people of Liyue call their particular art "Zhanbu."\nIt is said that in ancient times, medicine and "Zhanbu" were tightly linked and often confused. With no scientific understanding of birth, old age, sickness, or death, the ancestors could do naught but pray to the gods for wellness and take medicinal herbs for comfort.\nOver time, countless generations experiencing sickness and recovering upon taking different herbs were able to distill their knowledge into a set of rules, making breakthroughs in their understanding of medicine. Thus was medicine born, with trained physicians curing the sick.\nAfter becoming an heir to this medical tradition, Baizhu brought Changsheng to Liyue Harbor to open a pharmacy and practice medicine in the bustling port city. At that time, the following story took place:\nAccording to the traditions of Liyue, new businesses must divine an auspicious time for their grand opening using the art of "Zhanbu." By sticking to the preordained opening day, the business will prosper and enjoy fame and fortune.\nBut Baizhu did not wait until the day of good fortune. One night, a mother brought her fever-stricken daughter to the door of the pharmacy, frantically pounding on the door.\n...\nEarly the next morning, the neighbors were shocked to discover that the pharmacy had opened several days early, with no fanfare or celebration.\n"Aren't you afraid of going bankrupt and losing everything?" Changsheng's voice was full of regret. "All you did was treat an emergency case last night, why would you need to open up shop early?"\nBaizhu replied as he wrote a prescription: "Every day delayed is another day the patients must wait for their consultation. Besides, what pharmacy wants business to boom? We aren't hoping for more people to get sick, are we?"\n"That doesn't mean you should just throw open the doors without even thinking of a name for our shop! And what about a celebratory message for the grand opening?"\n"A name and a message... Then let us send the message that no matter the fortunes of this shop, or the diseases afflicting our patients..." Baizhu picked up the prescription note and faced the rising sun framed through the door. "...Or our fates, we don't need to ask the gods or use divination any longer."\nIn the language of Liyue, "Zhanbu" is divination, but "bu" can also be the word for a refusal or negation. Thus, he chose a name that enshrined his beliefs.\nThe rays of sunlight were shining through the door and the thin paper in his hand, with the words written by his hand clear and confident—\n"Bubu Pharmacy, Baizhu." ｜ 璃月人常以「占卜」之法，推算未来吉凶，求神明答疑解惑。\n相传在太古年间，医术与卜术曾被混为一谈。先民对生老病死认知尚浅，只能向神明祈求安康，服下药草聊作慰藉。\n直到人们从无数次的染恙与好转间，总结规律流传后世，再经历无数代人的破与立，才有了如今的医术。\n继承衣钵后，白术带着长生赶赴璃月港，决意要在这繁华的港口立一席之地，行一方之医。那个时候，曾发生过这样一支插曲：\n依照璃月习俗，新店落成还需卜算一个良辰吉日才可开业迎客。保守吉时，便能生意红火，财源广进。\n但白术还没等到预定的吉日，一天夜里，一位母亲就抱着发烧的女儿惊慌地叩开了药庐的大门。\n……\n翌日清晨，邻里们惊讶地发现，这座药庐竟提前数日开张营业，事情办得不声不响，店内店外亦无庆祝之意。\n「你就不怕亏本亏到师父家吗？」长生的语气无不惋惜，「不过是昨晚接了个急诊，没必要特意提早开业吧？」\n白术边写处方笺边回道：「晚一日开张，说不定就有病人要多等一天。再说了，一间药庐能求什么生意红火？总不能盼着客人多生病吧。」\n「那也不至于连店名都没想好就开业吧！还有，祝词呢？」\n「店名和祝词么…就祝这药庐的祸福，客人的疾患…」白术拈起处方笺，对着门外的朝阳，「…与你我的命数，都不必再求神问卜吧。」\n阳光穿透纸背，落款处的字迹越见风骨——\n「不卜庐，白术」。

- A monster birthed from a high concentration of Hydro that can float in the air.\nOn moonlit nights, Hydro Specters will give off a ghostly glow as they float by the riverbank. Their furtive forms are often mistaken by passers-by for wandering spirits, which has made them mainstays in quite a few folktales. ｜ 高浓度的水元素孕育而生的魔物，能够飘浮在空中。\n在月夜里，飘荡在河边的水飘浮灵散发着幽光。鬼鬼祟祟的它们常被路过的旅人当作游魂，也因此成为了不少乡间民话的常客。

- Yes. I ran into him out in the wilderness during a storm, and he let me take shelter in his cart. In return, I said I'd be his helper for a while. ｜ 是的。我四处流浪，在野外遇见那位先生。他允许我到他的货车里避雨，作为报答，我想帮他做些事。
- There is a high possibility that the fugitive escaped with the help of an accomplice. If you encounter this criminal, do not attempt to apprehend her. Contact the Maison Gardiennage for assistance immediately. ｜ 犯人逃脱时极有可能有同伴协助，有目击此人者请勿试图出手制服该犯，优先联络执律庭。
- Legend has it that while some adepti were pursuing the adeptal path, they would wander across mountains and rivers, enjoying various gourmet dishes, using such means to quiet their hearts. Their path would be called the "Trail of Delicacies" by those who came after.\nNow, the Adventurers' Guild has combined this fascinating challenge with the traditions of the Moonchase Festival, placing many treasure chests along the Trail of Delicacies.\nFollow three such Trails, defeat any foes that lurk around them, and the handsome rewards shall be yours! ｜ 传说某些仙人在求取仙道前，曾寻壑经丘，享用佳肴，以此平心静气。他们的足迹被后世之人称为「珍肴霞踪」。\n如今，冒险家协会将意趣盎然的挑战与逐月节的传统相结合，在「珍肴霞踪」的关键地点布置了宝箱。\n追溯三条「珍肴霞踪」，击败盘踞在附近的敌人，就能赢取丰厚的奖励！
- Meng ｜ 老孟
- An artificed Hydro Samachurl that looks much the same as those normally encountered... ｜ 被拟想而出的「水丘丘萨满」，看起来似乎和寻常所见的「水丘丘萨满」并无太大差别…

- After a while... ｜ 又过了一段时间…
- Tingfang is waiting for a meal delivery near the Dunyu Ruins. You cannot use your wind glider, be affected by any element, or take any damage during the delivery, or the food will be damaged. Get it to him in one piece within the time limit. ｜ 订餐的廷方先生正在遁玉陵附近等待餐品送达。运送餐品期间不能使用风之翼、不能沾染任何元素、不能受伤，否则餐品会受到损坏。在限定时间内，将餐品完整地送给廷方先生吧。
- ... ｜ ……
- Cool! So... what's her adeptus name, anyway? ｜ 哇哦…那，申鹤的仙名是什么呀？
- ...But we've got no choice. Let's go unfreeze them again. ｜ 没办法，我们上去把那些碎片再解冻一次吧。
- The Marechaussee Phantom hasn't yet released any information to the public, because the investigation is currently at a standstill. The murderer is extremely cautious. ｜ 逐影庭暂时没有公开案件信息，因为调查没有进展，凶手很谨慎。
- Greetings, welcome to the Yashiro Commission. ｜ 你好，欢迎来到社奉行所。
- Even if I died, my existence and everything related to me would continue to exist in Irminsul as memories and knowledge, meaning that the forbidden knowledge couldn't ever be permanently eradicated. ｜ 即便我死去，我的存在，和我相关的一切依旧会作为回忆与知识保存在世界树中，那么禁忌知识便永远无法根除。
- If all we need to do is hear Sorush tell a story, it does sound pretty simple. ｜ 只是听斯露莎讲故事的话，好像还挺简单的。
- Oh! So that's why the Grand Master wrote: "May the wind carry our sentiments back to your side." ｜ 哦！难怪大团长会在信里说，「希望我们的思念能够跟随归风回到你们身边」。
- Marvin ｜ 玛文
- Level 3 Shattering Pressure DMG|{param9:F1P} Cryo + {param10:F1P} Physical ｜ 三阶高压粉碎伤害|{param9:F1P}冰元素+{param10:F1P}物理
- Vigneire's Notebook ｜ 薇涅尔的笔记本
- Emblem of Valor ｜ 「砥砺之证」
- After many years, the awesomely powerful Primo Geovishaps grow accustomed to changes in their elemental environment.\nFolktales hold that after the great "draconic calamity" that led to the ruination of Tianqiu Valley, the overlord of the Geovishaps and Primo Geovishaps was imprisoned deep beneath the earth, and so too did they burrow into deep and unseen places, awaiting their chance to rise once more... ｜ 经历了长久岁月，拥有伟大力量的巨大岩龙蜥，能够适应元素环境的异变。\n根据民话，导致天遒谷毁灭的「龙灾」发生后，岩龙蜥与古岩龙蜥的王者被禁锢在大地深处，而它们则在地壳之下休眠，等待着复起的时机…
- *sigh* He looks pretty sad. ｜ 他看起来好难过，唉。
- Inazuma has undergone so many changes in such a short time. In my experience, Her Excellency will not just stand idly by. ｜ 稻妻局势发生了这么大的变动，以我的经验，大御所大人是不会坐视不理的。
- A cream-filled dessert. Fluffy, flaky crust cradles a rich cream within. Round and nearly bursting, it's as cute as a Blubberbeast's belly. Few hearts can escape being ensnared by the thick, soft cream within. ｜ 奶油夹心的甜点。蓬松的酥皮，包裹着饱满的奶油，圆鼓鼓的，就像膨膨兽的肚皮一样可爱。绵密柔软的奶油能抓住每一个人的心。
- Oh no! She'll be real mad when she finds out that people have made a mess out of the books and even dog-eared the pages, won't she? ｜ 要是她知道，有人把书乱用乱放的话，还折页损坏，一定会很生气吧？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Looks like my honorary titles are about to increase again, huh? ｜ 看来我的荣誉头衔又要加长了？
- {0} has not yet finished the prerequisite quest(s). This player cannot participate in the challenge. ｜ 玩家{0}未完成前置任务，无法参与挑战
- Escaping from the water tank... ｜ 那个水箱逃生…
- By the time I completed all the procedural paperwork, I missed the guards at work during their shift! Or in fishing terms, there aren't any fish in the water right now... ｜ 这一套流程全跑完，都错过看守当班的时间啦。用钓鱼来类比的话，现在根本没鱼可钓…
- Fontaine ｜ 枫丹
- But only for a while. I always get back before my big sister can find out. Don't tell her, alright? ｜ 不过我都只玩一小会儿，在姐姐发现之前就会跑回来，啊，这件事可不许告诉姐姐哦！
- Very smooth of you, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙，你好熟练。
- I have my ways of keeping her safe during the journey. In addition, I can also promise that under my care, Haypasia will receive the most advanced and effective treatment. ｜ 我自然有些手段，能确保她旅途安全。另外我也可以保证，海芭夏会得到最顶尖有效的治疗。
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- About Xinyan ｜ 关于辛焱…
- It's just that... Our misunderstanding earlier has left us with only enough support to secure one encampment. But if you need it, we will assist all the same. ｜ 只不过…因为之前的误会，我现在能支援的人手应该只够巩固一个分支营地，但如果你有需要的话，我们一定会加以支援的。
- Continue reading the wishlist... ｜ 继续阅读愿望清单…
- Hehe, awesome! Paimon just knew that you'd be interested! ｜ #嘿嘿，太好啦！我就知道{NICKNAME}一定会感兴趣的！
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- A picture of those gems would make for a fine memento, I'd say... ｜ 如果能给那些宝石拍一张画片留念就更好了…
- ...? ｜ …？
- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Grainfruit Meat Soup. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「粒果肉汤」的制作方法。
- It is a magical tent, after all. The inside is much larger than it appears from the outside. Haven't you heard stories with this sort of thing before? ｜ 毕竟是神奇帐篷嘛。里面比外面大，故事里不也经常出现这样的场面嘛…
- We aren't in a time loop... ｜ 时间没有在循环…
- A slender strand that somehow ended up entangled on your weapon while fighting the All-Devouring Narwhal.\nIn ancient Fontaine, some thought that Fortuna, which ruled the world, was woven from countless fibers, like the strings of a harp. Strings that resonate with the majestic music would bring happiness to all, while discord would destroy the fabric of the universe. ｜ 与吞星之鲸战斗时，不知不觉缠绕在武器上的细丝。\n在古代的枫丹，曾有人认为主宰万物现象的「法图纳」是由无比细微的「纤维」编制而成，就如同组成竖琴的弦丝。与宏伟的乐声共振的丝线将会带来普世的幸福，正如不谐音会破坏宇宙的肌理。
- Continue exploring ｜ 继续向前探索
- Namecard style.\nFear not, she's here to make peace, not to fight. The only question is whether to save a few bullets... Y'know, the type that get fired into the sky as warning shots. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n放心吧，人家是来调停的，又不是来打架的。问题也就是要不要省几发子弹罢了…对着天空警告射击的那种。
- Scroll of the Hero of Cinder City ｜ 烬城勇者绘卷
- You see!? It worked! Caribert can speak again! ｜ 看到了吧，有效果了，卡利贝尔又能说话了！
- Please, great shaman! ｜ 拜托了，大萨满女士
- One with nature! ｜ 往返自然！
- The signed hardcopy edition of "A Legend of Sword" by Liyue's best-selling author, Zhenyu, is flying right off the shelves! ｜ 璃月大人气作家「枕玉」签名紫木螺钿精装版《沉秋拾剑录》火热发售中！！

- Raspberry-Red Flying Flower Feather ｜ 莓红飞花一羽
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I have a feeling a certain Qucusaur might know a thing or two. ｜ 有一只绒翼龙可能知情。
- Well now, friend, have you come to take part in Boss Arataki's Blazing Armor Beetle Battle Boot Camp as well? ｜ 朋友，你也要参加荒泷帮主的「甲光烈烈斗虫大修行」？
- Hmm... So we'd mostly be doing it for reputation and exposure? There is some value to that — it could make doing business in the desert a bit easier. ｜ 嗯…主要是提高我们的名声啊。确实有点用，以后在沙漠做生意应该会方便一些。
- That's right! That's him. He hired people to tail us, and even sent them to search my room, trying to take the Numbering Machine for himself. ｜ 是的！就是他，他雇人跟踪我们，派人进我的房间翻找，要把推数机据为己有。
- Of course you can. ｜ 你可以留下来。
- Use the Resonant Stone Pillars to break the rock barrier ｜ 利用共振岩柱击破岩石屏障
- N—No, don't apologize! It's fine, it's not your fault! ｜ 哎，哎，别道歉啊！没关系的，不是你的错！
- To the heavens may you fly... ｜ 代我飞到高天之上。
- Great! So, what's the plan, Master Diluc? ｜ 那么迪卢克老爷打算怎么办呢？
- Raed ｜ 拉伊德
- ... ｜ ……
- I'll never forget what you've done for me. Let me rest up for a moment, then I'll go see my captain right away. ｜ 我会永远记住你帮的这个大忙，恩人。让我缓一会儿，之后马上去找队长。
- ...Please don't tell anyone I used that word. I'm just trying to speak plainly to conserve energy... ｜ …如果可能，请不要提到我使用了这个词。只是我想尽量说简单些，保留一些体力…
- Thankfully, there was a drawbridge above that river. Had there not been a bridge, I'd have had to ask some people to help me draw a rope between the two mountains... ｜ 还好那条河上面有一座吊桥，要是没吊桥的话，我就只能求人在两座山之间拉一条绳索…
- A predator that lies in wait within the pitch-dark watery depths. It appears to have adapted to some unknown power out in the deep seas, such that it can use elements other than Hydro... When it faces strong foes, it will use its powerful Cleansing Shower. Characters hit by this attack will <color=#f39001>lose a certain amount of Elemental Energy</color>. If they do not have sufficient Elemental Energy, they will <color=#f39001>lose HP</color>. ｜ 蛰伏于漆黑深水中的掠食者。应对着深海中的未知力量，或许也演化出了水元素以外的变体…面对强敌时，会使出威力强大的「涤魔喷吐」。命中角色后，角色将<color=#f39001>流失一定元素能量</color>。若角色的元素能量不足，将<color=#f39001>损失生命值</color>。
- Yeah, and I thought both the original sender and intended recipient would be disappointed if this package is left undelivered. ｜ 嗯…如果收不到这份快递的话，寄件人和收件人都会很难过吧。
- Guest Challenge: Nilou ｜ 来客挑战：妮露
- I do not know if I should reveal this to you, for this is a secret that only we locals know... ｜ 我不知道是否应该告诉你，毕竟这也是纳塔「本地人」才知道的秘辛。
- They should be! I already managed to find their tracks, and it seems like they're hiding on the cliff... ｜ 应该是的，我已经发现了一些痕迹，它们应该就躲在附近的山崖上…
- Maushiro ｜ 木簧笛
- Yes, time for me to head back, as well. No rest for the wicked. ｜ 我也要离开了，休息时间结束了。
- Fantastic Felines' Forbidding Fortress ｜ 奇妙猫猫的森严城堡
- Took them long enough... ｜ 拖了这么长时间，真是…
- Look after your weapon, and it will look after you. Blacksmiths can make new weapons, turn billets into battle-ready weapons, and make enhancement materials from raw ore. ｜ 旅行在外，记得善待自己的武器。\n在铁匠处可以进行锻造委托，以将「原胚」锻造成强大的武器，或者将矿石原料制成精炼用矿材。
- My homeland... ｜ 故乡…
- I will go with him. You do not need to worry about any escape. ｜ 我也会和他一起去，你无需担心犯人脱逃的责任。
- How do I brew it? ｜ 要用什么方式煮药汤来着？
- In the eyes of the Heavenly Principles, that kind of change is extremely risky, if not impermissible... But, as an Angel, I have a duty to serve humanity — such is my mandate. ｜ 在天理看来，这种改变的风险很高，或许难以容忍…但我是「天使」，我只是履行了为人类着想的使命而已。
- Yeah, Paimon's been wondering... Why do you insist on living so far away? You could easily become a leader of your tribe, someone everyone loves and respects... ｜ 对啊，其实我之前就很奇怪，茜特菈莉为什么非要离群索居地活着呢？明明有能力成为部族的领导人物，受所有人的爱戴…
- One of the most energetic residents in Teyvat, boars are found active throughout the wild.\nThis wild animal is characterized by its stubborn personality. Able to survive in various conditions, it can be encountered in all sorts of forests and wild terrain.\nEven when placed in the safety of the Realm Within, they still maintain their alertness, fleeing the moment anyone draws near to them. Paimon's beginning to feel that her dreams of riding a boar are now in jeopardy. ｜ 提瓦特大陆上最活跃的住民之一，广泛活跃于各地的郊野。\n性情倔强的野生动物。由于生存能力极为顽强，在各种林地与荒野都能见到它们的身影。\n哪怕身处安全的壶中洞天，它们也保持着强烈的警惕性，一旦有人接近，它们依然会飞速奔逃。为此派蒙苦恼不已——试着骑乘野林猪的计划，无论如何都没法成功。
- "...Make sure the bones have been picked clean, and don't leave any bits that might get caught on the teeth while we're eating the meat!" ｜ 「…骨头剁干净，不要留渣子！大块吃肉硌到牙可怎么能行！」
- But one by one, all the obstacles are being removed. Now is the time to rally the troops. ｜ 现在演出的阻碍都在一个个被解决，也是时候把他们找回来了。
- "Mother" ｜ 「母亲」
- The person hiding inside the house carefully crawls out the window. ｜ 藏在屋中的人小心翼翼地翻窗而出。
- That's the third ruin. We should probably find a stone slate here too! ｜ 第三处遗迹了，我猜，我们在这里也能找到一块石板。
- By the way, where are Melus and Silver? ｜ 对了，迈勒斯和西尔弗呢？
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Paimon's a lot smarter than I remember... I guess it's been a long time since we last met. ｜ 许久不见，感觉派蒙聪明了很多。
- So I shall first observe them from afar, taking in the surroundings, before moving in for a closer look... ｜ 所以，我想要先远观陨石，概览周遭，然后再近前细观…
- A bamboo slip that was used as a marking in some unremarkable spot. Can be exchanged with Gendou Ringo of the Grand Narukami Shrine for fortune-telling Fortune Slips. ｜ 在不起眼的地方做了标记的竹签。通过鸣神大社的玄冬林檎小姐，可以兑换成阐明运势的「御神签」。
- Alright. Please take these dandelions seeds. Help me go up and scatter them. ｜ 好了，这些蒲公英籽交给您，请您帮我上去播撒一下吧。
- Okay, goodbye! ｜ 嗯…再见。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- What if that was my goal all along? ｜ 如果我本来的目的是要否认它的真实性呢？
- We have come for your life. ｜ 我们是来取你性命的。
- This ancient story has long been forgotten by mortals.\nAn ordinary herb-picking lass named Qiqi lost her way and trespassed the realm of the adepti. Injuring her right leg in a fall, she hurriedly hid in a cavern to rest.\nEven occupied as she was in bandaging her wound, she could hear sounds that did not belong to the mortal plane. But she could have never expected that with a huge crash, she would forever be trapped between life and death.\nWhether adepti or demons, just or wicked, all understood that she was an innocent mortal caught in the crossfire.\nOr perhaps it was by the will of heaven that she received a Vision in her dying moments, and so ended this contention between adepti and demon.\nThe adepti could not bear to let her die, and each imparted to her a portion of their strength, meaning to breathe life back into her body.\nQiqi did indeed awaken and live again, but went into a berserk state, unable to control the adepti energy raging through her.\nSeeking to end the disturbance, Mountain Shaper had no choice but to seal the hapless maiden in amber. ｜ 这个古老的故事，早已被人忘却。\n名叫七七的普通采药姑娘误入仙境，不小心摔伤了右腿，急忙躲进山洞歇息。\n忙着包扎伤口的她隐约听见不似凡间之声，却不曾料到，巨响之后，她会被永远困在生死之间。\n仙或魔，正义或邪恶…无论哪方，都明白她只是一个凡人，是惨遭殃及的无辜者。\n或是天意使然，濒死的她竟意外得到「神之眼」，由此终结了这场仙魔大战。\n仙人们于心不忍，各取一缕仙力封入七七体内，意图借此复活她的躯体。\n苏醒的七七重获新生，却因无法掌控体内仙力，陷入了空前的疯狂…\n为平息躁动，「理水叠山真君」无奈出手，将这名不幸的女孩封入琥珀之内。
- A "trinket," you say... ｜ 小、小玩意…
- Holy Sovereign's Notes (I) ｜ 圣王的手记·其一
- Watch for the order in which notes fall and press the corresponding buttons to play the arpeggio. ｜ 注意音符下落的顺序，以此点击对应的按键，以奏响一段琶音。
- That combination doesn't work. ｜ 好奇怪。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- #In Vigilance at Sea, attain a total score of{SPACE} ｜ 「烟海梭巡」累计得分：
- Uh, about this question... I, umm... ｜ 这个问题我…
- A non-alcoholic beverage would be fine as well. ｜ 其实不含酒的饮料也行…
- What? Hey! Where's your human empathy gone? ｜ 喂，你们身为人类的同理心哪里去了！
- You're saying... We just have to hold out for as long as we can? ｜ 所以说，现在只能靠我们硬撑了是吗？
- If you're scared, you can always turn and head back. ｜ 派蒙害怕的话，可以先回去呀。
- "...This monument was left to ask this of future generations. When you have reached a dead end, what shall you do?" ｜ 「…遗此碑宇，且问来许。行至绝处，自当何如？」
- Yep, I am! Thanks, Miss Guuji Lady! ｜ 可莉愿意！谢谢「宫司大人」大姐姐！
- So this was all just a ploy to deceive me! ｜ 你、你居然敢骗我！用我们引以为傲的礼貌与优雅，骗取我的信任！
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- Mualani ｜ 玛拉妮
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- It's the least we could do. As long as you live in Poisson, even if you're not an official member, you're still part of the family. ｜ 不用这么客气，不管是不是刺玫会的成员，只要住在白淞镇，我们就是一家人。
- Haha! Don't be like that, Paimon! Just think about it — making up stories for Lanoire was nothing more than putting such ways of thinking to good use. ｜ 哈哈，别这样嘛，派蒙。你想，编故事讲给莉诺尔听，也只不过是让这种思考习惯派上用场罢了。

- My family has been in this line of work for generations. I've had a thing for the smell of newly-printed books since I was a kid. So I'd say I've landed a dream job. ｜ 我家世世代代都在教令院担任与书相关的职务，我从小就喜欢新书散发的油墨味道，图书管理员是我梦寐以求的工作呢。

- A motive device obtained from a mysterious ruin machine.\nThe machine it once powered may have been destroyed, but it continues to rotate all the same.\nThere should be no such thing as an energy source that can sustain itself forever in this world, and most research results obtained in the field of "perpetual motion" have been eventually proved false. Yet, this device is proof that a now-destroyed civilization once reached heights that present-day nations could not hope to match... ｜ 从神秘的遗迹机械上取来的动力机关。\n即使它所驱动的机体已经被摧毁，仍在持续运转着。\n地上理应不存在无限持续的能源，关于「永动」的研究成果发表也大多被证伪。然而从这枚机芯可以看出，如今已经覆灭的文明曾经一度触及人所不能抵达的领域。

- This food stall is often known as a "stand" or a "yatai." It has been built from a combination of an Otogi Wood table cabinet and pushcart and is unique to Inazuma.\nRice Cake Soup is a very popular dish in Inazuma City, and it is no exaggeration to say that this is a dish for everyone. As such, one can find many such stands selling Rice Cake Soup. Sometimes, store owners may even let guests place the ingredients that they want into their soup as it is being made, thus satisfying both their hunger and spur-of-the-moment inspiration. ｜ 通称「屋台」的食摊，由御伽木的桌柜和推车结合而成，极具稻妻的特色。\n「市井杂煮」在稻妻城中极受欢迎，毫不夸张地说，是男女老少皆宜的准全民料理。因此，贩售「市井杂煮」的屋台相当之多。有时，店主也会允许食客们在熬煮「市井杂煮」的汤格中加入想放的食材，满足各种食客的饱腹需求与一时奇想。

- Is someone out to kidnap you? ｜ 来抓你的人…你遇上什么麻烦了吗？

- Eh, why are you suddenly asking that? ｜ 怎么突然问这个…？

Looks like some cleanup is in order before the next try... ｜ 火山形状的蛋糕。「山脉」没能好好裹住里面的「岩浆」，轰然倒塌的成品呈火山喷发之势，眨眼间底下的托盘已经遭殃。看来进行下回尝试之前，必须先清理一下了…

- You leaving already? If you want to try Mondstadt's best wine, this is the place! ｜ 这就走了吗？要品尝蒙德的佳酿，可没有比这儿更好的去处了呀。
- Just bring Kusayla to me! There's no use hiding him anymore! ｜ 快让库塞拉出来见我，别再躲躲藏藏的了！

- Already in this character's Trial Stage ｜ 已处于该角色试用关卡
- You're Scared ｜ 你怕了
- It has no obvious wounds. ｜ 体表也没有明显的伤口。
- N—No! The Melusine in question is named Topyas. ｜ 不、不是啦，这次愿意帮助我们的美露莘叫托皮娅。
- Is this for real? ...Whatever, Paimon's leaving you guys to it. ｜ 真的假的…算了，你们俩开心就好…
- "Bantan Sango: We'll investigate anything on your behalf!" ｜ 「万端珊瑚，代行万端！」

- Sure enough, my grandfather also failed. My great-grandfather then told him, "If you can't find the secret within, then the Isshin Art deserves to fade from the world." ｜ 毫无疑问爷爷也失败了，于是曾祖父便说：「你找不出其中的秘密，一心传在世上消失也是活该。」
- If letters need to be sent abroad, we'll usually take them to the border, before handing them over to our colleagues from the other nations. ｜ 如果有要寄到国外的信件，我们一般会送到纳塔边界，再交给外国的信使朋友们送走。
- Are they serious? Running? I thought they were gonna swim. ｜ 她俩是认真的吗？跑到海边？那不是在比跑步吗？
- Hehe, looks like you're almost done sorting out your brain. ｜ 看来你已经差不多快整理好你的脑袋了呢。
- About Doutey... ｜ 关于杜泰…
- Yes, you're right. I'm wary of any and all change, but I do not wish for my pursuit of Eternity to stop human lives from changing for the better. ｜ 嗯，如你所说。我对一切改变都很谨慎，但我想追求永恒，也绝非要阻止人类变得越来越好。
- Oh, don't get me wrong. I'm thrilled that you invited me here. ｜ 哦，你别误会，你请我来我很开心。

- The soil is good. We've disposed of the weeds and pests. So what's going on here? ｜ 土壤没问题，杂草和害虫也都除了，这到底是怎么回事…
- Anyway, even if Dvalin is not taken down, his life will still wither away in the breeze... ｜ 特瓦林就算不被讨伐，生命力也会飞速流逝…
- Oh, good point. Then there's no need to bother her in the real world. ｜ 唔，是呀，那还是不在现实里打扰她了吧。

- Soloist's Solicitation ｜ 独舞之邀
- A heavy round shield, which looks like a regular round shield but in fact conceals a hidden secret.\nAthel Wood of moderate age and sturdy quality is selected and cut into planks of precise size and thickness. Smoking, waxing, and other processes will increase the planks' hardness to their greatest extent, before mortise and tenon structures are used to join them together. They are then affixed on three relatively light and soft backplanes to form a double-layer composite structure, which tries to wear down incoming blades and arrows to the greatest extent possible, weakening their power and absorbing their impact. At the same time, the frame is covered with a rigid iron structure, while reinforcing structures are placed at the vertex of the shield arc to resist the impact of blunt objects and opposing shields — and with that, the shield is complete.\nSuch shields are said to be able to fend off any attack from anyone without a Vision. Their price is also equivalent to dozens of ordinary weapons, which limits their users to small numbers of Eremite or Corps of Thirty elite troops.\nTreasure Hoarders, who prioritize the lightness of their equipment, can't comprehend why a sellsword would invest so much in a shield like this. Only a select few frontline mercenaries and the designer of this shield type understand the importance of such equipment. As a reckless youth, the shield designer once led an incursion into Aaru Village in search of his colleagues' nemesis, only to be defeated by a young guard. With a shield in her left hand and a spear in her right, the guard with heterochromatic eyes was a human avalanche, shattering the intruders' weapons and defensive equipment alike in a single charge, knocking them out with just the right amount of force, before handing them over to the aged guards, admonishing them, and releasing them. The shield's designer, though now reformed and no longer a criminal, still remembers the young guard with her differently-colored eyes, regarding her as the strongest warrior he has ever met. She was the reference point from which the principle of "the greatest offense is the greatest defense" was used to transform this venerable shield design into this style of round shield.\nAnd who knows? Perhaps it may yet withstand one of her blows should they ever meet again... ｜ 沉重的圆形盾牌，看似和一般的圆盾没什么区别，实则暗含玄机。\n选取树龄适中、质地紧实的「柽木」，切分成尺寸和厚度恰到好处的木板后，经熏烤涂蜡等工序，最大程度提升其硬度，随后以榫卯结构拼接，固定在三块相对轻便、质地较软的背板上，构成双层复合结构，争取最大程度磨损来袭的锋刃和箭头，削弱其威力，消除其冲击。同时，用坚硬的铁质结构包覆边框，并在盾牌弧面的顶点设置强化结构，以抵御钝器和对方盾牌的冲撞，如此一来，这型盾牌就完工了。\n据传它能够抵挡一切非神之眼持有者的进攻，价格也相当昂贵，相当于数十柄普通武器，仅被「镀金旅团」或「三十人团」的少量精锐装备。\n强调装备轻便的盗宝团成员并不明白，旅团佣兵为何要在这种盾牌上投入血本，唯有少量在一线战斗的佣兵和这型盾牌的设计者才理解这种装备的重要性——盾牌的设计者在年少轻狂时，曾带队入侵阿如村，寻找同僚的死对头，却被一位年轻的守卫重挫。彼时，那位异色眼瞳的守卫左手持盾，右手持矛，如山崩般攻来，只用一次冲锋就粉碎了入侵者的所有武器和防具，并用恰到好处的力度将他们打晕，交给年迈的守卫，教育劝诫后释放。盾牌的设计者虽已洗心革面，绝不作恶，但仍牢记那位异色眼瞳的年轻守卫，将其视为自己迄今为止所遇见的最强者，以「防御再严密也不为过」的原则，在老式盾牌的基础上改造出了如今的这型圆盾。\n假若下次再有机会与那位有着异色眼瞳的守卫交手，希望这面盾牌至少能扛下她的一击…
- Ask Katheryne if you doubt my alibi. ｜ 如果你们需要我的不在场证明，可以去问问凯瑟琳。
- Yes, well, I guess I was just giving myself a fright. ｜ 是啊，哎呀，果然是我自己吓自己…

- It's just like you said, Yoimiya. Even though I hadn't fully made up my mind, my actions betrayed my intent... ｜ 就像宵宫所说，虽然当时我没下定决心，但我的行为，已经暴露了我的愿望…

- You, though, I can tell with one look that you're the real adventurer type. The sort whose eyes light up as soon as someone mentions the word "treasure." ｜ 一看你就是个实打实的冒险家，听见宝藏两个字眼睛都在放光。

- Matriarch Babel, Azariq has sent me to deliver a message to you. ｜ 芭别尔主母，阿萨里格派我传递消息…

- But don't you love your job, Kaveh? ｜ 但卡维还是喜欢做设计的嘛。

- Liyue may be well known for its mining industry, but fortunately, being surrounded by rocks hasn't turned people's hearts to stone... ｜ 虽然璃月一向以矿产闻名，可璃月人的内心却从不会像矿石那般坚硬…
- Why don't you all take some time for yourselves while I see what I can do? We'll reconvene after the director finishes his script. ｜ 大家休息一会儿吧，我来看看这里有什么能准备的，等导演写完我们再讨论。

- A cornering stair made from fir wood. This one is of the same make as the Favonius Library's staircase, having large flat handrails. Though some have already used the library's handrails as slides to play on, do take note of your weight when attempting to follow that precedent. ｜ 转角构型的杉木阶梯，和骑士团图书馆中的设计相同，有着大段平整的扶手。虽说图书馆已有访客将扶手当成滑梯玩耍的先例，但这样做之前还请考虑自己的体重。
- How's your day looking? I still got a few more moves to practice here, but do you wanna meet at the teahouse after I'm done? ｜ 你有事去忙先？等我再练完剩下的动作我们在茶楼见？
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I remember how you showed up together with Her Excellency to save me from my predicament, and gave me a chance to stand up on my clan's behalf. ｜ 之前是你和雷电将军一起出现，将我从困境中救出，还让我有了为家族踏出一步的勇气。

- I used to go unnoticed, just a punk who got into fights with other people, looking down on this and that... ｜ 以前我还是个没人留意的，只会和人吵架的混混，看不起这个看不起那个…
- I'll try my luck elsewhere. ｜ 我再去别处看看。
- You're absolutely right, young man. Those in charge of trade will do the actual "handling" of this matter — we are only here to make "preliminary contact." ｜ 你说得没错，小伙子。这事情的确会由搞贸易的那些老兄来「对接」。咱们只是来做「前期沟通」的。
- That's rude, Paimon! You'll make the Ashvattha Tree mad! This is a very, very mighty tree — the oldest Vasara Tree there is. Even older than any Aranara and their stories... ｜ 派蒙真失礼！觉王树会生气。这是好厉害好厉害的树，也是最老的莎兰树，比所有兰那罗、所有兰那罗的故事都古老…
- I'd like to indulge in a nap after lunch. Oh? ...You're not tired? ｜ 午饭吃完之后，想睡一觉…哈…你不困吗？

- Who are you? ｜ 你是谁？
- (It sounds like it's coming from inside the cave...) ｜ （好像是从洞里传来的…）
- Inazuma may have closed off to the outside world, but that hasn't stopped a lot of people from hearing about your feats in Mondstadt and Liyue. ｜ 即便有锁国令，你们在蒙德和璃月的种种事迹也已经传到了很多稻妻人的耳朵里。
- Your vision... ｜ 您的视力…

- And there are so many of them too. It's almost like a village. ｜ 而且，数量好多，就像村子一样…
- It is like it was in the Ashvattha Tree's dream, and in the terrible memories. These beasts and this dark color... They and Marana are one. ｜ 和之前在觉王树的梦中，还有记忆中的可怕图景一样。这些兽类，与深黑的颜色、无留陀是一起的。
- The designs on kimonos? I don't know anything about that... ｜ 着物上的纹样？这些我还真不了解…

- The concoction needs to be as potent as possible... Hey! Maybe you can mix it while I guide you! ｜ 想要让笨蛋老爹醒酒，解酒药的味道还是要有冲击性一些比较好。嗯…由你来调制这份解酒药好了，我在旁边指导你。
- Do you have a commission for me? ｜ 有什么委托吗？

- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- Okay. That's probably enough about that. ｜ 好了，说到这里就可以了。
- After the accident at the Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering, many masterless constructs went out of control, wandering aimlessly about the caverns around the shore of the lake, waiting for orders that will never come.\nIf you can destroy the out-of-control clockwork meka, you will obtain the precious artifacts within. ｜ 枫丹动能工程科学研究院的实验事故发生后，无主的构装体便也失去了控制，茫惚徘徊于临近大湖边境的洞窟中，等待着再也不会到来的指令。\n若能破坏其中失控的发条机关，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物吧。
- Talk to Sylvain ｜ 与席尔万对话
- A practical combination of wooden barrels that villagers often place by streams to wash food and clothing. The length of the wooden boards is not consistent, and some say that this was the intention of the ones who made them: to allow washed clothes to be hung along the sides of the barrel to prevent double-work.\nThough the old folks often say that such barrels have six purposes, hence its name, most villagers can only name five of these uses... Nor is there a consensus as to whether chucking these barrels at the heads of attacking monsters to buy time for one to escape counts as the sixth method of usage or not. ｜ 实用的木桶组合，村民们常将它们摆放在溪流边，用于清洗食材和衣物。木板的长短并不一致，听说是工匠刻意为之，这样就能将洗好的衣服卡在木桶边缘，避免重复劳动。\n虽然老人们常说，这种木桶有六种用途，因此才得到了「六用」的雅称，但村民们始终只能总结出五种生活用途，尚且不能确认，将这种木桶扔在来犯魔物的头上，争取时间趁机逃跑，算不算是所谓的第六用。
- (That seems to be the only description Naiyan can come up with. It's vague, but it'll have to do for now.) ｜ （这似乎是尼娅能想出来的唯一形容。虽然有些不明就里，但看来只能先这样调查下去了。）
- Well, sure then. Looks like you're sticking this one out to the end. ｜ 好吧，看来你是要坚持到底了。
- In that case... Understood, leave the repairs to us. We can make use of the wood and rope nearby to patch up the defenses. ｜ 这样啊…好吧。正好附近就有木材和绳索，不如就交给我们来修吧。
- It might not sound like there's much difference between fresh and super fresh, but they couldn't be more different. In terms of size, or quality, you name it. They're worlds apart! ｜ 「超·新鲜」与新鲜只有一字之差，但意思却截然不同，无论肉质、大小都不是一个级别。
- Fulgurating Flying Seahorse ｜ 凭雷近人的飞海马
- Paimon gets it now! That's why the great tree looked so sickly. The roots have been corrupted! ｜ 我明白了，难怪之前看到的那棵大树像是枯萎了，全都因为根变成了这样！
- We found him! ｜ 赶上了！
- What can I do for you? ｜ 有什么事吗？

- While the Millelith stands guard, evil shall never prevail. Please report any new incidents to me. ｜ 千岩牢固，重嶂不移。如果有发现新的异常情况的话，还请务必告知我一声。

- I don't think there's anything of note nearby. If there had to be something... Well, Patchi's changed her hairstyle recently. ｜ 附近好像没有什么值得留意…一定要说有什么的话，那就是帕琪小姐最近换了新发型吧。
- Aralila can't find a raindrop in the river, so Aralila will lose! ｜ 兰梨娄没有办法从河流里找到雨水，一定会输！

- Why'd it stop? ｜ 停下来了？
- We can only grit our teeth for now... ｜ 暂且忍耐吧…

- Wait, y—you're... What happened to the monsters? ｜ 啊，你、你们是…外面的魔物呢？

- Aww, it's okay then. Come play with me when you have time! ｜ 嗯嗯，我明白了。有时间的话要来陪我玩哦！
- Well, so long as you're strong enough... ｜ 只要足够强…

- We've gained a mutual understanding. ｜ 我们正在达成默契。
- Should the breeze know what lies in my heart's innermost place, spread thy short wings, the boughs embrace. ｜ 若有轻风知我意，便展短翼绕枝梢。
- You shouldn't assume the worst of people. ｜ 别把大家想得太坏。
- But this version is different. Once you've drunk it, it will trigger once you encounter danger, which can buy more time for normal folks. ｜ 但是长效溢神剂不同。喝下之后，每次遇到危险都会自动生效，可以为普通人争取更多的反应时间。
- Plus, it was fun to get back into research. It's nice to relive those days every once in a while. ｜ 偶尔干回老本行，搞搞研究，也还挺有意思的。

- What, can it speak too? ｜ 怎么，它也会说话？
- But I did have the chance to think some more about that thing that was weighing on my mind, and I realized something. ｜ 不过，我想通了一件很重要的事。
- What are the odds? ｜ 太巧了。
- Meow, meow. ｜ 喵呜，喵。
- A gelatinous substance made from fruit and sugar. Even a little bit can easily wake up tired taste buds. ｜ 由水果和糖熬制而成的凝胶物质。只要少许就能轻易唤醒疲惫的味蕾。

- Go deeper into the tunnel ｜ 深入隧道
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- An onion soup. Stir-fry the onion until it is slightly charred, and boil it in broth. Transfer the contents to a soup bowl, add a slice of bread, sprinkle some cheese, and bake it in the oven. Well-seasoned chefs never cry when chopping onions, and here's their secret trick: Let the apprentices do the job. ｜ 以洋葱为基础的汤。将洋葱炒至焦褐色，加入高汤炖煮。装入汤盅，盖上面包片并撒上奶酪进行烘烤。老练的厨师都有个切洋葱绝对不会流泪的小窍门，那就是——让学徒帮忙切洋葱。
- Alright, let's go. Hehehe, now this'll make for quite the story! ｜ 那我们快走吧。嘿嘿，回去有好的话题可以炫耀了。
- Give me a second while I mix the Concresoil... ｜ 请你稍等一下，我现在就调配一下凝成泥土…
- Six days ago, a group of us left the site to attend to other matters. When we returned, the four men we'd left behind had vanished. ｜ 六天前我带几个伙计外出办事，一回来，就听说留守的四个兄弟不见了。
- ... But before I disappear, tell me what you have learned over these last few centuries. ｜ …趁着我还没有消失，和我说说你们这几百年的感悟吧。
- "Hard work is all there is to the craft! Just like love!" ｜ 「打铁的诀窍，只有汗水！爱情也一样。」
- Both parties have returned to their positions. Let us continue the trial. ｜ 双方都已经回到了位置上，那么我们的审判将继续进行。

- Fair enough. Well, I'm from the Scions of the Canopy. We live high in the mountains and have the closest ties to the Yumkasaurs. ｜ 行吧，我来自「悬木人」，我们的部族建在高山上，和「匿叶龙」的关系很亲密。
- It's alright. ｜ 没关系。
- (I feel sleepier whenever I remember one of his poems...) ｜ （一想到那家伙写的诗，感觉更困了…）
- I pursue the great task of extinguishing the Sign of Apaosha, and shall surely eliminate this dark corrosion and rescue all our flower ponds. But remember, Sefana, this was on account of your failings! ｜ 吾正遂行熄灭「焚真之天象」的伟业，必将祓除黯色的侵蚀，解救所有花池。但汝务必牢记，这是汝的失职！

- And don't you dare skimp on it, Kinich. ｜ 多带点肉，拜托。
- That won't do! We worked on this together and we should present it together. I can't take credit for what you did. ｜ 这怎么行呢！既然是我们两人合作完成的，就应该一起出面。我不能抢了砂糖小姐的功劳。

- Keep following Kamisato Ayaka ｜ 继续跟随神里绫华
- A popular mask cast in the image of a deity, as described in the legends. ｜ 依据传说中的神明形象制作的，十分流行的面具。
- The Ashvattha Tree has been corroded. But from its fruit, Arama seems to have gained new knowledge, memories, and... manners of speech. According to Arama, you should eliminate Marana's Avatar next so that the new Ashvattha Tree may be born. Only then can the Bija be formed. ｜ 「觉王树」已经被侵蚀了。但兰罗摩似乎通过结出的果实，获得了新的知识、记忆与…说话方式。接下来，依他的说法，应当要消灭「无留陀的化身」，让新的「觉王树」长出来。如此，才能结出惟耶之实。
- Fayz Trials ｜ 溢神的论证
- She started writing to him in Bernard's name, using what evidence she had compiled and the promise of enormous profits to blackmail him into cooperating with her. ｜ 一边以贝努瓦的名义写信，用搜集的罪证和巨额的利润，威逼利诱皮埃尔配合她的后续计划吧。

- Phew... New friend... Hoo... ｜ 呼啊…新朋友…呼…
- A lively area that encapsulates the energetic essence of a typical Children of Echoes street scene, with its large stage, eye-catching graffiti, and distinctive stone architecture.\nFrenzied dance battles and rhythmic percussion form the pulse of the Children of Echoes, and anyone immersed in such an atmosphere cannot help but feel the infectious excitement and passion wash over them, instilling them with a fresh sense of purpose. ｜ 云集了独特的石质建筑、醒目的墙壁涂鸦与大型舞台的区域，设计上参考自「回声之子」部族的街景。\n激情四射的斗舞与充满节奏感的敲打声，正是「回声之子」特有的脉搏。置身在这样的氛围中，想必也会被这些事物中所蕴含的热血所感染，从而迸发出更强的动力。
- Find the treasure clue nearby ｜ 在附近寻找宝藏的线索
- New Attributes Unlocked ｜ 新属性解锁
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Hey-Ha-Hoo Slime Box Trio.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『嘿哈唔史莱姆三姆组』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Edit Selected Furnishings ｜ 编辑选中摆设
- Does this miraculous coincidence have to do with Fontaine? ｜ 这种神奇的巧合，来自枫丹吗？
- Still, Parvaneh said that this seasoning would make any dish especially delicious! ｜ 不过芭尔瓦涅说，只要加入那种调料，无论是什么菜都会变得格外美味！
- Limner, Dreamer, and Robotic Dog ｜ 画、梦境和机器狗
- If the place collapsed, the consequences would be disastrous... Let's head back. ｜ 一旦坍塌，后果不堪设想…还是先回去吧。
- I shall find rooms for our respected guests. ｜ 我先去找找合适的房间，安排给我们两位尊贵的客人。
- I need to read it a little more... ｜ 我要再读一读…

- It's good as long as you like it. ｜ 你们喜欢就好。
- Hmm... Is it just me, or have my interests become more domestic in nature since I met you...? ｜ 嗯…难道是跟你认识了之后，爱好也向居家的方向转变了吗。
- Sure thing. ｜ 当然可以啊。

- Are you sure you aren't pushing yourself too hard? ｜ 是不是有些太过勉强自己了？
- Uhh, how should I describe it? Would it be easier to just make some sound up like you suggested, Paimon? ｜ 这个，要怎么描述才好…说不定，像派蒙说的那样，编个声音更合适？
- ...Phew. ｜ …呼。
- I'm Moyan, the village accountant. I sometimes also help the others with odd jobs here and there. ｜ 我是莫妍，翘英庄的会计，有时也会帮庄里的父老乡亲们干点杂活。
- Well, since Khaenri'ah is involved... ｜ 既然与坎瑞亚相关…
- Hehehe, well, well, well... Off we go then! ｜ 嘻嘻，原来如此…原来如此，那我们走吧。
- That's so much work... ｜ 好繁琐…
- Huh? When did these candles light up? Weird... ｜ 欸？这些蜡烛是什么时候亮起来的？奇怪…
- #But if the Big Iron Chunks that Aradasha put away have been defeated by {NICKNAME}, why did you want us to come here? ｜ #所以，兰帝裟锁住的那些「大大铁块」，全都被{NICKNAME}打倒了，为什么还要我们过来呢…
- Is there anything you'd like to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- A crown made of obsidian that in ancient times was used in coronation ceremonies by noble tribal kings. ｜ 用黑曜石制作的宝冠，在古时曾用于部族中高贵王酋的加冕仪式。

- Feel free to let me know if you need any herbs. I'll do my best to get you some. ｜ 若您需要药材的话，可以跟我讲，我会想办法帮您采回来。
- It's no coincidence that we both noticed it. I'm sure he's watching us. ｜ 既然你也这么说，那他果然是在看我们。

- Whoa! That Sumpter Beast's charging, now that's what Paimon calls energy! ｜ 哇！那只驮兽冲出来了，真有精神！
- I've already asked Mr. Wagner to forge a super heavy single-handed sword for me, though I'm not sure when he'll finish it... ｜ 我已经拜托瓦格纳先生帮忙打造一柄超级加重的单手剑了，也不知道他什么时候能造好…
- Just like my daddy always says, a word in the head is worth two in the brush! Wait... no, that's not it... ｜ 我爸爸常说，好记性不如烂笔头…啊，这句话好像不是用在这的…

- Being strict is actually what's best for children, don't you think? ｜ 严厉一点才是为孩子着想，你说是吧？
- We youkai are different from humans, we have longer lifespans and different natures... But we share the same world, we interact with one another, we are drawn to one another, and will eventually part ways. ｜ 我们与人类寿命不同、天性不同，却生活在同一片土地，相互接触、相互吸引，最终匆匆离别。
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Thanks, Ayato. ｜ 多谢多谢。
- #So, what do you want to leave behind, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你想留下什么东西呢？
- Are you still... cautiously pessimistic? ｜ 你还抱着谨慎悲观的态度吗？
- I never changed anything about the formula or its proportions, I swear. As such, this must have been due to... Um, some unforeseen circumstances. ｜ 我发誓，我绝对没有修改任何配方或者投药比例。一定是…呃，出现了什么预期外的情况。
- Ann ｜ 安
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- "Th—Things are slipping out of control!" ｜ 「局面…局面要失控了！」
- I'll need the Pilgrim's Chronicle back when I'm ready to forge the name. If there are still adventures you want to record, better finish them before then. ｜ 等到打造准备就绪的时候，我会暂时从你手中收回圣夜旅织。如果你有什么想要记录的冒险，最好在那之前完成。
- Is this what you were looking for? ｜ 这个是你要找的东西吗？
- Faced with a calamity of such magnitude, we have agreed to put our differences aside for now and unite against this common enemy. ｜ 诸位仙家的意思是，当此危难之时，仙人与七星也该暂时放下不和，共同对敌。

- This does sound like a job worth devoting your life to, but Paimon thinks there are a lot of things you haven't figured out... ｜ 听起来的确是值得为之奋斗终身的事业，但总觉得中间有很多误解…
- Surrounded by such peace and tranquility, I also seem to have developed a proclivity for inactivity. ｜ 一到这边，整个人多少也变得懒散起来。
- To make Shocking Essential Oil, you will need some electro crystal and a frog. ｜ 想要炼成「惊雷精油」，需要的原料是电气水晶和青蛙。
- Ah, little Paimon. That bright-eyed enthusiasm is exactly what Ningguang needs... She's conscripting you, by the way. Got some real back-breaking work lined up for you. ｜ 小派蒙，好久不见，你还是这么活泼，是个好苦力啊，等会凝光少不了你活干。

- You're my assistant, remember? ｜ 记得吗？你们是我的助手。

- Even the ever-present sound of the wind fell silent in that place. It was quite miraculous. I can only assume that it must have been the treasure trove of a fabled Liyue adeptus. ｜ 就连风中一直吵闹的杂音也在那偃息了。此等神异，我猜测，那就是璃月传说中的仙家宝地吧？
- This is an ordinary Holding Pot created by the organizer, which will award <color=#ffcc33>25 points</color> when hit. ｜ 「容壶」是主办方设置的普通容壶，击中后可以获得<color=#ffcc33>25分</color>。
- For people like me, the best I can do is try and hold my own as a lone fighter. ｜ 像我这样的，只能学习独自作战啦。
- Increases all party members' DEF by <color=#3399CCFF>88–126</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色防御力提高<color=#3399CCFF>88-126</color>点，持续300秒。
- You see, the mines have been closed due to recent events. ｜ 是这样的，因为最近的那些事情，矿井已经封闭了。
- I... I'm fine. Clearly, I must have made my poem too abstract. Ziwei didn't get it at all. ｜ 我…我没事，一定是我写得太隐晦了，紫微没有看懂。
- It was once an entrance to a place deeper underwater still, where the power of the "Symphony" yet lingers. We must go and check for any further anomalies there. ｜ 但在过去那曾是可以通向水下更深处的入口，「乐章」的力量还残留在那里，也需去确认一下是否有异变发生。
- A detailed step-by-step diagram for making a Nutrition, Ready-to-Eat (NRE) meal-in-a-pouch. Learn it and you can create a tool that makes ingesting food much quicker. ｜ 步骤详实的图谱，记载着「叁零式·便携营养袋」的制作方法。掌握后，可以制作让人能快速进食的道具。
- How should the recipient of this gift envelope be addressed... ｜ 对于会收到这份祝柬的人，应当用何称呼…
- I've said this before, and I'll say it again. ｜ 我说过很多次了。
- Get rid of these people. As for your pay... Will seven times the original amount do? ｜ 处理掉这些人。至于报酬的话…我想想，原本七倍的佣金够吗？
- Oh, also, my friend runs the best restaurant in Liyue. I'm sure you'll love it. ｜ 哦对，璃月最好吃的饭店是我朋友家经营的，你们肯定喜欢。
- Let's get out of here and find somewhere safer. ｜ 先出去，换个安全的地方。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Walk in seven clockwise circles, then walk in seven anticlockwise circles, then open your eyes...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Are you sleepwalking?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Nope! Paimon is just trying to see if that antique shop from "Heart's Desire" actually exists!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well, assuming that a shop in a story does exist, what would you like to buy, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> A Slime Creator!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Does such a thing even exist? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>顺时针走七圈，逆时针走七圈，再睁开眼睛…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>你在梦游吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>才没有呢！我只是想看看《碎梦奇珍》里的那家古董店，是不是真的存在！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>假如故事里的古董店真的存在，派蒙想要买什么宝物呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>史莱姆生成器！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>真的会存在那种东西吗…

- An often-seen Inazuman building that has had its two floors spliced together before it was divided horizontally into two sections. The original single-story area was designed as a restaurant, but some creative finagling by business people has seen it used to divide guests and staff. As such, one can see this construction used in many a restaurant or bookstore. ｜ 极为通用的稻妻建筑，单双楼层拼接，结构上横向划为两大分区。原本横置的单层区域是作为餐厅设计的，但在灵活变通的经商之人规划下，恰好可以用来将客人与工作人员分流，因此，稻妻城内可见采用这种建筑的料理亭和书店。

- A noble elemental lifeform that dwells within bodies of pure water. In combat, it will expend and condense its life force into Hydro Mimics that attack its enemies. Although they are all aligned with Hydro, <color=#FFE14BFF>different elements that react with Hydro</color> are effective against different Hydro Mimics. Defeat these Mimics rapidly to overcome the Oceanid with ease. ｜ 踞身纯净水体的高贵元素生命体。战斗时，会用自己的生命力凝聚成水元素幻形生物，攻击敌人。尽管都是水元素，不同的<color=#FFE14BFF>能与水元素反应的元素</color>对不同的幻形生物会更有效果。如果能快速消灭水之幻形，就能轻松击败纯水精灵。

- The name Lawrence only became a social stigma after the clan fell from grace. It was once an honor to be called a Lawrence, but unfortunately, most people have forgotten about that part of history. The Grand Master says that I am performing rather well as a knight, and that if it's not enough to restore the honor of the Lawrence name, it's certainly a strong rebuttal against the one-sided opinions so many people throw around. I'm quite satisfied with that appraisal. ｜ 劳伦斯家族是在堕落后才背负恶名的，在此之前，这个姓氏也曾满载荣耀，可惜所有人都像是忘掉了那段历史。大团长说我作为骑士，干得还算不错，不说找回劳伦斯最初的荣光，至少是对片面观点的迎头痛击。这个说法倒是挺合我意的。

- Performance Assistance: When your Performance Level is 1/2/3 respectively, all party members' DEF increases by <color=#FFCC33>40%/100%/200%</color>.\nAdditionally, if your Performance Level is 3, when your character uses an <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color>, unleash a <color=#FFCC33>Knightwave</color> at the character's position that deals True DMG to nearby opponents. 1 <color=#FFCC33>Knightwave</color> can be produced in this way every 3s. ｜ 「助演增益」：「表现等级」分别为1/2/3级时，队伍中所有角色的防御力提升<color=#FFCC33>40%/100%/200%</color>。\n另外，若「表现等级」为3级，角色施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>时，将在角色的位置释放<color=#FFCC33>「骑士冲击波」</color>，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，每3秒至多通过这种方式释放一次<color=#FFCC33>「骑士冲击波」</color>。

- When your opponent generates a falling block, <color=#F39000>2</color> random regular blocks on their field will gain <color=#2bb7d5>Blizzard</color>.\n<color=#2bb7d5>Blizzard</color>: If a block with this effect is not cleared in the current block-fall, an ice explosion will be triggered, causing up to 8 surrounding regular blocks to gain <color=#2bb7d5>Frost Curse</color>.\n<color=#2bb7d5>Frost Curse</color>: Blocks with this effect cannot be cleared. This effect will expire when an adjacent regular block is cleared. ｜ 对手下落方块生成时，使其场地中随机<color=#F39000>2</color>个普通方块获得<color=#2bb7d5>「冰灾」</color>。\n<color=#2bb7d5>「冰灾」</color>：若持有此效果的方块在当次下落未被消除则触发冰爆，使周边至多8个普通方块获得<color=#2bb7d5>「霜咒」</color>。\n<color=#2bb7d5>「霜咒」</color>：持有此效果的方块无法被消除，此效果在紧邻的普通方块被消除时解除。

- An elegant furnishing crafted out of flawless white porcelain. It seems to have evolved from an age-old Liyue instrument, like a manifestation of a thousand celestial larks. This furnishing can reproduce melodious tunes, restore each delicate note, and let the music drift with the wind to every corner of the Realm Within.\nLong before the Archon War, music became an essential part of people's lives: uplifting songs were sung during hard work; solemn music was played during important ceremonies; the battle cry of drums before going to war... Some adepti would record the melodies circulating around Liyue and enjoy them quietly in the Realm Within. Some friendly guests would bring music from neighboring countries so that the adepti could savor the songs of the people when they lived in seclusion. ｜ 以光洁无瑕的白瓷打造的雅致陈设，似乎演化自某种年代久远的璃月乐器，宛如千种天籁具象之物。这种摆设能将悠扬的旋律再现，还原每个细腻的音符，让乐音随风飘散至壶中洞天的每个角落。\n早在魔神战争之前，音乐就成为了人们生活中必不可少的一部分：在辛勤劳作时传唱明快的歌谣；在重要的典仪期间庄严奏乐；在出征之前擂鼓高歌…某些仙人会将璃月各地流传的韵律记录下来，在壶中洞天静静欣赏。而个别友好的客人则会带来邻国的音乐，以便仙人们隐居时品味音律中蕴含的人间韵致。

- Completely unleashes Mehrak's energy and creates a cubic scanned space, dealing <color=#99FF88FF>AoE Dendro DMG</color> to all opponents within it, causing all Dendro Cores in its AoE to immediately burst, and granting Kaveh the following enhanced combat abilities for a specific duration:\n·Increases Kaveh's Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attack AoE, and converts his attack DMG to <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color> that cannot be overridden.\n·All Dendro Cores created by all your own party members through Bloom reactions will deal additional DMG when they burst.\n·Increases Kaveh's resistance to interruption.\nThese effects will be canceled once Kaveh leaves the field.\n\n<i>"Every building style includes the architect's unique worldview, and from this angle, one can say that the buildings themselves are coalescences of human memories."</i> ｜ 完全释放「梅赫拉克」的能量，划分立方体状的测绘空间，对空间内的敌人造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素范围伤害</color>，使范围内的所有草原核立即迸发，并在一定时间内强化卡维的作战能力：\n·提高卡维的普通攻击、重击与下落攻击的攻击范围，并将攻击伤害转为无法被附魔覆盖的<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>；\n·队伍中自己的角色触发绽放反应产生的草原核，在迸发时造成的伤害提升；\n·提高卡维的抗打断能力。\n效果将在卡维退场时解除。\n\n<i>「每一种建筑形式都包含了建造者对于世界的独特思考，从这一角度而言，可以说建筑本身就是人们凝固的记忆。」</i>

Wait, should it be your shoulders or your back?\nWell, whatever the case, time to put your back and/or shoulders into it! - He showed me a lot of his travelogues! ｜ 他还给我看过不少「游记」呢！
- A colossal library that stands at the center of the Sumeru Akademiya. It was once acknowledged as the bank of all knowledge across the world due to its unparalleled, all-encompassing book collection, but with the march of time, its status has diminished. Nevertheless, this ancient library still stands as a symbol of Sumeru, "the Nation of Wisdom." ｜ 矗立在教令院中心的巨大图书馆。在过去，因为其无所不包的丰富馆藏而被誉为汇聚地上一切知识的宝库，不过随着时代发展其地位已大不如前。尽管如此，这座古老的图书馆如今依旧是须弥作为「智慧之国」的象征。
- I don't know what his motivations could be, but he seems genuine about wanting to help me. He treats me just like family. Oh, and speaking of family — Tonia and Teucer are always telling me about the pastries and other gifts he brings them when they write. So while I've been away from Snezhnaya, he's kept his promise to take care of my family. ｜ 我不懂什么人情世故。但我知道，他是真心想要帮助我的。他看我的眼神，就像看待家人一样。哦，说到这个，冬妮娅和托克给我回信的时候，时常提到他送去家里的馅饼和礼物。在我暂别冬都期间，他确实按照约定，照顾好了我的家人们。
- I'll help you look for him in a bit. I'm sure he's fine, maybe he's just hanging out with someone else's kids and lost track of time. ｜ 待会儿我去帮你找他，他肯定没事的，说不定又跟谁家的孩子一起在外边玩，忘记了时间而已。
- I wanna rest a while longer... ｜ 我要再休息一下…

- I am a Kshahrewar researcher and have been dealing with machines for many years. I used to like collecting scrapped Ruin Guards to trying to get their parts out, although that never worked. However, my enthusiasm never waned until I encountered a mechanical monster {0} that seemed to have the same origin as the Ruin Guard. I nearly lost my life, and it was only then that I realized the dangers of these machines... Since then, I've never dared to walk around the scrapped Ruin Guards... Doctor, how do you think I'm supposed to overcome this mental barrier? ｜ 我是妙论派的学者，研究机械很多年了。以前我会寻找一些停止运转的「遗迹守卫」，尝试取出它们的零件，尽管从来没成功过，但我相信自己的热情不会消退，直到我{0}遇见了一台…似乎和「遗迹守卫」同源的机械魔物，差点丢掉性命，才意识到这种机械的危险性…自打那以后，我就再也不敢在停止运转的「遗迹守卫」周围晃荡了…医生，你觉得我要怎么克服这种心理障碍？

- (Present you now your <color=#00E1FFFF>armor</color> strong, that guards your heart lest it go wrong.) ｜ （于此奉上<color=#00E1FFFF>甲胄</color>，护佑不变的本心。）
- Highly springy noodles. The snow-white, soft yet elastic udon, and the elegantly flavored soup combine to make a simple but comforting dish. The faintest scent of wheat may eventually travel down into your belly together with the sweet noodles, but the aftertaste of warmth will remain. ｜ 韧劲十足的面食。雪白柔韧的乌冬，加上清雅的汤汁，简单的美味却足以慰藉人心。淡淡的麦香随着柔软甘甜的面条一起滑入胃中，温暖的回味却漾上心头。
- {0} has not yet finished the prerequisite quest(s). This player cannot participate in "Spino Blaster." ｜ 玩家{0}未完成前置任务，无法参与「飞迸湍流大作战」
- Attaining the rank of "Meikai" requires one to decipher the workings of the world, transcend its limitations, and fathom all phenomena within. Usually, any who reach this level are granted a Vision and a lifespan far beyond that of the average kitsune. ｜ 升为「明阶」，即要求进入天地明察的境界，神通宇内，世事洞明。只要进入了这个境界，一般都会受获神之眼，拥有远超一般狐族的悠长寿命了哦。

- After the character's Normal Attack hits an opponent, the Physical or Elemental RES of this opponent will <color=#F39000FF>decrease by 6%</color> for 2s, matching the Attribute of that attack. This can stack up to <color=#F39000FF>6</color> times. RES decreases of different types can co-exist, and their stacks and timers will be independent of each other. ｜ 角色的普通攻击命中敌人后，基于攻击类型对应的物理抗性或元素抗性，该敌人的<color=#F39000FF>此抗性降低6%</color>，持续2秒，至多叠加<color=#F39000FF>6</color>层，通过这种方式施加的不同属性的抗性降低可以同时存在，独立计算叠加层数与持续时间。

- Something has appeared. Everyone, we can take a closer look, but please be on guard. ｜ 确实有东西出现了。各位，可以靠近查看，但请务必保持警戒。
- Whoa... Paimon was not expecting the volcano to look like this on the inside... ｜ 哇，没想到火山里面，居然是这样的…
- Aaahhh! Where did you two come from... and how do you know my name? ｜ 吓死我了！你们两个是从哪冒出来的…怎么还知道我的名字？
- A Xiao Lantern... Ugh, I forgot! What's with my memory today... ｜ 霄灯…哎哟！我给忘了，你说我这记性…

- To put it simply, we were afraid that our shows would lose their meaning if people couldn't understand them... ｜ 简单来说，就是担心大家会看不懂，觉得没意思…

- Seems like now there's nothing left for us to do but to go to sleep. But Paimon's still so worried! Paimon won't be able to sleep a wink tonight... ｜ 只能睡觉了吗…可是我很害怕，一定睡不着的…
- Mm... beautifully tender and cooked to perfection. No wonder it's their signature dish. It's a shame I can't have more, but a witch must watch her physique. ｜ 肉质鲜嫩，口感还不错吧，不愧是招牌。可惜我没法吃太多，保持体态也是魔女的必修课。
- Well... I think using a musical instrument works too. ｜ 虽然说唱歌，但借助乐器也可以吧。
- He also mentioned that they were a gang of five people, the leader's name is Kousuke, and the second-in-command is called Yasuhisa. The leader's scent indicated he was probably from the Narukami Island area, while the two newcomers in the team were more likely from somewhere else. ｜ 盗宝团总共有五个人，老大的名字是康介，二把手叫做泰久。听老大的口音应该是鸣神岛出身，而队伍内的两名新人则来自于…

- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Dawn</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>黎明</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- In ancient times when Axis Mundi was unobstructed, there were nine realms, each a world of its own. The realm of humans was known as the Zhongzhou, while the gods reside in Shenxiao.\nAt the end of the last calamity, a war between the gods broke out. The God King fell, setting the nine realms ablaze, obliterating all living things. The realms have now been born anew, life again thrives, but the passageway between the nine realms by Axis Mundi has been sealed off.\nAn all-new graphic novel on the epic journey in search of the God-King's Halberd begins! ｜ 太古之时，九洲互具，昆仑尚开。人住之土，名称「中洲」；神在之界，则唤「神霄」。\n上一劫劫末之时，曾有神魔交战；最终神王折戟，九界火焚，万象化灰。\n如今新世伊始，万类更生。昆仑闭合，诸世界不复相通。\n围绕着神王之戟展开的新感觉武侠绘卷，启封！

- A list of guests and their time of arrival on ships bound for the Irodori Festival.\nYour task is to welcome and lend your aid to guests according to the information presented in this schedule. ｜ 写有容彩祭嘉宾乘坐船只信息的时刻表。\n你的任务就是根据这张表上的信息，到离岛的港口接引嘉宾，并为他们提供帮助。

- The nation of Saurians beckons — an all-new odyssey is about to begin.\nNew adventures, new encounters, and a vast world that keeps unfurling like a neverending scroll.\nStanding silently in the midst of that strange land, the Stadium of the Sacred Flame awaits the arrival of heroes... ｜ 向着龙的国度，冒险即将起航。\n新的旅程、新的邂逅，广袤的世界如同不断延展的画卷。\n在那陌生的土地上，圣火竞技场无声矗立，等待着英雄的到来…
- Well, let's record it down and tell Kaniwa afterward. ｜ 总之，先记下来，回头告诉鹿庭先生吧。

- You can use the invitation board and connect with your friends via Co-Op to engage in matchmaking. As your Player Level grows, you can also challenge faraway strangers to duels of skill. ｜ 可以通过邀请板，邀请联机状态下的好友进行对决。随着牌手等级的提升，还能与远方的陌生牌手进行对局。

- Seems like they really don't want to talk to us, so let's just head back... ｜ 他们表现得好像很抗拒，还是先回去吧。
- Wha— You want Paimon to go chase it? Seriously? ｜ 欸，我去追？我么？
- What exactly is Xiao wrestling with?\nTo those in Liyue's corridors of power, Xiao's battle is against the evil manifestations produced by the remnants of defeated gods.\nHowever, if you asked Xiao the same question, he may well give you an entirely different answer.\nXiao was once enslaved by an evil god and suffered immensely under their rule until finally regaining his freedom thanks to Rex Lapis.\nXiao's powers were highly regarded by the adepti and he seemed to vanquish all manner of evil demons with consummate ease.\nBut the evil gods also held immense power, and their lust for revenge ran deeper than mere mortals could ever contemplate. Xiao relentlessly slaughtered the endless, impure manifestations of their vengeful souls, but in doing so, he caused them to fracture. Eventually, these fragments of their hatred were able to taint Xiao's own soul.\nThe only way to eradicate such hatred is to accept the karmic debt it brings. The magnitude of the bad karma Xiao has accumulated over the years is enough to consume flesh, bone, and soul alike.\nAnd yet, Xiao does not feel any hatred. Having lived for over two thousand years, no single karmic debt constitutes anything more than a fleeting memory.\nNo grudge can last a thousand years, nor is any debt so great that it cannot be paid off in this time.\nXiao has spent many long years alone.\nBut his battles have never been in vain.\nBecause ultimately, the one with whom Xiao wrestles is himself. ｜ 魈究竟在与什么战斗？\n依璃月当权者之见，他是在与魔神残渣引发的恶象战斗。\n可若直截了当地问他本人，未必能得到这一答案。\n魈曾经被邪恶神明使役，历经苦难，直到岩王帝君出现，才得以重获自由。\n其神通本领乃是仙家翘楚，降妖除魔对他而言并无难度。\n但魔神力量巨大，憎恨与执念也非常人可及。魈不断斩杀从它们残骸中滋生的秽物，那些憎恨便化为碎片，污染魈的精神。\n要消灭这种恨意，必须背负它们的「业障」。经年累月积累的业，足以灼心蚀骨。\n魈却不感到憎恨。他的生命长达两千年，一切恩仇之于他，只是过眼云烟。\n不存在千年难释的恨，也不存在千年难报的恩。\n岁月茫茫，唯有自己陪伴着自己。\n魈的战斗，始终有其意义。\n他一直都在和自己战斗。
- I don't need any help here, why don't you try asking someone else? ｜ 我这里没什么需要帮忙的，去看看其他人吧。
- Cyrus is also disappointed. He's always valued you as a proud disciple. ｜ 居勒什老师也很失望，他一直很看重你这个得意弟子。

- Is it just like last time? ｜ 和上次一样吗…
- The Fane of Ashvattha is over there. It's my first time visiting it! How exciting! ｜ 觉王之殿在那边。第一次去，感觉好兴奋！
- Paimon's had enough! This is too mysterious! ｜ 不行，太神秘了！
- Unlike my friends, I don't have a long time to live. All said and done, the story of my life will be shorter than the fairy tales in this book. So, I will have to leave your side, I'm afraid. ｜ 我的生命不像我的朋友们，也不像这本童话书那么漫长…恐怕没法一直陪伴在你身边了。
- I just, uh... Sometimes, I get too excited to see the ending and read too fast, so I end up forgetting to record some words that I don't know yet... ｜ 就是有的时候因为太想知道结局，中间看得太快，所以好多不认识的字都没有仔细记下来…

- As such, I've made some small changes to today's theme to perhaps help open up a new line of thought for your consideration. ｜ 因此，今天的「花题」将稍有变化，在两位的构图思维中开垦一方新的培土。

- According to folklore, spirits of drowned people exist in haunted bodies of water, so I tried to see if it was true by shoving a stick in a lake... And it actually got stuck! In all the seaweed, I mean. I can only imagine what would happen if you tried to go swimming. Not getting stuck would be more unusual...\nOh, I also heard that you shouldn't eat sunsettias after sunset or peel an apple in front of a mirror at midnight... Huh, I wonder if there's truth to any of those folk legends... ｜ 之前我特别想要求证溺鬼的传说，就用棍子伸进闹水鬼的湖里…结果棍子真的被拽住了！水下面全是水草！要是下去游泳不被缠住才怪了…\n我还听说，日落后不要吃日落果，半夜时分不能对着镜子削苹果，这里头到底有什么依据呢…唔…

- Recalling her slaying of the great beast Haishan, Beidou calls upon that monstrous strength and the lightning to create a Thunderbeast's Targe around herself, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> to nearby opponents.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Thunderbeast's Targe</color>\n·When Normal and Charged Attacks hit, they create a lightning discharge that can jump between opponents, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>.\n·Increases the character's resistance to interruption, and decreases DMG taken.\n\nA maximum of 1 lightning discharge can be triggered per second.\n\n<i>With a peal of thunder, Haishan is slain.</i> ｜ 重忆斩灭海山巨兽之战，唤起巨兽与雷电的力量，创造环绕自身的雷兽之盾，并对周围的敌人造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>雷兽之盾</color>\n·普通攻击与重击命中时，释放雷电之力，引来1道能在敌人之间跃动的闪雷，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>；\n·提高角色的抗打断能力，并降低受到的伤害。\n\n每秒至多触发1道闪雷。\n\n<i>赫赫雷来，斫灭海山。</i>

- Well, that should do it. All we need to do now is wait for those Treasure Hoarders to walk into our trap. ｜ 这样就可以了，我们就等着那群盗宝团来自投罗网吧。
- Oh, before I forget, this is for you. ｜ 对了，这个给你。
- Bantan Sango Detective Agency is in need of manpower, and they requested your help specifically in investigating the "large scale disappearance of many small animals." ｜ 万端珊瑚侦探社那边需要人手，指明希望你能帮忙调查「小动物大量失踪奇案」。
- Open the Quest Menu to view details regarding Sosi's commission ｜ 开启任务面板以查看索希的委托详情
- Plunge DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param6:F1P}
- You, the one stealing food outside. Take me with you. ｜ 在外面偷吃的人，带上我。
- Right you are, Petit Chou. Let's go! ｜ 嗯，小卷心菜说得对。我们走吧！
- That sounds preposterous... ｜ 听起来多少有些离谱…
- This jade pendant... ｜ 这枚玉佩…
- When that day comes, I can serve as your adviser. Wouldn't that be nice? ｜ 等到那时，我来给你当幕僚，这样好像也不错？
- "Everyone dies... And I wish, before I depart, to do a final meaningful deed, which is to scatter Golden Rose seeds in the desert. The shifting sands and animals will whisk them away, even to the furthest corners of the desert." ｜ 「人总要迎来终点。在我离开之前，最后一件有意义的事就是把金蔷薇的种子撒向整个沙漠。流沙和动物们会帮我把她们带到沙漠的各个角落去。」
- Rotate ｜ 旋转
- Ignite the braziers (3/6) ｜ 点燃传火盆(3/6)
- And look, there's something over there... ｜ 看那里，是不是有什么东西…
- Haw-haw... The supreme wisdom that connects the starry sky and the world below has revealed the future. These locations will be struck by stars falling from the sky. Precisely as the prophecy of Picatrix foresaw. ｜ 哼哼…连接大地与星天的智慧已经揭示了未来。这些地方将会有坠落的天星。正如毕加特里斯奥秘的预言。
- Although they've caused us trouble in the past, the Fungi aren't just aggressive monsters, right? They're more like... wild animals with bad tempers. ｜ 唔…虽然蕈兽以前给我们造成过麻烦，但也不全是穷凶极恶的坏东西吧？更像是…脾气不太好的野生生物？
- The responsibility of preventing people from leaking secrets using Kameras should logically fall to Gattineo. ｜ 防止有人用留影机泄密这件事，理应由加特尼奥先生负责。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Production Rack: Custom Build.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「生产用货架-『改造型』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Consecrated Flying Serpent ｜ 圣骸飞蛇
- We should be getting close. Be careful. ｜ 应该差不多就是附近了，稍微留心一下。
- What are you up to? ｜ 你在忙什么？
- Haha, it's like you're a mind-reader... You know as well as I do that being too attached is a fatal flaw for a funeral director. It's a vice that's all too easy to fall prey to... ｜ 哈哈，客卿真是人精…你也知道，当堂主最忌讳的就是舍不得，可谁又会忌讳一件不存在的事情呢…
- Mm-hmm! Here it comes! I think I'm about to strike gold! ｜ 嗯哼！来了来了，我有一种预感，很快就能挖到好东西了。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Hunter ｜ 猎手
- Read Razor's letter ｜ 阅读雷泽的来信
- Huh? What do I enjoy? Simple. I like to find a quiet place by myself and read books on strategy... Ahh, the whole day, without interruption. I'd be even happier if we looked over some of it together. One thing though... You'd have to sleep on the floor. ｜ 喜欢的事情？我想要找一个安静的地方读兵书，读一天都不会有人来打扰的那种。如果你想跟我一起研究兵法的话，我也是很欢迎的。不过…你得睡地板。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Eh? What's a Paimon? ｜ 欸，那是啥啊？
- Also, we are backed by Her Excellency and General Gorou. The two of them are both brave and thoughtful leaders. They will lead us to victory. ｜ 更何况我们这边有珊瑚宫大人和五郎大人在，二位都是胆识惊人、深谋远虑的领导者，一定会带领我们走向胜利。
- A hero known as the "Giant," pride of the People of the Springs, renowned throughout the lands for his bravery and prowess in battle... ｜ 被称作「巨人」的英杰，「流泉之众」的骄傲，以勇烈善战闻名世间…
- ... ｜ ………………
- Balent ｜ 巴朗
- About Sakura Blooms ｜ 关于绯樱绣球…
- Everyone at Hotel Bouffes d'ete, including The Knave, has their roots in Fontaine. And we will always defend our homeland. ｜ 布法蒂公馆的大家，包括「仆人」大人她自己，都是枫丹人，我们不会放弃守护自己的故乡。
- Chiori ｜ 千织
- Alright then. ｜ 好吧。
- Located in Non-Outdoor Area ｜ 位于非露天区域
- Huh, okay then... Wait, no no no, there must be more to it! If that's all it took for her to have a change of heart, how did it take her ten whole years? ｜ 原来如此——不对啊，要是这么简单就良心发现，这十年她干什么去了？
- Investigate ｜ 调查
- Is there no other way? ｜ 没有别的办法了吗？
- Halt! ｜ 且慢！
- Celebration: Tuneful Delight ｜ 庆典·倾耳
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- But I wanted to give you an opportunity for a mental workout. ｜ 我反而有些开心呢。
- "Friends will stroll through the forest again."\n"That which is good will return, and the painful memories will vanish. Just like a stream purifying itself or a withered tree sprouting once more." ｜ 「挚友将再次同行于茂密的森林中。」\n「一切美好的事物终将归来，一切痛苦的记忆也会远去，就像溪水净化自己，枯树绽出新芽。」
- Complete "Akasha Pulses, the Kalpa Flame Rises" ｜ 完成「虚空鼓动，劫火高扬」剧情
- I hereby declare that every son and daughter of the City of the Wind must be compelled to taste this finest of wines... Here's to good wine! ｜ 嗯嗯…应该让每一个风的子民都好好尝尝这酒，为了美酒，干杯！
- "Inazuma seems to have become a lot more quiet. Friends who used to be talkative are now mostly silent." ｜ 「似乎稻妻城里也冷清了许多，以往无言不欢的朋友，如今也变得三缄其口。」
- Plunge DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Fischl and I accepted a commission to investigate the whereabouts of a certain band of Treasure Hoarders. ｜ 原本我和菲谢尔接了委托，要追查一群盗宝团的下落…
- Whoa, this is denser than the encyclopedias in the Mondstadt Library! So are you like, a music scholar? Collector? Librarian? ｜ 哇，这简直比蒙德图书馆里的百科全书还要厚！你就是音乐界的学者？收藏家？图书管理员？
- Hahaha, I'm glad to bring you some peace of mind. Just enjoy your vacation to the fullest, and don't forget to tell me all about the marvelous mirages when you get back. ｜ 啊哈哈，能让你放心些就好。你们就尽情地玩吧，等你回来，别忘了将海岛上的美丽幻境仔细说给我听。
- I've even come up with a "secret strategy" that's sure to catch you all off guard! ｜ 我还准备了「秘密战术」呢，到时候肯定会吓你们一跳。
- Strengthening Brew ｜ 强健合剂
- Complete the photo-taking quest ｜ 完成留影任务
- Eide ｜ 埃德
- Crux: <color=#f39000>HP Increases or Decreases</color>\nAfter a character's HP increases or decreases, the basic amount of points scored by defeating each opponent will increase by <color=#f39000>1</color> for the duration of this drill. This effect can occur once every <color=#f39000>3</color>s. ｜ 要点：<color=#f39000>生命值提升或降低</color>\n角色的当前生命值提升或降低后，本次演武中每名敌人被击败时所提供的基础得分将增加<color=#f39000>1</color>，此效果至多每<color=#f39000>3</color>秒触发一次。
- Don't forget your things, and watch your step as you get off the raft or, you're in for a swim. ｜ 东西拿好先，下船时要看脚下，踩空了就要掉水里去咯。
- Collect the five lost books ｜ 收集丢失的五本图书
- My name is Lanxi, I've been waiting for someone for a long time now, exactly how long I couldn't really say. ｜ 我叫兰溪，一直在这里等一个人，已经数不清有多长时间了。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- You happen upon a hidden passageway in Ritou... ｜ 在离岛中，你偶然发现了一条隐秘的通道…
- This event has finished ｜ 当前活动已结束
- Golden Majesty ｜ 金璋皇极
- Then Cater taught me to put them into books to make pressed flowers. That way, my books would smell nice, too. Is this what they call the fragrance of knowledge? ｜ 之后呢，卡特哥哥教我把花放进书里，做成压花。这样，书上的字也都变得好香，这就是「知识的芬芳」吧？
- I remember that it induces a state of euphoria. ｜ 我记得有令人兴奋的作用。
- Haha, I remember two groups of us kids running around this big guy and play-fighting. ｜ 哈哈，我记得那个时候我们两群孩子还围着这个大家伙玩打仗游戏呢。
- Echo ｜ 回响
- "Inform all Black Serpent Knights to protect the people of Khaenri'ah at all costs." ｜ 「转告所有黑蛇骑士，不论如何，守护好坎瑞亚的人民。」
- I'm really sorry. It's up to all of us to do everything we can to save Natlan, so I've got to go. ｜ 真的很抱歉。拯救纳塔是每个人的责任，我得走了。
- Generally, I don't partake in activities like "chatting." ｜ 一般来说，我不会参与「聊天」这种活动。
- *sigh* But I don't know if anyone will believe me. ｜ 唔…但是这样说了别人也不相信。
- Paimon too! ｜ 嘿嘿，我也是！
- Talk to Kichiboushi ｜ 与吉法师对话
- I trust you all wish to know how the story proceeds? Listen closely, for all will be revealed in the next chapter... ｜ 欲知后事如何，且听我下回分解。
- Must be nice to be so carefree. ｜ 真是洒脱啊。
- (Will the legendary Xbalanque really participate? If he wins the whole thing, will Mavuika preside over the victory ceremony, too? The more I think about it, the more interesting it gets...) ｜ （传说中的希巴拉克真的会参加吗？如果他拿了第一，玛薇卡是不是还要给他颁奖啊？想想就很有趣。）
- ...Looks pretty deep. Be careful, everyone. ｜ …看来坑很深，大家注意安全。
- Corporal Mashkov ｜ 马什科夫下士
- I'm so happy for you, Leyla. Let's both give this our best shot, and who knows — we might both be beautiful cabbages one day. ｜ 勒拉，我为你高兴。以后要一起加油啊，希望我们都能成为一颗漂亮的卷心菜。
- It may take some time yet to discover the answer to "love"... ｜ 想找出「恋爱」的答案，或许还需要一段时间…
- Savings! That sounds pretty hefty... ｜ 存款！一听就很有分量…
- I remember I used to always stay home all by myself when I was little. I didn't really have any friends... In fact, I seldom spoke to anyone. ｜ 我记得我很小的时候，常常是一个人呆在家里。没什么朋友，也很少跟人说话。
- I will personally prepare the contract and notice that you'll need to sign for follow-up work. Until then... Mr. Nacker? ｜ 我会亲自为您准备后续工作所需签署的合约和须知，在那之前…纳克先生？
- Huh? Really!? But Paimon didn't see anything about that in today's papers. ｜ 咦？真的吗！今天的报纸上可没写这个呀。
- Allow me to introduce the winery's master brewer— ｜ 介绍一下，他是酒庄的酿造师…
- Hey, don't say that! You should know that you mean a lot to her too. She definitely won't forget the promise you two made to each other. ｜ 别这么说嘛！你明明知道，你对她来说也是很重要的。她一定不会忘记你们的约定的。
- ...Huh! ｜ ……唔！
- Sturdy walls of ice make up the core defense zone of this stage. The trick is to aim at the fulcrum of the enemy's defense formation... ｜ 坚硬的冰墙构成了这一棋阵的核心防区，要想突破对手的阵线，集中力量打击关键的支点，是不可或缺的战法…
- Based on Kachina's intel, Kinich wishes to return to the Stadium of the Sacred Flame to gather people and come to the rescue of the tribes under Abyssal attack. But in a chaotic moment such as this, it may be almost impossible to allocate manpower beyond the Stadium's defense... ｜ 根据卡齐娜的情报，基尼奇想要回圣火竞技场召集人手，前往遭受深渊魔物威胁的部族进行救援。但在无比混乱的当下，竞技场或许也难以匀出防守之外的人力…
- Since you're my Daddy, wouldn't it be natural that you'd be better than me? ｜ 既然是爸爸的话，那比我强应该很正常吧？
- Unlock the "Court of Fontaine" Teleport Waypoint in Fontaine ｜ 解锁「枫丹 枫丹廷」传送锚点
- What's ikebana? ｜ 插花是…
- Staff and equipment in position. Mechanisms are prepped and ready. ｜ 人员与设施准备停当，机关预热完毕。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- We were only able to arrest this gang thanks to the help of a researcher from the Fontaine Research Institute. I believe his name is Rawat. ｜ 这帮人被捕入狱，要多亏了一位枫丹科学院的研究员，我记得那位研究员的名字是叫拉瓦特来着。
- About Lisa ｜ 关于丽莎…
- Shrine Maiden for a Day ｜ 一日巫女
- Go to your destination and use the feather ｜ 前往目的地，使用「羽毛」
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Summary</color>\nGygax of Mondstadt has been improving Windtrace, adding all sorts of new design elements and renaming it "Windtrace: Seekers and Strategy." Now, he is also calling for volunteer test players. Take part to obtain Windtrace Coins and unlock different levels of rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 to take part in "Windtrace: Seekers and Strategy."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\n1. On each of the six days of the event after it has begun, the maximum number of Windtrace Coins you can collect is increased by 1,000.\n2. You can earn Windtrace Coins in Solo Mode and matchmade games alongside up to 2 friends. If you use the latter method, all the members of your party will be Rebels. You will be unable to obtain Windtrace Coins while playing together with 3 friends. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n蒙德城内的吉盖克斯改进了自己设计的「风行迷踪」，在其中加入了全新的设计，并将其命名为「风行迷踪·谋策之局」，并且，他也正在招募愿意试玩的玩家。参与试玩可赢取「迷踪币」，用于解锁不同等阶的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级后，才能参与「风行迷踪·谋策之局」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n1.活动开启后的六天内，每天将解锁1000枚「迷踪币」的获取上限。\n2.可以单人游玩，也可与最多两名好友共同游玩「匹配游戏」，并获取「迷踪币」，以此种方法游玩时，队伍内的全部玩家会强制扮演游侠阵营；与三名好友一起自行组队进行游戏时，无法获取「迷踪币」。
- It should be in a cave somewhere near here. Is my memory going or something? ｜ 哎呀，应该就在这附近的某个山洞里，难不成是我记错了吗？
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Visually, nautical charts are a little unique. Unlike land maps, most charts do not have a fixed scale, which means that it can be hard to precisely determine the exact distance between two points. ｜ 在表示方法上，海图采用的绘制法也比较特殊，因为不像陆地有显眼的参照，大多海图没有固定的比例尺，并不好判断准确的距离。
- Let's wait a little longer. ｜ 再等等吧。
- Being able to enjoy tea with my closest confidant — it feels like I'm in a dream... ｜ 能和最重要的人共享茶艺的乐趣，像发生在梦里一样…
- Magic is a performance art. A magician has to get creative to keep the audience on tenterhooks — that's our job. So I tweaked Cesar's original setup a little to keep it fresh. ｜ 魔术是表演的艺术，魔术师总得准备一些调动观众情绪的小妙招，所以我稍稍修改了一下塞萨尔的设计。
- Discuss with Paimon ｜ 与派蒙讨论
- Butler An? ｜ 安管家？
- Prized Isshin Blade ｜ 「一心传」名刀
- My name is... ｜ 吾乃…
- Talk to Najat ｜ 与纳杰特对话
- ...Let me restore them... ｜ …我来还原一下吧。
- Zzz... so much... roast meat... zzz... ｜ 呼…烤肉，这么大一块…呼…呼…
- So this is the guy who dug out this crazy place...! ｜ 难道…开凿出这一大片乱七八糟空间的…就是这个大家伙吗！
- (About that topic brought up the other night... Ahh, I can't space out. I can't let anything affect my work.) ｜ （关于昨晚讨论的问题…哎呦，可不能走神，耽误工作就不好了。）
- I can sense that many terrible things happened here. I can sense many emotions — rage, terror, but also hope, trust, and admiration. ｜ 我能感觉到，这里发生了许多可怕的事情。能感觉到许多情感。愤怒的感情、恐惧的感情。也感到希望、感到信任、感到憧憬。
- But I was still a teenager at the time. I'd been betrayed by those I trusted most, and I didn't think that more "moderate" ways would solve the problem. ｜ 我那时十几岁，被最为信赖的人欺骗，也并不信任那些「更好」的解决方法。
- Thank you, Nara! Arakanta is so happy! ｜ 谢谢你，那菈！兰犍多好快乐！
- But there really is something ominous about this place, brave warrior. Lately, I too have begun to feel a little... strange. ｜ 可是，这真是邪门的地方啊，勇士，我最近也觉得、觉得有点奇怪了。
- But... But... ｜ 这…这…
- Takeda ｜ 武田
- ...It's looking as suspicious as always. ｜ …这次也十分可疑呢。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I have awaited your arrival with great anticipation, and Thoma assures me that you do indeed possess the power to change the tide of the times. ｜ 我一直很期待二位的到来，从托马的转述中，也确信了二位所拥有的「改变时局」的力量。
- Is that the only impression she gives you? Riches? ｜ 凝光给你的印象就只剩下钱了吗…

- Thinking ｜ 思考
